subject: Meet our newest candidate: Jason Call!

body:
Jason is a lifelong anti-war and climate activist running for Congress in WA-02. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIxeDWqAtfj4Fn87VuYfG4Xt4DQgNWFgDCOefFWaI9Dp_O6IxexNATE7cITP5W1rXb8BlbLHOFxWdi6Nh2hNxFp1kZwC200z8OdsT3_3o5NCpdUU4oGrtZl79NdhEhPV2vAbjpIoMwl2tCT6PTxM8YYLm5Vva20zq5K1_nS36NQaFDwID8N18WIgrqeTvDPHYBsJZG3Kcj07oWFei0Gz5ChVxzW8Q3SbiW4R4rNpk6N5YtaNea07kZwC7FW5NX9WFZKOJgx1dWRA6JsbWWXv7wo/3gu/GPBFbuhLQhm40NlGTCyeWA/h0/b59FZxMO9XOwZ8xEfmDXwBKxjiepTRGC_tQxNcZqzkA)

Peter -- I am excited to introduce you to the newest addition to the Future Generations slate: Lifelong anti-war and climate activist, Jason Call!
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wJRgWreWTfJubydGwt-jF_GQn3e8LeaH50GdU79JLczsoFIcuwQB9ZsbLa5usBKf8oZY3Zk2UE3viigUnN0ilMMdMAp4BFZs-B1z4tVUf_SfuSNWkJDqZP43634P63QRjl9tJEvN9P5ulXYWB9ftzhcl6KsT6JqnU_Msmy5xyNBejID_BlDDF1ZsfYbNYHJe63Jn7x-naUQI29axGLba6przaWm7Q4KUzAqVUHmVJqbGapJfJntBMqjnb5Q5rOfW18k_kNdoruPmy5m-PNuKjm5h7_84F6PNzh0L58UlKz6n1aiFcK0ucbvM2g8GbwqAQFhcfA84ZRU6WRTLNWQ0SMXa8PkVl7qqitOrGjliy0ew/3gu/GPBFbuhLQhm40NlGTCyeWA/h1/iMbNbor4T0z03vuKPc_psWmlmlm5Yz1Mcp2ojHT9e9k)

We knew within moments of meeting Jason that we wanted to partner with his groundbreaking campaign to represent Washington's 2nd Congressional District. **Will you help us welcome Jason to the slate by splitting a contribution with his campaign and Future Generations now?**
---
[ **Elect Jason for the Future!** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wJRgWreWTfJubydGwt-jF_GQn3e8LeaH50GdU79JLczsoFIcuwQB9ZsbLa5usBKf_iKDGOQSccraNB56xIFJrDkgfvApXIlahNE597N5RJ1Khp2KnO4-dM4Rxkve_UcIcFUZN_MO3C0R0msPoTbph-gB3OqOq-1iZLhCjdVNLR2vynmxBdx6nvBa-8RD2IQF2IFepI7Pm_i9D87BHa6sFieHIGfxIjwg580_7GPxU8N-PKLBEj8BFTVDtFEnXSQNTs3iYpOnYhjTfLdbVvJe5JPuLqJzLGE9LtQzY41e-W1hsRrQdYPVDYqIZsxDFA3S_ZdQLxvQ80V36-wRaihUXExRcBdutjV_bMONryUnE7tw/3gu/GPBFbuhLQhm40NlGTCyeWA/h2/s1k4he8GeBYHjFCJ1v02IWtqgzgP4umHEqA72JTbEDU)
---
Jason has been leading the fight to end forever wars and stop the climate crisis for three decades. As a public high school teacher he challenged his students to think critically about how their choices -- and the choices of our policymakers -- have lasting impacts far beyond their individual lives. A union leader and a lifelong activist, Jason is an accomplished and effective organizer. He's running for Congress to fight for Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, living wages, free public college and trade school, cut military spending, and end the corrupting influence of corporate money in politics.
---
_"I'm honored and humbled to receive the endorsement of Future Generations. As an activist for peace, healthcare, education, labor, social and racial justice, and the environment for the last 30 years, earning this endorsement is an affirmation of those efforts and a recognition that in order to preserve our living planet and ensure a sustainable and just economy for ALL people -- not just in America, but globally -- we must substantially change the representation in Congress. "_ **Jason Call, Candidate for U.S. House (WA-02)

** As a former teacher, and a working class dad, Jason works tirelessly to fight for a liveable future for young people -- and for all of us. Jason's opponent is a deeply entrenched incumbent funded by fossil fuel companies and the military industrial complex. Last year, Jason came within 2,600 votes of getting past the primary and into the general election. **This year, with our support, he 's going to win.** ** ** **[Your split contribution between Jason and Future Generations will help boost his campaign and make sure we have the resources we need to win this race.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wJRgWreWTfJubydGwt-jF_GQn3e8LeaH50GdU79JLczsoFIcuwQB9ZsbLa5usBKf_fTYtBfybAth4s1P-dwhQruHrQI1pUlr-Tt0pRwh-teV-yQRaIOmMdt8RtXWFi-cXcUIYvL3sZzGNV_f9tikILJFfTay6ikr_noP2ITw0c9Y6UkHGZmvKXoUWoVm91JjN_7DyQG03ipvxj1bstzJsPo-SuZHu7f0TSZEbkIUa76FFIYfbvhxGFNlKZR-I36llnsDsWdTb1J5zqBnOKUtdaP1828sIbrJfg8xrxWEK2lG8tfnOAiKkMFxI4A4NmD_fR_4VIvd1jZuXIbldVqB8rzgb3eg6PyRKqBeGnoM1QTQ/3gu/GPBFbuhLQhm40NlGTCyeWA/h3/YDefwHsKlQy_JX7MqqjDVvTbAHJ-ns7xwbDF6fn0iNU)** Join us, and let's elect #JasonForTheFuture! In solidarity, Roza

| | **Future Generations** is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats.

We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. name: The Fake News Media (via NRSC)
subject: This is important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Let’s expose the truth about the lying news media. | ****
---
**[Fake News Alert](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=05605b23eef9484ab4dfded739cf09d9&_e=uqUmfwZdNo-DkR-tS0bFjxBV32E4tB365TxfsrgnNCH4ThqiAL4_4n6XIbVaGgDCpjmZIC9e0ML71VfraucQxZz6ZjPtM_5HLk8LXYyRSw5aOdfWUfDjNstf_742z_VUdBKarsANKOFwwtmGtUR7WGcJ6VLSqxp6NvOo5_s-gZWidxbFW5tLcTwDd_LSchDFeZslUc5T90TGfvGrtUppxOdvklcbwmHSQoM4Od2X-Gd2sUm7BUSOltoBAyGbplrG_qKKh3Vyr7_vgR3-4Xd-VQnWxbXyi0Pusu6Df323DT7gslIMraRWL7QCRrkQaffn2zZ63BIYPzkq4-HsTdICkDrP1dg7u6moq4fM0pGAWrLNEmoOuqUkla99a1qHe399kHOuGWSjGISW4UbR7btqbaHYevH51JaxcW3rPgQBcyuk3lwrKDQJQTsxiSwCE2PZmx5LfFR3TC00vNarsm2B2DCGJk4JU1PgvHbDqsdKhzRYTEeqZIdxtqDoECmPKf5r)**

This is absolutely absurd, Peter.

The lying news media is saying that President Trump’s supporters are deserting him, but we know that couldn’t be further from the truth.

name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: [NEW] Post-election trainings for you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| a new election season begins...
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..D2tFFFpKXbD4vXT_RGxxKP2q9CKs6I9h4DXZGqliFL0)
Peter — There’s so much to reflect on after last Tuesday’s election! _That’s why next week’s trainings are geared towards helping you learn from this past year to be stronger in the future!_ **➔****Tomorrow at 1pm ET, join us for**[**Running an Effective Political Campaign Debrief.**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..q6Amoz1UH1RnsAyTUk5ibecWgFHlSlglwIx8uTChk5U) At this training, you’ll learn from your wins _and_ losses in 2021 and move on with a better, stronger strategy for the 2022 midterms. Our expert trainers will ensure your next campaign is better than the last! | [RSVP HERE →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..q6Amoz1UH1RnsAyTUk5ibecWgFHlSlglwIx8uTChk5U)
---
**➔ Then, RSVP to**[**Running an Effective Campaign Debrief for your Democratic Party**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..o2h7dElqCYsBKhPqdtFVANfO85dnW3toPbpo6ngx95g)**on Tuesday, November 9 at 1pm ET.**
Now that you know how to debrief your own campaign, how about debriefing for your local Democratic Party?
This training will give you the skills to evaluate what went well for your party and what can be improved so that we can guarantee a Blue wave next November!
[RSVP HERE →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..o2h7dElqCYsBKhPqdtFVANfO85dnW3toPbpo6ngx95g)
---
**➔ And finally, don’t miss out later this month on the Great Democratic Debrief!**
[**Campaigns will be held on Tuesday, November 16, 1pm ET**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTExMDcyMV9SVSZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.DAbKWAZTWyJD6g7xwGvkW-eZpvvUaWO8ZPgiYMWscT0) and [**Local Leaders is on Wednesday, November 17, 1pm ET**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..-SLJ_wGsexZy6HbLruAvxUkN_hKQxOvzvs3UnCYjHQI)**.**
NDTC’s Great Democratic Debrief is your exclusive opportunity to share insights, challenges, and best practices for running campaigns. Learn from fellow leaders in this interactive event.
If you want to join fellow **campaign** professionals, join us for Tuesday’s event. To participate with fellow **local leaders** , RSVP for Wednesday's event!
In order to encourage active collaboration, these events have a limited capacity. RSVP now!
[RSVP FOR CAMPAIGNS DEBRIEF →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTExMDcyMV9SVSZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.DAbKWAZTWyJD6g7xwGvkW-eZpvvUaWO8ZPgiYMWscT0)

clean_body: | a new election season begins... Peter — There’s so much to reflect on after last Tuesday’s election! That’s why next week’s trainings are geared towards helping you learn from this past year to be stronger in the future! ➔Tomorrow at 1pm ET, join us for At this training, you’ll learn from your wins and losses in 2021 and move on with a better, stronger strategy for the 2022 midterms. Our expert trainers will ensure your next campaign is better than the last! | ➔ Then, RSVP to Tuesday, November 9 at 1pm ET. Now that you know how to debrief your own campaign, how about debriefing for your local Democratic Party? This training will give you the skills to evaluate what went well for your party and what can be improved so that we can guarantee a Blue wave next November! ➔ And finally, don’t miss out later this month on the Great Democratic Debrief! and . NDTC’s Great Democratic Debrief is your exclusive opportunity to share insights, challenges, and best practices for running campaigns. Learn from fellow leaders in this interactive event. If you want to join fellow campaign professionals, join us for Tuesday’s event. To participate with fellow local leaders , RSVP for Wednesday's event! In order to encourage active collaboration, these events have a limited capacity. RSVP now! — the NDTC Team | This message was sent to: | Connect with us on social media! | | | ---|---|--- | ---|--- Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats.org, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th Street NW, Suite 925, Washington, DC 20006

name: Jim Jordan
subject: RINOS after me (Read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712309:J-cE3Z2yN:m:1:3298722022:05E309ADB5B40B0E7D1EDB33B16E0712:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

body:
|
| | | **" Let's Go Brandon!" flags are here!!!**
Brandon has been doing such a good job recently that we decided to make him a limited-edition flag to cheer him on.

These Let's Go Brandon flags are the perfect way to show that you stand with Brandon, and think he's doing an amazing job! **[So root on Brandon and get your flag before we run out of this limited batch.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712392:J6yEJZ27N:m:1:3299561967:B8B5E48C092B7BA0E7966713DA9C6336:r "So root on Brandon
and get your flag before we run out of this limited batch. ")**

---
When you buy your flag today, not only will you be supporting Brandon, but you will be helping House Conservatives as they fight to fire Pelosi and take back the House.

So if you stand with Brandon and against the socialist Democrats in Congress, then you NEED to claim your flag ASAP before we run out. We will NOT be reordering anymore once this batch runs out. **[Get my flag now>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712392:J6yEJZ27N:m:1:3299561967:B8B5E48C092B7BA0E7966713DA9C6336:r "Get my flag now>>>")**

Let's Go, Brandon!

House Conservatives Merch Team

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712393:J6yEJZ27N:m:1:3299561967:B8B5E48C092B7BA0E7966713DA9C6336:r "Folks, can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Sarah
subject: Hi, you weren’t responding so I thought I’d check in one more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Nearly everyone on this list said they're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.
Hi again,
I wasn't planning on doing this but I'm really hoping you'll respond if I try one last time...
**Nearly everyone on this list said they 're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.** Now I have the task of contacting the last remaining hold outs -- _including you._
[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712106:J1-hJZ2Nr:m:1:3253819041:63475386BB2B45DDDA95DADF23DB4514:r)
_\-- Sarah_

_\---------- Forwarded message \---------
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712106:J1-hJZ2Nr:m:1:3253819041:63475386BB2B45DDDA95DADF23DB4514:r)
From: Sarah
Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712106:J1-hJZ2Nr:m:1:3253819041:63475386BB2B45DDDA95DADF23DB4514:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712106:J1-hJZ2Nr:m:1:3253819041:63475386BB2B45DDDA95DADF23DB4514:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58712106:J1-hJZ2Nr:m:1:3253819041:63475386BB2B45DDDA95DADF23DB4514:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

name: Lombardo for Nevada
subject: What is Your Top Issue?
body:
Sheriff Joe Lombardo values the feedback of everyday Americans like you.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ns8uWdHGsPaenV0wffq-gZsfiZDsbsvOAvXNycwrevJQQTF_xZuTHAhCIRLpjq6RnSHWS_yEnRbBCiOeF86qC0NMYJ1WtRNBPny3WPDCpgDw74ob64u8H-bTI1V71x8GU-2Jbpi-0GUYDEkImG91W3T-ZdWlZo8skaDFv3Xnxo8LHFJ1g5WpFnHkSZj0JqWR_24TJcqP_vW-nHWTHBxAAQ==&c=1pNdq3FbX6mo6IZPo6rGBPn2wpIR6ihEgNON1k1TxucLn3RXC_x1qA==&ch=XiOJvK1jj9GL0FJDxSXnTSIou22RnDkmqoV6g319E5CHRt0UBAijzw==)
---
|
---
| | My fellow American,
Sheriff Joe Lombardo values the feedback of everyday Americans like you.
Unlike some politicians in D.C. and Carson City who try to rush through their own agenda without any input, Joe listens to the concerns of citizens in his community about the issues that are important to them.
That's why we're reaching out today with a brief survey. As Sheriff Joe Lombardo looks to continue protecting his community as Governor, let him know what you feel is the top issue of the day and he'll get to work fighting for YOU \- just like he always has!
---
| | | [TAKE THE ISSUES SURVEY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ns8uWdHGsPaenV0wffq-gZsfiZDsbsvOAvXNycwrevJQQTF_xZuTHAhCIRLpjq6RnSHWS_yEnRbBCiOeF86qC0NMYJ1WtRNBPny3WPDCpgDw74ob64u8H-bTI1V71x8GU-2Jbpi-0GUYDEkImG91W3T-ZdWlZo8skaDFv3Xnxo8LHFJ1g5WpFnHkSZj0JqWR_24TJcqP_vW-nHWTHBxAAQ==&c=1pNdq3FbX6mo6IZPo6rGBPn2wpIR6ihEgNON1k1TxucLn3RXC_x1qA==&ch=XiOJvK1jj9GL0FJDxSXnTSIou22RnDkmqoV6g319E5CHRt0UBAijzw==)
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ns8uWdHGsPaenV0wffq-gZsfiZDsbsvOAvXNycwrevJQQTF_xZuTHAhCIRLpjq6RnSHWS_yEnRbBCiOeF86qC0NMYJ1WtRNBPny3WPDCpgDw74ob64u8H-bTI1V71x8GU-2Jbpi-0GUYDEkImG91W3T-ZdWlZo8skaDFv3Xnxo8LHFJ1g5WpFnHkSZj0JqWR_24TJcqP_vW-nHWTHBxAAQ==&c=1pNdq3FbX6mo6IZPo6rGBPn2wpIR6ihEgNON1k1TxucLn3RXC_x1qA==&ch=XiOJvK1jj9GL0FJDxSXnTSIou22RnDkmqoV6g319E5CHRt0UBAijzw==)
---
| Whether it's protecting Election Integrity, or supporting law enforcement, Joe knows there's a lot of pressing concerns on the minds of the American people.
Rather than ignore them like many politicians have, [Joe welcomes this feedback - he listens and he shares our values.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ns8uWdHGsPaenV0wffq-gZsfiZDsbsvOAvXNycwrevJQQTF_xZuTHAhCIRLpjq6RnSHWS_yEnRbBCiOeF86qC0NMYJ1WtRNBPny3WPDCpgDw74ob64u8H-bTI1V71x8GU-2Jbpi-0GUYDEkImG91W3T-ZdWlZo8skaDFv3Xnxo8LHFJ1g5WpFnHkSZj0JqWR_24TJcqP_vW-nHWTHBxAAQ==&c=1pNdq3FbX6mo6IZPo6rGBPn2wpIR6ihEgNON1k1TxucLn3RXC_x1qA==&ch=XiOJvK1jj9GL0FJDxSXnTSIou22RnDkmqoV6g319E5CHRt0UBAijzw==)
Take just two minutes to give your input for our Issues Survey using the button below!
---
| | | [WHAT IS YOUR TOP ISSUE?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ns8uWdHGsPaenV0wffq-gZsfiZDsbsvOAvXNycwrevJQQTF_xZuTHAhCIRLpjq6RnSHWS_yEnRbBCiOeF86qC0NMYJ1WtRNBPny3WPDCpgDw74ob64u8H-bTI1V71x8GU-2Jbpi-0GUYDEkImG91W3T-ZdWlZo8skaDFv3Xnxo8LHFJ1g5WpFnHkSZj0JqWR_24TJcqP_vW-nHWTHBxAAQ==&c=1pNdq3FbX6mo6IZPo6rGBPn2wpIR6ihEgNON1k1TxucLn3RXC_x1qA==&ch=XiOJvK1jj9GL0FJDxSXnTSIou22RnDkmqoV6g319E5CHRt0UBAijzw==)
---
| Thank you for your thoughtful feedback, Team Joe Lombardo
---
|
---
| Lombardo for Governor | [Visit our website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ns8uWdHGsPaenV0wffq-gZsfiZDsbsvOAvXNycwrevJQQTF_xZuTHAuS-ufk-mD022f87bKFoM2LBbYQUtxOf7KEd0uuKgosV72-7QSCaaouBzggwuUBjR9cF-VbNlSUe_2b6qFIIVlYUeCMrb3hNA==&c=1pNdq3FbX6mo6IZPo6rGBPn2wpIR6ihEgNON1k1TxucLn3RXC_x1qA==&ch=XiOJvK1jj9GL0FJDxSXnTSIou22RnDkmqoV6g319E5CHRt0UBAijzw==)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Virginia Bellwether
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Virginians did their part to make America great
again.

In a stunning upset in a Democrat stronghold,
conservative businessman Glenn Youngkin CRUSHED lying, woke,
millionaire leftist Terry McAuliffe in the most important
election of 2021.

I'm writing to you today because Youngkin's victory
tells us two URGENT facts about American politics right now.

▶︎ First, the Democrats' embrace of woke
extremism - Critical Race Theory, Covid lockdowns and mandates,
and in Virginia, their criminal coverup of trans sexual assault -
is POISON to the American people.

▶︎ Second, Republicans are now poised to score
HUGE WINS in the 2022 midterms.

That means the Republican primary elections for the
U.S. Senate are the most important elections next year. And they
will be decided in just a few months!

Help us push our group of courageous conservatives
on to victory with a split contribution to their campaigns.

Virginia's election results proved that
establishment, corporate Republican candidates are OVER. To win
next November - to give Joe Biden's Democrats the defeat they
deserve - we need principled, fighting conservatives on the
ballot.

That's why SCF only endorses leaders who aren't
afraid of the issues that really matter:

✅ Immigration✅ Parent rights✅ Election
integrity✅ Right to life✅ Critical Race Theory

Beltway Republicans always let us down on these
issues. We can't allow corporate donors and insiders to hand-pick
milquetoast stuffed-shirts to do their bidding.

If Republicans want to win big next year, we need
MAGA leaders, not RINO lapdogs, to win the GOP primaries.

Please join us in supporting true, fighting
conservative Senate candidates NOW!

Senate Conservatives Fund is 100% focused on winning
key primary elections across the country. We have a slate of
tremendous candidates - candidates you'll love and Washington
will hate. And we'll be endorsing more soon.

But what we need right now is to send a message to
all the GOP insiders telling themselves they won last night.

If grassroots conservatives flood SCF with
contributions TODAY, the signal will be loud and clear: Virginia
wasn't just a loss for the Democrats, but rather it was a loss
for the established elite in both parties who are destroying our
country.

Send them a message they can't ignore!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and
for doing so much to fight for conservative leadership in
Washington. Thanks to your support, we are now positioned to make
2022 an earthquake election.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

2022 SENATE CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Winsome Sears, VA Lt. Governor
subject: A black Republican: I’m Democrats’ worst nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

You may have seen me in the news this past week, or even on Sean Hannity's show.

**The reason why I 'm suddenly showing up everywhere is simple: [I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia -- living proof that everything the Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58714418:629KZZ2EN:m:1:3298722022:D9548E22C16A97512E4EC3A791D00B57:r "I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia — living proof that everything the
Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.")**

_I 'm a Jamaican immigrant who legally immigrated to the United States and became a citizen of this country because I wanted the American Dream for myself _--_**and I did just that.** I'm a small-business owner and a U.S. Marine. _

And now, as the first black woman elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, I'm thrilled to start working alongside strong, conservative leaders putting our country FIRST again.

The Left has put American citizens on the back burner for far too long.

**[It's time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help me do just that.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58714418:629KZZ2EN:m:1:3298722022:D9548E22C16A97512E4EC3A791D00B57:r "It’s time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help
me do just that.")**

---

Thank you for your support today, Peter.

I'm confident that with your help, we'll continue to chip away at the Left's control in our country and save our states.

God bless,

Winsome Sears
Lt. Governor-Elect of Virginia

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Over 40 Young GOP Leaders Back Jake
body:
National Young Republicans Chair: Evans will ‘energize a new generation of voters’
---
| | | | | |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Nov. 8, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Over 40 Young GOP Leaders Back Jake
National Young Republicans Chair: Evans will 'energize a new generation of voters' A list of over 40 young professionals and students with leadership positions in Republican organizations support Jake Evans in the Sixth Congressional District race. The list includes the chairman of the National and Georgia young republicans, Georgia college Republicans, Georgia teenage Republicans and for the Atlanta, Buckhead, Cobb County, DeKalb County and Forsyth County Young Republicans. "The future of our country depends on Americans like Jake Evans taking up the fight for the conservative principles that made this country great," said Rick Loughery, the chairman of the Young Republican National Federation. "We're personally supporting Jake who'll never compromise on our American beliefs, unite Republicans of all ages and energize a new generation of voters. We're going to take back a seat once held by Speaker Gingrich with a new generation leader who is endorsed by Newt and will fight just as hard for us in Congress. Jake came up through the ranks of Republican grassroots, just like all of us did, and we know that no one will outwork him."
The following young Republican leaders are supporting Jake as individuals, not as representatives of their organizations:
National & State Chairs RICK LOUGHERY, Young Republican National Federation - Chairman ANDREW ABBOTT, Georgia Young Republicans - Chairman JOHN LONGSHORE, George Federation of College Republicans - President COOPER JACKS, Georgia Teenage Republicans - Chairman
County/Local Chairs GABE HARTWIG, Atlanta Young Republicans - President DEANNA HARRIS, Cobb County Young Republicans - Chairwoman DONTE THOMPSON, DeKalb County Young Republicans - President SCOTT JACKSON, Forsyth County Young Republicans - Chairman ADAM KELLER, Buckhead Young Republicans - President JACK CRARY, Roswell High School Republicans - President WILL SPENCER, Kennesaw State University College Republicans - President JORDAN THOMPSON, Young Professionals of Atlanta - President
Former Chairs COLT CHAMBERS, Georgia Young Republicans - Former Chairman JOHN BUSH, Atlanta Young Republicans - Former President STEVE HAWRYLIK, Buckhead Young Republicans - Former President MICHAEL WILLIAMS, Cobb County Young Republicans - Former Chairman CHRISTIAN ZIMM, Buckhead Young Republicans - Former President
Other YR Officers/Members ALLEN ENGLISH, Atlanta Young Republicans - Executive Vice President SHANE MCGONIGAL, Forsyth County Young Republicans - Vice Chair KEVIN HENDERSON, Atlanta Young Republicans - Former Vice President of Events DAVID LIN, Atlanta Young Republicans - Former Vice President of Communications BRANDON NIVENS, Atlanta Young Republicans - Secretary KATIE KYZER, Buckhead Young Republicans - Women's Chair GURTEJ NARANG, Georgia Federation of College Republicans - Vice President NOAH RING, University of Georgia College Republicans - VP of Social Media CHASE SANGER, Cobb County Young Republicans - Vice President DEBORAH FURR, Atlanta Young Republicans - Vice President of Political Affairs SKYLER AKINS, Atlanta Young Republicans CHARLIE BARRETT, Hall County Young Republicans ROBERT BONNER, Atlanta Young Republicans ASHLEY BOSSERT, Atlanta Young Republicans - Former Women's Chair CHRISTIAN BOSSERT, Atlanta Young Republicans DORIAN GRIFFIN, Cobb County Young Republicans KEVIN KYLE, Atlanta Young Republicans AUSTIN MASTERS, Atlanta Young Republicans ANDREW PRESSLER, Atlanta Young Republicans GEORGE STAMPS, Atlanta Young Republicans CHUCK STONE, Atlanta Young Republicans - Former VP of Political Affairs JOHN HENRY THEISS, Atlanta Young Republicans - Former Treasurer SUNITA THEISS, Atlanta Young Republicans - Former Women's Chair BEATRICE TORRALBA, Atlanta Young Republicans - Deputy VP of Events COLEMAN WILLIAMSON, Atlanta Young Republicans

clean_body: National Young Republicans Chair: Evans will ‘energize a new generation of voters’ | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Nov. 8, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org Over 40 Young GOP Leaders Back Jake National Young Republicans Chair: Evans will 'energize a new generation of voters' A list of over 40 young professionals and students with leadership positions in Republican organizations support Jake Evans in the Sixth Congressional District race. The list includes the chairman of the National and Georgia young republicans, Georgia college Republicans, Georgia teenage Republicans and for the Atlanta, Buckhead, Cobb County, DeKalb County and Forsyth County Young Republicans. "The future of our country depends on Americans like Jake Evans taking up the fight for the conservative principles that made this country great," said Rick Loughery, the chairman of the Young Republican National Federation. "We're personally supporting Jake who'll never compromise on our American beliefs, unite Republicans of all ages and energize a new generation of voters. We're going to take back a seat once held by Speaker Gingrich with a new generation leader who is endorsed by Newt and will fight just as hard for us in Congress. Jake came up through the ranks of Republican grassroots, just like all of us did, and we know that no one will outwork him." The following young Republican leaders are supporting Jake as individuals, not as representatives of their organizations: National & State Chairs RICK LOUGHERY, Young Republican National Federation - ## Will YOU #FightLikeAFlynn For Medical Freedom With Me?
---
Former Vice President Joe Biden declared WAR on the Freedoms we have as Americans. Recently he issued a "mandate" requiring companies with more than 100 employees to force the COVID19 Vaccine upon them. That is why I decided to fight back with the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition that nearly 100,000 people have signed at www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate I also included a COVID19 Religious Exemption Form that is totally FREE to download. I have signed OVER 40,000 of those exemptions as the Pastor of Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK and so many people have been able to keep their jobs without getting the jab. The Religious Exemptions WORK. I write this email though because now the Biden Administration is in discussions about forcing companies under 100 employees to comply with their illegal vaccine mandate. WE MUST FIGHT BACK! As a Pastor I am able to help you out as an individual but as a US Senator, I will be able to help out our nation collectively. I need your help in this fight for Medical Freedom: 1\. Share the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition link w/10 people right now and inform them they can download the COVID19 Religious Form to fight back!
www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate
2\. Please make a donation of ANY size to my campaign for US Senate so I can fight for us in DC. If a lot of people donate a little bit it adds up to a lot. I don't take money from Big Pharma like my opponent. Donate at:
www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate

clean_body: | = | | Time flies when you’re passing infrastructure bills, protecting the right to vote, and fighting for a dignified minimum wage, folks -- we’re officially only 12 months away from Election Day! 12 months may seem like a long time -- but in an election year, it might as well be a matter of days. = | | | = To put things in perspective, last cycle Republicans spent $3 million against Elaine -- and this year, with the Republicans standing to take back House control if they gain just five seats, the stakes are even higher. Elaine is one of the National Republican Congressional Committees top targets in 2022, and you can bet they’ll spend even more campaigning against her this year in hopes of flipping her seat and getting one step closer to taking back the House majority. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Emily Emily Sherron Finance Director Elaine for Congress | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Winsome Sears, VA Lt. Governor
subject: I’m Democrats’ worst nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

You may have seen me in the news this past week, or even on Sean Hannity's show.

**The reason why I 'm suddenly showing up everywhere is simple: [I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia -- living proof that everything the Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58714521:JyNrXZ2Nc:m:1:3253819041:D10C49185DA9300BD8CE47DB8D90562A:r "I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia — living proof that everything the
Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.")**

_I 'm a Jamaican immigrant who legally immigrated to the United States and became a citizen of this country because I wanted the American Dream for myself _--_**and I did just that.** I'm a small-business owner and a U.S. Marine. _

And now, as the first black woman elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, I'm thrilled to start working alongside strong, conservative leaders putting our country FIRST again.

The Left has put American citizens on the back burner for far too long.

**[It's time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help me do just that.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58714521:JyNrXZ2Nc:m:1:3253819041:D10C49185DA9300BD8CE47DB8D90562A:r "It’s time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help
me do just that.")**

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: I’m here to listen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38411446/315340092/-1062227718?refcode=fl_em_su_20211004welcome2_gv_new_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWEwM2I2ZC1hMDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=llZVIQB2t7zYeCowSahkroyR8LZ-x0Ea8OTvCJDHu_g=&emci=0dfb3aa0-4425-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=55a03b6d-a040-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4482565)
---
Hey friend, First, I just want to say: _Mil gracias!_ The outpouring of love and support I’ve received from people across southern New Mexico since I launched my campaign for Congress has been incredibly heartening. It also made it all the more clear to me that New Mexicans are ready for new leadership in the U.S. House of Representatives. **We can achieve that in November 2022, as long as we work hard — together — between now and then. This campaign is rooted in people power, and I’m here to listen to you, your ideas, your concerns, and your priorities along the way.** Our state must make progress on key issues like economic justice, environmental conservation, affordable housing, high-quality healthcare for all, comprehensive immigration reform, and so much more. _What do you want to see the 2nd District’s representative fight for in Washington?_ **[Take my Welcome Survey to share your thoughts and let me know how I can best fight for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38411447/315340096/-1062227718?refcode=fl_em_su_20211004welcome2_gv_new_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWEwM2I2ZC1hMDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=llZVIQB2t7zYeCowSahkroyR8LZ-x0Ea8OTvCJDHu_g=&emci=0dfb3aa0-4425-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=55a03b6d-a040-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4482565)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38411448/315340097/-1062227718?refcode=fl_em_su_20211004welcome2_gv_new_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWEwM2I2ZC1hMDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=llZVIQB2t7zYeCowSahkroyR8LZ-x0Ea8OTvCJDHu_g=&emci=0dfb3aa0-4425-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=55a03b6d-a040-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4482565)
---
This is just the beginning of our movement to take back NM-02, hold our Democratic House majority, and make transformative change for southern New Mexico. Thanks for joining me.
Saludos,
Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I'm endorsing Mandela Barnes for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hello friend,
There aren’t enough members of the Senate for whom policy is personal. Just listen to the latest from Joe Manchin, who opposes paid family leave and Medicare expansion.
Congress is full of millionaires who don’t understand the struggles of working-class Americans, such as living paycheck to paycheck or going without health insurance.
We must expand our Democratic majority in the Senate by electing bold, progressive leaders across the country whose lives would actually be affected by the policies they enact.
**That’s why I’m proud to officially endorse Mandela Barnes for the U.S. Senate.**
Mandela is running to unseat Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson, who has continually spread misinformation about COVID-19, denied the legitimacy of the 2020 election results, and defended the violent mob that attacked the U.S. Capitol — just to name a few of his deplorable actions.
As the first Black Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin, Mandela has worked tirelessly for Wisconsinites and shown what’s possible when our elected officials are willing to fight for working families.
Now, Mandela is ready to bring his passion for progressive change to the Senate. I believe that Mandela is the strongest Democratic candidate to run against Ron Johnson — but it’s going to be a tough race with Republicans already raising huge sums to hold on to this seat.
[_**The race is heating up and there is no time to waste. Will you split a contribution between Mandela Barnes’ campaign in Wisconsin and my re-election campaign? We have to work together to protect our Democratic majority in Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38413113/315342412/-930051208?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211108_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNjNTg0Yy1hMTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oFMhTLS2QTkTh7-Xkyj5rPvjvo-tRVkZLcxZzhHj1XE=)

clean_body: Hello friend, There aren’t enough members of the Senate for whom policy is personal. Just listen to the latest from Joe Manchin, who opposes paid family leave and Medicare expansion. Congress is full of millionaires who don’t understand the struggles of working-class Americans, such as living paycheck to paycheck or going without health insurance. We must expand our Democratic majority in the Senate by electing bold, progressive leaders across the country whose lives would actually be affected by the policies they enact. That’s why I’m proud to officially endorse Mandela Barnes for the U.S. Senate. Mandela is running to unseat Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson, who has continually spread misinformation about COVID-19, denied the legitimacy of the 2020 election results, and defended the violent mob that attacked the U.S. Capitol — just to name a few of his deplorable actions. As the first Black Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin, Mandela has worked tirelessly for Wisconsinites and shown what’s possible when our elected officials are willing to fight for working families. Now, Mandela is ready to bring his passion for progressive change to the Senate. I believe that Mandela is the strongest Democratic candidate to run against Ron Johnson — but it’s going to be a tough race with Republicans already raising huge sums to hold on to this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed and split between Mandela Barnes and Mondaire Jones: = | = | = = | = | = Mandela is running a campaign powered by the people, and I look forward to supporting his efforts and getting him in office. name: Rand Paul
subject: READ: If we don't fire this guy now, we might not be so lucky the next time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716381:JLu8xZ2UN:m:1:3298722022:1B31BFA35E590BC6B4EC017AE6A4AFB7:r) | |
---
Peter, Dr. Fauci needs to resign or be fired NOW.

**FIRST:** I grilled him over the summer regarding his support of the Wuhan lab and their dangerous, threat-to-humanity gain of function research.

**THEN:** He lied to my face. He denied funneling money to Wuhan and said he never funded gain of function - even when thousands of documents proved otherwise.

**NOW:** He's trying to change the definition of "gain of function" to cover his own ass. And I'm not letting him get away with it.

**Let me be clear: no amount of smarmy word salad will get Fauci out of the fact that he lied before Congress and should be fired NOW.**

**[I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716381:JLu8xZ2UN:m:1:3298722022:1B31BFA35E590BC6B4EC017AE6A4AFB7:r) **

The fact of the matter is that Fauci has lost the support of the people.

The only one who doesn't realize it... _is Dr. Fauci. _

He spent our taxpayer dollars on gruesome, animal torture.

He spent our taxpayer dollars paying labs in Wuhan to create artificial super-viruses.

With every suspicious activity he's approved of, it's truly a miracle that the world isn't facing something much more fatal COVID-19.

If we don't fire this guy now, we might not be so lucky the next time.

We have to get this guy out, now. I'm doing what I can as a Senator but I need to prove to the bureaucracy and the Biden administration that we've truly had enough.

Please, join me to FIRE FAUCI by chipping in now:
[**FIRE FAUCI: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716381:JLu8xZ2UN:m:1:3298722022:1B31BFA35E590BC6B4EC017AE6A4AFB7:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716381:JLu8xZ2UN:m:1:3298722022:1B31BFA35E590BC6B4EC017AE6A4AFB7:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716381:JLu8xZ2UN:m:1:3298722022:1B31BFA35E590BC6B4EC017AE6A4AFB7:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716381:JLu8xZ2UN:m:1:3298722022:1B31BFA35E590BC6B4EC017AE6A4AFB7:r)
We need real consequences for men like Fauci who recklessly abuse their power.

**[Together, we can make sure that happens.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716381:JLu8xZ2UN:m:1:3298722022:1B31BFA35E590BC6B4EC017AE6A4AFB7:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: In 365 days...
body:
We’re one year out!

| | Friend, **One year from today, it’ll be Election Day for the 2022 midterm elections.** Time flies, right? In the 2022 midterm elections, we all get to decide what our future looks like, as we vote on how we want issues like climate change, student debt, and more to be addressed on the state and local levels. [Act now: Pledge to vote in the 2022 midterm election so you’re ready when the time comes to cast your vote!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38415673/315349528/1098656216?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ2MWU4Yi1hNDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AToGCWvWUw8rW8MIEMJ_k9zFeMBQ0lZUuKXKGtWuSBU=&emci=215aacb3-783e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=75461e8b-a440-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) As we gear up for the 2022 midterm elections, **we want to take a moment to highlight our efforts during our final five-day push as we worked together to get out the vote in Michigan, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, and Virginia:** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38415674/315349534/-467427725?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ2MWU4Yi1hNDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AToGCWvWUw8rW8MIEMJ_k9zFeMBQ0lZUuKXKGtWuSBU=&emci=215aacb3-783e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=75461e8b-a440-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38415676/315349538/-467427725?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ2MWU4Yi1hNDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AToGCWvWUw8rW8MIEMJ_k9zFeMBQ0lZUuKXKGtWuSBU=&emci=215aacb3-783e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=75461e8b-a440-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) ** None of this would have been possible without our incredible volunteers like yourself. Whether you made calls, sent texts, shared content on social media (or did all three) we want to thank you for your inspiring work to get young people to the polls. And we’re not stopping here. **We’re going to engage, register, and energize young voters for the upcoming 2022 election cycle and beyond.** As we face an ongoing pandemic, the continuing threat of climate change, and a uncertain economic recovery, we all need to continue to show up at the polls as we have in the past to make sure our future reflects and represents us. **We’re one year out. body:
|

| | This is huge, Peter— Hershel Walker is surging in the polls thanks to Mitch McConnell's consolidation of GOP establishment support for his insurgent campaign to oust voting rights champion Raphael Warnock from the Senate. 74% of Republican voters in Georgia will vote for Herschel Walker, who Donald Trump hand picked to defeat Warnock, POLITICO reports. Walker's next closest rival is polling at just 6%. It's clear: Trump is still the Republican Party's kingmaker, which means Raphael Warnock is in serious trouble right now. Donald Trump's furious, riled up, extremist base is pouring money into Walker's campaign. In just the first five weeks, Walker raised $3.7 million thanks to a blank check from nazi-sympathizers, anti-maskers, and anti-vaxers. If Trump and McConnell can successfully suppress the vote in Georgia in 2022— a state Joe Biden won by only 0.3% in 2020— Herschel Walker will defeat Raphael Warnock, and Mitch McConnell will control the Senate once again. Together, Walker and McConnell will clear the path for Donald Trump— whose reelection campaign is already firing on all cylinders— to retake the White House in 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, but we're still $1,150 short from hitting our daily fundraising goal. If we don't hear from you by midnight, we'll have to assume that you've joined the rest of the Democrats who think we can afford to play it safe. After this November's shocking upsets in Virginia and across the country, we hope that's not true. name: Burt Jones for Georgia
subject: Burt Jones: Atlanta Braves deliver poetic justice to Stacey Abrams and Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, NOVEMBER 8, 2021
Burt Jones: Atlanta Braves deliver poetic justice to Stacey Abrams and Democrats
JACKSON - In case you missed it, last week, conservative candidate for Georgia Lieutenant Governor Burt Jones penned an [op-ed for ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lG_Yno8zDH0YpeTh6kK6RXAWSdFdRZn29xWOrU4P9lsmr2-QjlhXeJ8qqjiCScyMjE1EJbKwnABoVer-VnmuoIt45UTXFat4NpdXORJ5yXFqDvwYVy8ObYwIUBlNg7-xfByfWs8Q6obm9WEIMmJ4JXGMQ01LBe6WVenRm6q-UzcVlOYX48KllcaDOeyCKQwEFNJns1vMHs79JLmc1Wv15yQFAb4xAKRw-GHzAyWokJYqKqOzeCMmYlhLkjmlhj2sqynCKutKv0M=&c=X01iBkDpvV5ImPN7qdX6B7CcoQP1HiLBN7I1b1JJPORiZhWngr5BBA==&ch=sUUSK8tvouevoQ0xALhgjdfFl8adPOP3UaldPMb70jTcvwtqVPWejQ==)[Fox News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lG_Yno8zDH0YpeTh6kK6RXAWSdFdRZn29xWOrU4P9lsmr2-QjlhXeJ8qqjiCScyMjE1EJbKwnABoVer-VnmuoIt45UTXFat4NpdXORJ5yXFqDvwYVy8ObYwIUBlNg7-xfByfWs8Q6obm9WEIMmJ4JXGMQ01LBe6WVenRm6q-UzcVlOYX48KllcaDOeyCKQwEFNJns1vMHs79JLmc1Wv15yQFAb4xAKRw-GHzAyWokJYqKqOzeCMmYlhLkjmlhj2sqynCKutKv0M=&c=X01iBkDpvV5ImPN7qdX6B7CcoQP1HiLBN7I1b1JJPORiZhWngr5BBA==&ch=sUUSK8tvouevoQ0xALhgjdfFl8adPOP3UaldPMb70jTcvwtqVPWejQ==) celebrating the Braves' historic World Series win, as well as the "poetic justice" the victory delivered over Stacey Abrams' and the Democrats cancel culture and misinformation machine. Read the full text of the op-ed below:
---
|
---
| [Atlanta Braves deliver poetic justice to Stacey Abrams and Democrats](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lG_Yno8zDH0YpeTh6kK6RXAWSdFdRZn29xWOrU4P9lsmr2-QjlhXeJ8qqjiCScyMjE1EJbKwnABoVer-VnmuoIt45UTXFat4NpdXORJ5yXFqDvwYVy8ObYwIUBlNg7-xfByfWs8Q6obm9WEIMmJ4JXGMQ01LBe6WVenRm6q-UzcVlOYX48KllcaDOeyCKQwEFNJns1vMHs79JLmc1Wv15yQFAb4xAKRw-GHzAyWokJYqKqOzeCMmYlhLkjmlhj2sqynCKutKv0M=&c=X01iBkDpvV5ImPN7qdX6B7CcoQP1HiLBN7I1b1JJPORiZhWngr5BBA==&ch=sUUSK8tvouevoQ0xALhgjdfFl8adPOP3UaldPMb70jTcvwtqVPWejQ==)
It was a banner year for the Atlanta Braves as baseball fans from across Georgia and the country cheered on our underdog team to their first World Series win since 1995.
The unifying power that sports bring to a community is unparalleled--bringing in people of all backgrounds. It's this shared, common bond that should be celebrated and embraced.
But while the Braves were focused on playing baseball, Democrats have been playing another game--politics.
After the 2020 election cycle in which we saw numerous irregularities and inconsistent changes to our elections in Georgia, as a member of the General Assembly, we passed the Election Integrity Act to secure our elections and restore confidence in the process. Among other things, we made commonsense, widely supported reforms to increase the number of early voting days to 19, to secure drop boxes, and to require identification for absentee ballot requests.
But even before they had read the bill, Stacey Abrams and far-left Democrats jumpstarted their fictitious spin machine, launching an all-out misinformation campaign to smear the bill--fabricating and amplifying lies to bully Georgia businesses into opposing the bill. In fact, Abrams herself [got caught deceptively editing](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lG_Yno8zDH0YpeTh6kK6RXAWSdFdRZn29xWOrU4P9lsmr2-QjlhXeJ8qqjiCScyMQ893t44IX4-riaUsBj-XnkFG6qf0lmZHP2iHP8x8im2pduvN0NngR1K0u8NnsU4nDLNQWw3GiRgIg-DGXaQTVG4Qnz6BZcNSyRS8_u7lf442l_fxoY0vtgcmkxtZLi2KBzXGrjIrpdeyBRdKpNCPQFQwfxOxlYko_VUuJqydV4uMaA2muEEGLstoRzYfZ-DyyFcEcQlIk1Qseq_ce_Y3dShksLzrXUmgtBsv8I8wuUM=&c=X01iBkDpvV5ImPN7qdX6B7CcoQP1HiLBN7I1b1JJPORiZhWngr5BBA==&ch=sUUSK8tvouevoQ0xALhgjdfFl8adPOP3UaldPMb70jTcvwtqVPWejQ==) an op-ed she penned in which she directly called for a boycott of Georgia businesses over the election bill.
And it worked. In April, Major League Baseball caved and pulled the All-Star game from Truist Park based on Stacey Abrams's lies. The MLB's decision was devoid of fact: it was based purely on the political lies of the polemic left. Small businesses lost out on a $100-million economic opportunity when they needed it most. Georgia residents--who overwhelmingly opposed the decision--lost out on a premier sporting event. And the Braves lost out on a chance to honor an icon in Hank Aaron at their ballpark.
But Atlanta and all of Georgia are resilient. Despite injuries to some of their best players, playing through the pandemic lockdowns, a .500 record through the first half of the season, and the MLB robbing them of the All-Star Game--the Braves never quit. They never gave up. And they never gave in.
In the ultimate show of irony and poetic justice, the Braves brought home the World Series title. And to cap it all off--amid a bellow of boos--they received the trophy from MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred himself, who just days earlier admitted to moving the All-Star Game for political purposes.
Through it all, despite the left's efforts to divide fans and politicize the sport, the Braves brought Georgia fans, families, and businesses together. That's the true spirit of the game, and that is where our focus should always be--not on injecting politics inappropriately to score political points.
The only reason Democrats are pulling stunts like these like these is because they are losing on virtually every policy issue. Tax hikes, skyrocketing inflation, supply chain backlogs, wasteful spending, critical race theory, defunding the police, cancel culture--on issue after issue, the American people are tired of Democrats' divisive failure.
They want better schools, lower taxes, safer communities, and real solutions to the every day challenges facing our country--which is what Republicans in Georgia are focused on fighting for every day.
Georgians will never forget the Braves incredible season that culminated in a World Series Championship. But they're also not soon to forget the setbacks they faced from the political ploys of Stacey Abrams. So much so that it could be a very, very good 2022 not just for the Braves--but for commonsense conservatism up and down the ballot in the Peach State.
---

clean_body: | = Friend, I can’t believe I’m saying this, but Election Day 2022 is officially just one year from today. That means we have 365 days left to build out this campaign, win the Democratic primary, and defeat far-right Republican Ryan Zinke in the general election, which will determine control of the U.S. House and the future of our state and country. = | = Friend, can you believe it’s already been about five months since we launched this campaign? We have all already come so far and made huge progress on building the foundation we need to take on Zinke and win next year. I’ve had an absolute blast meeting with Montanans across the state, and I can’t wait to meet even more of you as this campaign continues. Most importantly, I can’t wait to fight for you in Congress and serve Montana’s new district. Now is the time for bold, thoughtful leaders who can bring together coalitions to tackle the most pressing challenges our nation is facing — from existential threats to our democracy, voting rights, reproductive choice, and environment. = Thanks so much, Laurie | Laurie Bishop is a mom, former small business owner, education advocate, and an experienced Democratic leader who has been representing her small town in the Montana legislature since she unseated a Republican in 2016. body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716908:JfdOeZ2eN:m:1:3298722022:17B63C028B32CD9F9685B467A60995A0:r "Headline") Peter: I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716908:JfdOeZ2eN:m:1:3298722022:17B63C028B32CD9F9685B467A60995A0:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716908:JfdOeZ2eN:m:1:3298722022:17B63C028B32CD9F9685B467A60995A0:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to
take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716908:JfdOeZ2eN:m:1:3298722022:17B63C028B32CD9F9685B467A60995A0:r "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict
your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716908:JfdOeZ2eN:m:1:3298722022:17B63C028B32CD9F9685B467A60995A0:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716908:JfdOeZ2eN:m:1:3298722022:17B63C028B32CD9F9685B467A60995A0:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

body:
Nearly everyone on this list said they're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.
Hi again,
I wasn't planning on doing this but I'm really hoping you'll respond if I try one last time...
**Nearly everyone on this list said they 're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.** Now I have the task of contacting the last remaining hold outs -- _including you._
[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716933:61BYSZ2iN:m:1:3299561967:03B94A5DC372D4C573BA3F89213D3E16:r)
_\-- Sarah_

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716933:61BYSZ2iN:m:1:3299561967:03B94A5DC372D4C573BA3F89213D3E16:r)
From: Sarah
Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716933:61BYSZ2iN:m:1:3299561967:03B94A5DC372D4C573BA3F89213D3E16:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716933:61BYSZ2iN:m:1:3299561967:03B94A5DC372D4C573BA3F89213D3E16:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716933:61BYSZ2iN:m:1:3299561967:03B94A5DC372D4C573BA3F89213D3E16:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

[Their support is going to come from everyday members of the America First movement like YOU!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Go1Pn68hir38ffS9pvECBvKMMj8XleIbXPKqkMyWCW9rctLe9tFsnT9PfylXlAGMnovpF4dNLD6fCPamNBIN4HEAearUNNrqrmJ3ibDT4voECYNZs0cGR43BMUFWg8qMagDtgo8oxB2KDwu_7PY3MlkNdEuMhirg5QWrrDpY1GGAb7dKFuAI5yhipCGA-gw7o6fV13GMTSaKPIVe8lhkEY7qHuRIbHuSBY7m46ufKAHUKw_xCfOkRbCY39l50v5WSDut_hnSvHFZ2CjE2A2bYA==&c=mMnxTbfTZvL3SoALqmaBvSV7eHUDCxLNqOuj0RgVqIFsQSKvLi515w==&ch=1B2pwgEYAyPZvFaqbjGYMTcR3ZiUKR8imAC0BjUO6qEJSxDdy9RGWQ==)

Today is a HUGE day. We are officially one year out from the most important midterm elections of our lifetimes -- which means it's time to fire up the jets.

**And if we learned anything from what happened in Virginia, it 's that conservative grassroots are FED UP with the Democrats' radical socialist agenda and READY to take back the House next year! _*** MATCHING OFFER EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT***_

**[It is critical that we start off our year-long push to win back the House by posting a monster fundraising day! We must get off to a strong start or we will never be able to catch up to Nancy Pelosi and her dark-money machine.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716961:69pXSZ2NC:m:1:3299561967:C6E4553E14EDF23CBD5FAD3F1F867E16:r "It is critical that we start off our year-long push to win back the House by posting a monster
fundraising day! We must get off to a strong start or we will never be able to catch up to Nancy Pelosi and her dark-money machine.")**

If we don't have a strong showing today, the consequences will be dire:
* Democrats will defund -- not defend -- our police departments
* Parents will be pushed out of their children's education
* Taxes and inflation will continue to rise
* Our Southern Border will remain unsecured

_I will not let these nightmare scenarios become a reality for Americans._

Because today is so important, we are **5X matching** gifts of any amount to make sure we hit the ground running.

The time for sitting on the sidelines is over, Fellow Conservative. Nancy Pelosi is banking on us taking our eye off the ball this far out -- but we can't let her get her way! We need every single conservative patriot to join us in this fight. **[Will you help us take back the House?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58716961:69pXSZ2NC:m:1:3299561967:C6E4553E14EDF23CBD5FAD3F1F867E16:r "Will you help us take back the House?")**

The battle to take back the House will not be easy, but if every conservative patriot gets involved, our movement cannot be stopped.

To Victory,

name: Chelsea Clark
subject: I'm doing this for Miss Pearl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
Let's make quarter mile long voting lines and hour long drives to ballot dropboxes a thing of the past.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38418160/315361545/956498204?refcode=EM_FR_21108oneyear_ED_CC_5_NG_TESTB_Logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDdiMzVlOC1hYTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZKxb9r-QEDfZe5vRCaJKwstvyntpWytihyD9KsCeBzg=)
---
Friend,

A year from today will be Election Day. All of the ballots will be counted, and the future of Ohio's democracy will be determined. But we also know from last year what will also be happening on Election Day: lines a quarter-mile long in front of polling locations and Ohioans in rural communities driving an hour or more to drop off a ballot.

That's why today, I'm thinking about someone I met on Election Day last year, Miss Pearl.

While I was working at a local polling location in Hamilton County, I started a conversation with a woman named Miss Pearl. She told me about how over fifty years ago, she was an activist, fighting for the rights that would become the Voting Rights Act of 1965.

So I asked her, how do you think access to the ballot box now is compared to then? She told me, "It makes me sick. I am so frustrated." Because nothing has changed.

We look at the activists whose shoulders we stand on and the work that they put in, the sacrifices they've made, and the lives lost in a fight for something that is fundamentally our right. It is unconscionable to have the lack of easy access to voting in our state. It's a system that has been intentionally broken and miscommunicated to sow chaos and reduce people's faith in our government.

**I'm running for Secretary of State for people like Miss Pearl and for all Ohioans because you shouldn't have to be an activist your whole life to have your constitutionally given right to vote.[That's why today I'm asking for your help to make a long-standing change in the Secretary of State's office by making every day between now and Election Day count. clean_body: Let's make quarter mile long voting lines and hour long drives to ballot dropboxes a thing of the past. | = Friend, A year from today will be Election Day. All of the ballots will be counted, and the future of Ohio's democracy will be determined. But we also know from last year what will also be happening on Election Day: lines a quarter-mile long in front of polling locations and Ohioans in rural communities driving an hour or more to drop off a ballot. That's why today, I'm thinking about someone I met on Election Day last year, Miss Pearl. While I was working at a local polling location in Hamilton County, I started a conversation with a woman named Miss Pearl. She told me about how over fifty years ago, she was an activist, fighting for the rights that would become the Voting Rights Act of 1965. So I asked her, how do you think access to the ballot box now is compared to then? She told me, "It makes me sick. I am so frustrated." Because nothing has changed. We look at the activists whose shoulders we stand on and the work that they put in, the sacrifices they've made, and the lives lost in a fight for something that is fundamentally our right. It is unconscionable to have the lack of easy access to voting in our state. It's a system that has been intentionally broken and miscommunicated to sow chaos and reduce people's faith in our government. I'm running for Secretary of State for people like Miss Pearl and for all Ohioans because you shouldn't have to be an activist your whole life to have your constitutionally given right to vote.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks for being a part of this fight with me, Chelsea | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure. = Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202 www.chelseaforohio.com to receive fewer emails. BREAKING NEWS: Donald Trump is in Tampa TODAY to fundraise for the National Republican Congressional Committee.
Every dollar he raises will be used by Republicans to try to flip the House of Representatives. My race is one of the GOP’s top targets, so this event is truly a fundraiser to defeat our campaign.
Our election is in exactly one year from today. We cannot let Trump and his followers win.

Eric Lynn

Express Donate $15 [] Express Donate $25 [] Express Donate $40 [] Express Donate $100 [] Express Donate $250 [] Another Amount [’s too much at stake to let Republicans take back control of Congress. We cannot allow their brand of hate, bigotry, and fear mongering to be the guiding force in our country. Trump has already endorsed our opponent, and I refuse to allow our district to be represented by someone who will follow in his footsteps. Let’s work together to elect Democrats and end Donald Trump’s disastrous influence on our politics. Please click here to join the fight. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Winsome Sear's Victory Sends a Message from Black America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717156:6BTy5Z2xN:m:1:3298722022:BA92911A5A7D765A32A800A3E66B2702:r "Headline") Peter: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717156:6BTy5Z2xN:m:1:3298722022:BA92911A5A7D765A32A800A3E66B2702:r "Winsome Sears")**The next for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia, Winsome Sears, is:**
* A Woman
* Black
* Marine
* Conservative

**_If the Democrats were smart, this would terrify them._** They have spent generations telling black people and women that they can never get ahead unless the old white men in the Democrat Party allowed them to, but I think you know that they refuse to learn from their mistakes. Winsome is one of the thousands of Black Americans who have seen the truth and are ready to fight through their lies. **[2022 will be a massive Red Wave for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can't stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717156:6BTy5Z2xN:m:1:3298722022:BA92911A5A7D765A32A800A3E66B2702:r "2022 will be a massive Red Wave
for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can’t stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did
to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717156:6BTy5Z2xN:m:1:3298722022:BA92911A5A7D765A32A800A3E66B2702:r "Rush")You may not recognize my name, James Golden, but you probably know me as Bo Snerdley, the one-time producer and call screener for Rush Limbaugh. **Working with Rush for nearly two decades has confirmed the truth about liberals:_they HATE it when Black people in America dare to think for themselves._** I started the New Journey PAC to support candidates like Winsome - Black Conservatives who understand that the modern Democrat Party doesn't care about Black America and does nothing to help us. The New Journey PAC was all in on Winsome Sears, but our work in Virginia was only the beginning - **[the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of support to every Black Republican running for office, but we can't do anything if we don't have your support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717156:6BTy5Z2xN:m:1:3298722022:BA92911A5A7D765A32A800A3E66B2702:r "the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of

---
**In one year, the good people of Anaheim, Santa Ana, and The City of Orange will have a choice on the ballot, friends.** Will we choose to fight for Medicare for All? Will we choose to fight to eliminate student debt? Will we choose to fight prescription drug price gouging? **Or will we settle for more of the same?** What we’re seeing right now, oftentimes, isn’t that the Republican party is too conservative to get things done. Democrats that we send to Washington are too busy focusing on how to get reelected that they’re unwilling to take a strong, bold stance on things that actually matter to their constituents. In order to defeat their apathy — their unwillingness to act — we must chart a path forward with hope, solutions that meet the moment, and every day people who are ready to take action. When the price of insulin increases by 211% in just 12 years, do you really think a Congressman who takes money from the pharmaceutical industry is going to address the problem? When our forests are on fire due to the effects of climate change, who takes money from oil and gas PACs fight for our future? We don’t have time for leaders focused on self-serving opportunism in Washington. **That’s why I’m in this race, and that’s why we’ll win on November 8, 2022.** Thank you for being a part of our team, and for being in the fight with us. In solidarity, Mike | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38420727/315375634/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211108oneyear_MO_donors-and-sterling_SLB_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmMwMDJkOC1iMjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QqsocApi4MlXaRb_RwjobkNtmae6RKD78EY6BTO6RQk=)

Democrats that we send to Washington are too busy focusing on how to get reelected that they’re unwilling to take a strong, bold stance on things that actually matter to their constituents. In order to defeat their apathy — their unwillingness to act — we must chart a path forward with hope, solutions that meet the moment, and every day people who are ready to take action. When the price of insulin increases by 211% in just 12 years, do you really think a Congressman who takes money from the pharmaceutical industry is going to address the problem? When our forests are on fire due to the effects of climate change, who takes money from oil and gas PACs fight for our future? We don’t have time for leaders focused on self-serving opportunism in Washington. That’s why I’m in this race, and that’s why we’ll win on November 8, 2022. Thank you for being a part of our team, and for being in the fight with us. In solidarity, Mike | = | Mike Ortega is a Democrat running for Congress in CA-46 to fight for all working people who call America home. Mike is a lifelong organizer and a biomedical engineer who has worked on the ground to fight for his community and in the lab to save lives. = | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
