Hey friend — today’s a big milestone for our campaign!
In exactly one year, voters will head to the polls or mail in their ballots to decide the future of Florida’s 15th District. **So today, I’m asking for just $3.65, one cent for every day left in this race —[will you make your contribution now and help show the grassroots power behind this campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38420867/315376356/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211108oneyear_EG_full_SLc_l1&amount=3.65&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWNiNmM4MC1iMzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cF1rlz_0O5egDw_DMYLddd93J3EI3mjQochmCHiPJuk=)**
[Chip in $3.65 ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38420868/315376357/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211108oneyear_EG_full_SLc_btn&amount=3.65&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWNiNmM4MC1iMzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cF1rlz_0O5egDw_DMYLddd93J3EI3mjQochmCHiPJuk=)
---
As you might imagine, I’ve been doing a good bit of reflection in the last 24 hours or so. I’m proud of how far we’ve come in just a few short months (almost $150,000 raised, outpacing our opponent, for starters!). I’m grateful for people like you who have supported this campaign. And I’m so looking forward to seeing what we accomplish together in the next year.
But I keep coming back to one thing: **Florida needs real, genuine change.**
The people of this district cannot afford to wait for affordable healthcare and good jobs. Our state cannot afford to ignore the climate crisis, which threatens Florida more than almost any other state. And our country cannot afford the direct threat to democracy that insurrectionists like my opponent and his cronies represent.
**That’s why I’m in this race. Not for power, not for fame, and not even to have my face plastered on ads and videos all over the interwebs. I’m running to bring real leadership back to this district, so that we can pass policies that ensure ALL of us can thrive.**
Here’s the tricky part: Defeating Republican incumbents is hard. But if we come together and give our time and dollars when we’re able, we can do this. We’re the underdogs here, no doubt about that, but we’re scrappy, we’ve got jingles, and we’ve got real people behind us.
[**So let’s prove it: Will you make a donation of just $3.65 today to mark our one-year-out milestone?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38420869/315376358/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211108oneyear_EG_full_SLc_l2&amount=3.65&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWNiNmM4MC1iMzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cF1rlz_0O5egDw_DMYLddd93J3EI3mjQochmCHiPJuk=)
[Chip in $3.65 ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38420870/315376359/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211108oneyear_EG_full_SLc_btn2&amount=3.65&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWNiNmM4MC1iMzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cF1rlz_0O5egDw_DMYLddd93J3EI3mjQochmCHiPJuk=)
---
Thanks for being a part of this campaign.
— Eddie

| Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. name: Derek Marshall
subject: What Democrats need to learn from progressives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
This past week has been a big one for Democrats.**I want to talk about what my takeaways are from the races that concluded this week.**

Everyone knows we lost—and lost big—in Virginia. But why? It comes down to one word: policy. Instead of running on and embracing popular, progressive policy, Democrats focused on comparing their Republican challengers to Donald Trump.**In other words, they ran against Trumpism, but they didn’t run for anything, certainly not the lifesaving policies that people need right now.**

**[I’m running on the big ideas that people all over America want, and I need your help. Will you chip in to help us continue building this progressive movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38421311/315379040/-127007537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjhiNzA2Mi1iNTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTz2yaAH5THaUZh8p1HedoOegTQ2yJ4fHYSh67N3WZQ=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38421315/315379102/-127007537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjhiNzA2Mi1iNTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTz2yaAH5THaUZh8p1HedoOegTQ2yJ4fHYSh67N3WZQ=)

And we can’t count out the importance of picking the right candidates for the ticket. When moderates sit at the top of the ticket, how can voters trust them to fight the hard battles we see in Congress today? There’s a reason why this week, it was progressives who won over and over again. **From New Jersey to Boston to Michigan, progressive candidates actually won, some of them making history.**

So here’s my take: Democrats need to run on the foundational values of our party. Democrats need to run candidates who will actually represent their constituents and fight for the progressive policies we need. **Democrats need to embrace platforms that respond to popular demand, instead of recycling the same old washed-up ideas. **

That’s why I’m running on a bold platform for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, affordable housing, living wages, and canceling student and medical debt. It’s why I support free higher education and quality job creation programs. Because that’s what the people in my district need, and it’s not just us. **All over the country, poll after poll shows that the majority of Americans want us to take immediate action on climate, infrastructure, housing, healthcare, and union jobs. **

I’m ready to get to work. Are you with me? **[If you believe in the progressive vision for America, I’m asking you to contribute to our campaign today and help me flip this seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38421316/315379105/-127007537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjhiNzA2Mi1iNTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTz2yaAH5THaUZh8p1HedoOegTQ2yJ4fHYSh67N3WZQ=)**

In Solidarity,

**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08

clean_body: Peter, This past week has been a big one for Democrats.I want to talk about what my takeaways are from the races that concluded this week. Everyone knows we lost—and lost big—in Virginia. But why? It comes down to one word: policy. Instead of running on and embracing popular, progressive policy, Democrats focused on comparing their Republican challengers to Donald Trump.In other words, they ran against Trumpism, but they didn’t run for anything, certainly not the lifesaving policies that people need right now. = = And we can’t count out the importance of picking the right candidates for the ticket. When moderates sit at the top of the ticket, how can voters trust them to fight the hard battles we see in Congress today? There’s a reason why this week, it was progressives who won over and over again. From New Jersey to Boston to Michigan, progressive candidates actually won, some of them making history. So here’s my take: Democrats need to run on the foundational values of our party. Democrats need to run candidates who will actually represent their constituents and fight for the progressive policies we need. Democrats need to embrace platforms that respond to popular demand, instead of recycling the same old washed-up ideas. That’s why I’m running on a bold platform for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, affordable housing, living wages, and canceling student and medical debt. It’s why I support free higher education and quality job creation programs. Because that’s what the people in my district need, and it’s not just us. All over the country, poll after poll shows that the majority of Americans want us to take immediate action on climate, infrastructure, housing, healthcare, and union jobs. I’m ready to get to work. Are you with me? = In Solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717041:JJqnOZ2Nc:m:1:3253819041:281CEE1A1D32F378F84BE58F7CCA742D:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717041:JJqnOZ2Nc:m:1:3253819041:281CEE1A1D32F378F84BE58F7CCA742D:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to
take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717041:JJqnOZ2Nc:m:1:3253819041:281CEE1A1D32F378F84BE58F7CCA742D:r "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict
your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717041:JJqnOZ2Nc:m:1:3253819041:281CEE1A1D32F378F84BE58F7CCA742D:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58717041:JJqnOZ2Nc:m:1:3253819041:281CEE1A1D32F378F84BE58F7CCA742D:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38422394/315384419/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjhkMjY3YS1iOTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Le3ELl6qY0NDQ6h5pqMHgqv2cUdrX1VdzQO20BAT0Q=)

| | Folks, November is Native American Heritage Month -- a month dedicated to celebrating the rich histories and culture of Indigenous folks. There are over _500_ Native tribes in the country, and each has their own distinct traditions, cultural practices, and ways of life. As you know, I’m a member of the Lumbee Tribe -- a state-recognized tribe in North Carolina. We’ve been fighting for recognition at the federal level for as long as I can remember. And last week, the House voted in favor of the Lumbee Recognition Act -- a huge win for our people. Federal recognition isn’t about a title, it’s about the resources it would bring to our community -- funding for housing, healthcare, education, and public safety. Things that are hugely important for our rural community. This is a great step in the right direction, but the Lumbee Recognition Act still needs to be taken up in the Senate for this to become a reality, and one piece of legislation alone won’t alleviate the issues our rural community face. Something my Republican opponent doesn’t seem to realize. And while we celebrate this milestone, it’s important to remember that there are only _five_ Indigenous representatives serving in the entire U.S. House and zero serving in the Senate. [**So, will you chip into my campaign today and help me become the first Native American to represent North Carolina in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38422395/315384420/-1187958480?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211108_FR_NativeAmericanHeritageMonth_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjhkMjY3YS1iOTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Le3ELl6qY0NDQ6h5pqMHgqv2cUdrX1VdzQO20BAT0Q=) | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38422396/315384421/-1187958480?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211108_FR_NativeAmericanHeritageMonth_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjhkMjY3YS1iOTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Le3ELl6qY0NDQ6h5pqMHgqv2cUdrX1VdzQO20BAT0Q=)

name: Hala Ayala
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
| Peter,

I want to personally thank you for supporting my Democratic campaign for Lt. Governor of Virginia.

**Although we didn’t get the result we worked so hard for, I am immensely proud of our grassroots campaign.** Thank you for your vote, your support, and everything you’ve poured into our campaign — it means the world to me.

I know this isn’t the end for our historic Democratic progress in our Commonwealth. I’m more energized than ever to fight for voting rights, abortion access, and everything we made a priority in this campaign.

I hope you will continue to fight by my side for our democracy. We cannot shy away from this battle — _I know Virginia deserves so much better than the results of this election._

But today, I want you to know how much your support meant to me in this campaign. From knocking on doors to putting out yard signs to telling your neighbors about our campaign, I am so grateful.

Thank you,

_Hala Ayala_
Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. Governor
---

name: Team Lauren
subject: <365 days!
body:
One Year Until Election Day
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38422456/315384515/1825197402?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmNhMjJiNC1iOTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dBiiYGYx792ybIr-_qxU396dRiQQmYY5B2F7Mu5Lrug=&emci=6c1c5398-443e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=86ca22b4-b940-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24328971)
Friends, Today marks one year between us and Election Day. With the midterms on the horizon, and lessons from this month’s elections – we know we’ve got a tough, uphill climb. That said, Lauren has the vision and policy ideas needed to succeed. Now we just need support from people like you. **In the next few weeks, we’ll be mapping out our road to victory – that means developing communications calendars, budgets, and event schedules. In terms of budgets, we’ll need to come up with three. ** First, a worst case scenario, bare bones operation. Next, a modest approach with a goal of a TV ad towards September 2022. Finally, a campaign guided by all the best practices. A proven approach of digital, TV, and grassroots get-out-the-vote canvassing. **Help us build a winning campaign: chip in $20.22 today. ** clean_body: One Year Until Election Day | Friends, Today marks one year between us and Election Day. With the midterms on the horizon, and lessons from this month’s elections – we know we’ve got a tough, uphill climb. That said, Lauren has the vision and policy ideas needed to succeed. Now we just need support from people like you. In the next few weeks, we’ll be mapping out our road to victory – that means developing communications calendars, budgets, and event schedules. In terms of budgets, we’ll need to come up with three. First, a worst case scenario, bare bones operation. Next, a modest approach with a goal of a TV ad towards September 2022. Finally, a campaign guided by all the best practices. A proven approach of digital, TV, and grassroots get-out-the-vote canvassing. Help us build a winning campaign: chip in $20.22 today. = = = Let’s do this, Team Lauren Express Donate: If you're enrolled with ActBlue, ActBlue Express will process your donation instantly. | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- * Supporters for Lauren Mallett-Hays 1722 N College Avenue, Ste C#123 Fayetteville, AR 72703 Paid for by Supporters for Lauren Mallett-Hays We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to be removed from our mailing list, .

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Brighter and better days ahead for Indiana, thanks to Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
When President Joe Biden said he would deliver a better future for Hoosier families -- he meant it. When Biden said he would get things done by working across the aisle, he meant it.
And thanks to Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats like André Carson and Frank Mrvan, Indiana and our families will have brighter and better days ahead because of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal, a once-in-a-generation investment in Indiana’s infrastructure system.
We’re talking about investments to broadband that adds to the foundation already set by the American Rescue Plan. This means Indiana can repair its roads and bridges and reclaim our “Crossroads of America” reputation. And for the first time in a generation, we can revitalize our water infrastructure system and deliver safe and clean water across every community in the state.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane_other=true&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane_other=true&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.]Democrats are getting this - and more - done for Hoosier families. In fact, this Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal will address the most-pressing issues facing voters AND will help us protect our counties and small towns from the unpredictability climate change has brought to the Hoosier State.
Voters were looking for leadership from their elected officials, and Democrats - and 32 Republicans not from Indiana - were willing to step up and deliver a better tomorrow for our families and nation. This is what happens when honest leaders agree to transformational ideas in a bipartisan way.
And listen: Democrats didn’t get everything we wanted. Nor did the Republicans who supported the bill. But that’s how compromise and bipartisanship works. We put some points on the scoreboard for Hoosier families.
But here’s the deal: Democrats are up against an Indiana Republican Party whose agenda rests on culture wars and misinformation rather than solutions, like the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal. Republicans like Todd Young, Jackie Walorski, and Larry Bucshon didn’t just vote “NO” on clean water, roads and bridges, and broadband -- they had the guts to call it “socialism” too.
You heard that right. The very issues Indiana Republicans claim to care about on the campaign trail they now view as “socialism”.
They know better. But, Indiana Democrats have been willing to go it alone and will continue to be on offense until we’re able to bring balance back to our government. We’re going to work overtime and crisscross Indiana nonstop to make sure Hoosiers like you know Democrats are about delivering solutions to your problems, not creating new ones.
Democrats’ 92-county strategy is the right move. There’s no substitute for a face to face conversation. It’s common sense and until every Hoosier has the opportunity at a better future, we will not stop traveling around the state we love to call home.
Join us in this fight. Chip in whatever you can to help us gear up for the battle that’s ahead of us. And most importantly, support Democratic candidates at the ballot box next year. This is a transformational moment for Hoosiers, for Indiana, and for our country. But, we need you now more than ever.
Sincerely,
Mike Schmuhl
Chairman

Indiana Democratic Party
115 W Washington
INDLPS, IN 46202
United States
Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Mike Collier
subject: What the infrastructure bill means for Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
Congress just passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework delivering a major victory for Texas that will invest $1.2 trillion in our nation’s infrastructure. |
#
---
This is a big deal, folks: **Congress just passed the _Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework_ delivering a major victory for Texas that will invest $1.2 trillion in our nation’s infrastructure.** Countless presidents have talked about infrastructure — Joe Biden has not only delivered but delivered with bipartisan support. This legislation is the largest investment in our nation’s infrastructure in decades and provides critical funding for upgrading our roads and bridges, electric vehicles, and broadband expansion, creating millions of good paying jobs across Texas and the nation. The bill also includes millions of dollars to help Texas fix the damn grid by building new power lines, investing in smart grid technology, and expanding renewable energy. Here’s what _BIF_ funding means for the Lone Star State:
* $27 billion for highways and roads
* $500 million for bridges
* $3 billion for public transportation
* $3 billion for water infrastructure

There’s still a lot of work we need to do to invest in our infrastructure and fix the damn grid, but this step will leave a huge impact on our state’s long-term economic prosperity. If elected, I will do everything I can to bring as much of our federal tax dollars back to Texas. **That’s why I’m running for Texas lieutenant governor to solve problems and deliver for the people of Texas. name: John King
subject: Guess what day it is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer

subject: Here’s proof that when Democrats lead, we can do BIG things

Hi there friend,

On Friday night, the House passed a monumental bipartisan infrastructure bill that will inject energy and money into modernizing and improving our country’s roads, bridges, ports, water systems, and much more.

This bill will help Florida in many critical ways:
* Rebuilding our roads and bridges with an eye towards mitigating the impacts of climate change
* Increasing funding by $2.6 billion for public transportation in our state
* Setting us up for the future with investments in electric vehicles and high speed WiFi for ALL
* Delivering access to cleaner drinking water with over a billion dollars for Florida clean water programs
* Modernizing Florida’s airports

These are much needed investments in our future, friend, and it’s important that Florida has a governor who will spend these resources in a smart and equitable way.

Too often, our fundraising revolves around reacting to negative news. But this is an opportunity to show Floridians and the entire country what we know to be true:

**When Democrats lead, we can do BIG, IMPACTFUL, POSITIVE things for our state and country.**

**[Help our campaign for progress and action by making a donation of $5 or more this week!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38422917/315386563/601477077?refcode=20211108_f_3_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2FmNWYxMS1iZDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SF3pwCAjTcB83EgCIlleL9ETccij6F746N_Ikoa3f0o=)**

clean_body: | | | | = Hi there friend, On Friday night, the House passed a monumental bipartisan infrastructure bill that will inject energy and money into modernizing and improving our country’s roads, bridges, ports, water systems, and much more. This bill will help Florida in many critical ways: Rebuilding our roads and bridges with an eye towards mitigating the impacts of climate change Increasing funding by $2.6 billion for public transportation in our state Setting us up for the future with investments in electric vehicles and high speed WiFi for ALL Delivering access to cleaner drinking water with over a billion dollars for Florida clean water programs Modernizing Florida’s airports These are much needed investments in our future, friend, and it’s important that Florida has a governor who will spend these resources in a smart and equitable way. Too often, our fundraising revolves around reacting to negative news. But this is an opportunity to show Floridians and the entire country what we know to be true: When Democrats lead, we can do BIG, IMPACTFUL, POSITIVE things for our state and country. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us, team, but I’m full of energy, hope and optimism about the future. I hope you are, too. Thank you, Charlie Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: we did it!
disclaimer_text: paid for by eliminating tax loopholes for big corporations and the very wealthy
body:
|
#
Late Friday night, the House passed a big piece of President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda — the infrastructure modernization bill. This is a historic achievement. For many, many years, the running joke in Washington D.C. was "this week is infrastructure week" — everyone from both political parties talked about the urgency of modernizing our infrastructure, but nobody ever got it done. That joke ends now. Thanks to the leadership of President Biden and Democratic majorities in the Senate and House — WE DID IT. America has fallen way behind when it comes to repairing, upgrading, and expanding the infrastructure backbone of our country. With this initiative that will finally change. We will upgrade our roads, bridges, and ports; expand our public transit network and ensure that every American has access to safe drinking water — all while creating millions of good-paying union jobs. **And that’s not all.** We will boost our efforts to build a clean energy economy by helping build out a coast-to-coast network for electric vehicle charging AND grow supply chains for solar panels, wind farms, batteries, and electric vehicles for use at home and export abroad. We will ensure that every household has access to affordable and high-speed internet. **There is a lot to be proud of in this bill. We are making a vital investment in America and Americans — creating jobs and setting the stage for future economic success. I’m very proud to have helped shape this bill and include many key provisions to help Marylanders.** Next up, we must pass the other key component of the Build Back Better agenda: our investment in people power, which will expand educational and job opportunities, reduce the costs of everything from child care to prescription drugs, and cut taxes for middle income families — all paid for by eliminating tax loopholes for big corporations and the very wealthy. This is the kind of transformational change that voters came out to support one year ago this week. Thank you for being part of this important progress! Chris | _**Chris is leading efforts in the Senate to strengthen our democracy, get secret money out of our elections, and advance social justice and racial equity. Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Democratic Senate majority:**********_

Republicans have thrown hundreds of thousands of dollars at this race already, and they're only going to launch more attacks the closer we get to the election. That, coupled with the fact that Republicans won Virginia last week, means that Kevin McCarthy thinks the GOP can win as many as 60 seats next year to take the House majority. And with new district lines up in the air, we don't know what we'll be up against. We have to be ready here in CA-10 for another extremist to run against Josh. There's still a lot we don't know, but here is one thing we know for sure: polls show we're in for a tight race and we're going to need a giant grassroots army to stop Kevin McCarthy from flipping this seat red and taking the Speaker's gavel from Nancy Pelosi.
Peter, I don't mean to be a Debbie Downer because I know that we can win this together - our grassroots movement beat back an extremist Trump Republican last year, and we can do it again. It will take a lot of organizing, voter outreach, and strategizing - but we've got this.
I just need your help to make our campaign the strongest it can be. Your support is what makes the difference between us meeting this challenge or falling short. ... and 1 year until our next slate of campaigns make their way to the ballot. | | Team: **Did you see Kelly’s message this weekend? Can you believe that today marks FIVE YEARS since our first set of ballot measure wins?** Since 2016 we’ve been fighting alongside working people in America to enact the change they so badly need at the ballot box. We are so proud of the work we have been able to accomplish — and even more excited for the ballot measure fights ahead. _In fact, we are exactly 1 year out from the 2022 midterms. _ That’s why our team is doing everything we can right now to make sure heading into 2022, we have the resources we need to create change for everyday Americans. Friend, **This upcoming Monday is a very sentimental day for us._Why? Because it marks the fifth anniversary of our very first ballot measure campaign wins!_** In 2016, we secured our first set of ballot measure victories including minimum wage increases in Colorado, D.C., and Maine along with paid sick leave _and_ minimum wage wins in Arizona and Washington. Five years since we started our work fighting alongside working people in America is enough cause for celebration ... but Monday also marks _another_ important date. **This Monday, we’ll officially be 1 year out from the 2022 midterms.** [_**Will you make a recurring monthly gift to The Fairness Project today to help us have a steady flow of resources heading into 2022 so we can pass more ballot clean_body: ... and 1 year until our next slate of campaigns make their way to the ballot. | | Team: Did you see Kelly’s message this weekend? Can you believe that today marks FIVE YEARS since our first set of ballot measure wins? Since 2016 we’ve been fighting alongside working people in America to enact the change they so badly need at the ballot box. We are so proud of the work we have been able to accomplish — and even more excited for the ballot measure fights ahead. In fact, we are exactly 1 year out from the 2022 midterms. That’s why our team is doing everything we can right now to make sure heading into 2022, we have the resources we need to create change for everyday Americans. = = Thanks, team! — The Fairness Project \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Kelly Hall <contactus@thefairnessproject.org> Date: Sat, Nov 6, 2021 at 11:16 AM Subject: Monday is a very sentimental day for us To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> = Friend, This upcoming Monday is a very sentimental day for us.Why? Because it marks the fifth anniversary of our very first ballot measure campaign wins! In 2016, we secured our first set of ballot measure victories including minimum wage increases in Colorado, D.C., and Maine along with paid sick leave and minimum wage wins in Arizona and Washington. Five years since we started our work fighting alongside working people in America is enough cause for celebration ... but Monday also marks another important date. This Monday, we’ll officially be 1 year out from the 2022 midterms. = = We’ve got a full slate of ballot measure campaigns heading into the new year and now more than ever is the time for us to pull together the necessary resources to create change in 2022 the same way we first did in 2016. We’ll be running campaigns to put progressive issues on the ballot like expanding Medicaid, raising the minimum wage, providing paid leave, and ending the predatory practices of payday lenders. 2022 is set to be a BUSY year too because we’ll also be running our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign to fight back against attacks on the ballot measure process. The best way we can make sure we have the funds necessary to create change for working people across the country is to have a steady flow of resources coming in every month — starting now. = = Thanks, Kelly Hall Executive Director The Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at The Fairness Project has won 20 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 17 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. subject: 👊 On the Trail: Peter, take a look at where we've been in Arkansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doyle Webb for Lieutenant Governor
body:

| | | | | | |

[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013JLYMuj6PGpcKR9DBpTYD38ktz7XAhHl21O-QS__WPEjZByVCHilYJDRDmDTH6roaQswsgtirm5fVQ97QA5gYwiQ_reYyHQhmZBWpFwNpvvmil87pASZJHEO2Y-ZXII0Hj3JJbgpTbwpoVUG1t6iDA_DO8pXzkBC&c=OkAV8g4xZ84VWAYuujzYeq3N6p_p4VAse2IsawqI-qTak6ZOBbedfA==&ch=Tr5n2Y4DIFh9U9sl4K6FFCOZ9d0_Lzg9z9OTIYssYzA9u5FXAFZhog==)

| | Hello Peter,
I've personally already attended events in over 40 counties in our beautiful state, and there is more to come!
It is critically important to me to invest time in each county I visit -- not just do a drive by.
As Chairman of the Republican Party of Arkansas for 12 years I know the value of getting out among real Arkansans and hearing their concerns.
As we take our message of Life, Liberty, and Lower Taxes across this state I hope you'll remember that the only way we accomplish these goals is together, as a unified conservative movement.
Take a look at some of our latest stops along the campaign trail:
---

I enjoyed the hospitality of the Carroll County Republican Committee year-after-year. I was enlisted to serve coffee one year! These conservatives were proud to hear from our current Lieutenant Governor Tim Griffin!

| | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013JLYMuj6PGpcKR9DBpTYD38ktz7XAhHl21O-QS__WPEjZByVCHilYGDt6L2dr7_c2oNk7ykdXZgUrEtJ57k-JW5Zg178IY6gAdKe_nxD1Ms7Mmd9lQRXRfjRoSRuHQa-6ZwJkWa86WVdSA2O5nVhXU2cLlBndmI1&c=OkAV8g4xZ84VWAYuujzYeq3N6p_p4VAse2IsawqI-qTak6ZOBbedfA==&ch=Tr5n2Y4DIFh9U9sl4K6FFCOZ9d0_Lzg9z9OTIYssYzA9u5FXAFZhog==)

| Greene County Lincoln Day Dinner | Paragould, AR
---
I was glad to emcee a packed and enthusiastic crowd for the Greene County Republican Committee. Lots of support!

What a crowd! | | == | 4th District Committee Meeting | Arkadelphia, AR The congressional district committees are the regional backbone of our state party, and I was excited to address the 4th District. They want leaders who are accountable and show up! | | == | Carroll County Reagan Day Dinner | Eureka Springs, AR I enjoyed the hospitality of the Carroll County Republican Committee year-after-year. I was enlisted to serve coffee one year! These conservatives were proud to hear from our current Lieutenant Governor Tim Griffin! | | == | Greene County Lincoln Day Dinner | Paragould, AR I was glad to emcee a packed and enthusiastic crowd for the Greene County Republican Committee. Lots of support! | | | | == | | == | Chickin, Peelin' & Politickin' | Springdale, AR Over 600+ people attended this year's Chickin, Peelin' & Politickin in Springdale. It was great to have this Arkansas tradition back up-and-running. | | == | 75th Annual Turkey Trot | Yellville, AR It is always a privilege to join my friends in Marion County. Their Republican Party Committee was well represented at this year's Turkey Trot! No turkeys were harmed in the making of this trip! | | == | Fort Smith Q & A | Fort Smith, AR Former Fort Smith Mayor Bill Vines' Q & A group is a lively civic organization that I've had the honor of addressing after every election. Glad to see so many friends, like Sen. Gary Stubblefield. | | == | Saline County Republican Women | Benton, AR I always enjoy speaking with Republican Women's groups around the State. They are always on fire for Life, Liberty, and Lower Taxes! | | Peter, we hope to see you on the campaign trail soon. We need someone who is willing to put service above self, and the interest of our state above their own self-interest. Would you consider donating below to help us in this fight? | | My Best for a Better Arkansas, | == | == | | | | == | Paid for by Doyle Webb for Lieutenant Governor | == == | | Doyle Webb for Lieutenant Governor | PO Box 2740, Benton, AR 72018 | | Sent by mailto:contact@webbforarkansas.com powered by

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We’re tracking donations
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
For campaigns that rely on lots of individual donations, November is always a very difficult fundraising month. It happens in campaign after campaign.
#

Friends —
We’re writing to ask if you can make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today. If that’s all you need to hear, we’re going to be tracking donations at this link:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/November-2021**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1618_6688874_ZMMFtc&akid=1618%2E6688874%2EZMMFtc)
If not, let us explain why this request is so important.
For campaigns that rely on lots of individual donations, November is always a very difficult fundraising month. It happens in campaign after campaign.
It happened to Mark in his first election as well.
This is a problem, because the corporate special interests spending millions to beat us don’t rely on lots of donations. They just need one or two huge checks. It’s easy for them.
But that’s not the kind of campaign we’re running, and we can’t afford to fall behind. So, we’re really hoping we can get a strong start to the month and help minimize trouble when donations do slow down.
That’s why we’re asking:
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign today? We’re tracking donations so please chip in what you can today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1618_6688874_ZMMFtc&akid=1618%2E6688874%2EZMMFtc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: this money isn’t in the budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
With the election only one year away, we absolutely can’t afford any gaps in our budget.
#

Team, it’s Vanessa, Malcolm’s campaign manager. I made a very difficult decision this morning.
With exactly one year standing between today and the 2022 midterm elections, it’s critical for us to make big investments now that will pay off when we win next year.
This morning, my team told me that if we could invest a bit more money in our digital program, we could reach a lot more folks and bring them into our movement for working families before the end of the year.
The money wasn't in the budget, but I said OK. I gave the expense the green light.
Now, this is a huge risk. With the election only one year away, we absolutely can’t afford any gaps in our budget.
**But, honestly, I made a bet that, if we asked, you would come through to help fill that gap. I’m really hoping you will. For Malcolm. For the working families depending on us to fight for them.**
[Can you make a $3 contribution to help fill the budget gap we created by greenlighting a bigger investment in our digital outreach?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38424545/315389765/-360183459?refcode2=b617ebb9-bd40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211108-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjE3ZWJiOS1iZDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lKF2_3T5Y94MS-nVJXtsmWeublDh6VQ_fQM8IBXszlw=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38424548/315389767/-360183459?refcode2=b617ebb9-bd40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211108-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjE3ZWJiOS1iZDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lKF2_3T5Y94MS-nVJXtsmWeublDh6VQ_fQM8IBXszlw=)**
Like I said, it was a tough choice, but I made it knowing this team has Malcolm’s back.
Because of your support, we’ll have what it takes to win this race — even as the underdogs — and take our fight for working families to Washington. Thank you.
In solidarity,
Vanessa

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqvru1cu24rpu0f5e03a6jlp0ppa7bdjm33p6p7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie2or3clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc0e3m7dr030rsk9p34luv8qnjntlp3nt1ds2q50_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie2or3clh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpkh1beeueudvkh81p5b944j46qvngpnd7effnqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie2or3clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ The Federalist Papers ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of “The Federalist Papers” today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38425413/315393041/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmQ5OWZkYy1iZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mL4oNtFJDX-bW7XNgFOc-qW-aqy47aHQsI5M_3-DpPo=)

It's disturbing, dangerous, and downright un-American. Conor's more than ready to defend our democracy and our constitution in the Senate. He's taken an oath to defend it three times as a Marine, as a prosecutor, and as a member of Congress. And right now, his campaign is the only one standing between us and the GOP's despicable, undemocratic agenda. = Thanks for being part of this! Team Lamb = = *

name: Notes from Tom
subject: A year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38425615/315393966/1660491306?refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211108_1_9&refcode2=dc9dd279-c140-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzlkZDI3OS1jMTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t04tw7gQauj1N88B7HDdcBbZ4eXn7YITL-JEOs0WzL0=&emci=d99dd279-c140-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=dc9dd279-c140-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=19214294)
---
| | A year ago, I was sitting in the House chamber watching a ceremony that should have marked a peaceful transfer of power to a new president, when a mob summoned by the outgoing president stormed our Capitol. Exactly ten months later, I cast my vote in that same House chamber for a bill that will put millions of Americans to work rebuilding our country.

From insurrection to infrastructure — that’s been the story of our year thus far. I hope you’ll feel some satisfaction in electing the leaders who took Congress from the darkest day in its history to one of its most positive and productive.

The process of passing the infrastructure bill was messy. Expectations were repeatedly raised and dashed. We had genuine differences of opinion, and normal human clashes of ego and pride. I imagine you were frustrated with us at times; I was frustrated with us many times.

At times like this, it helps to have historical perspective. For example, FDR proposed the Social Security Act in January of 1935; Congress didn’t pass it till August of that year. And FDR’s Democrats had a 110 seat majority in the House. The Civil Rights Act went through a year of debate before its passage in June of 1964, when Democrats had a 41 seat margin. We passed the biggest infrastructure investment in American history in less time, and with a 3 seat working majority in the House — and a 50-50 Senate. It took virtual unanimity among Democrats to do this, at a time when cable news and social media amplify every disagreement in real time.

Whether it’s 1935 or 2021, it’s what Congress delivers that matters. Here is what we’ve delivered to the people I represent:

The Gateway Tunnel will get built (after Trump blocked it for four years), with faster, more direct trains to New York, and parents getting home to see their kids before bedtime. We’ll be better protected against the storms that dump four feet of water in our basements. Our drinking water will no longer come in lead pipes. Everyone in the most rural parts of my district will have high speed internet. People who want electric cars will be able to charge them, and our electric grid will be able to handle the load reliably.

Though this was a bipartisan bill, first developed by the House Problem Solvers Caucus (on which I serve), in the end only 13 House Republicans voted for it. They were brave to do so; some may be challenged in primaries and lose their seats for it. And that tells you all you need to know about what’s happened to their party — that for a GOP member of Congress, it takes courage now to vote for a bipartisan highway bill.

The Republican leader, Kevin McCarthy and his deputies, goaded by Trump, pressured their caucus to vote no. On the House floor, they told us that the bill was “socialist,” even “communist.” Can you imagine — they say that even infrastructure is socialism now. Do they think Eisenhower got the idea for interstate highways from Karl Marx?

It’s partly cynical politics — they’d rather see America lose than let Joe Biden get a win. But there is something even more dangerous here. We used to have two parties in America that believed in government, just with different ideas about what government should do. But one of those parties doesn’t seem to believe in anything any more, other than helping one grievance-filled man return to power. That man’s success has always been built on the belief that our government is so broken, corrupt, and unable to act that only he can fix it.

That’s why, for me, the infrastructure bill is about much more than repairing our roads, tunnels, and water pipes. It’s about repairing our democracy. It’s about restoring to people their faith that our democratic government can still do something for them, and that the leaders they elect sometimes keep their promises.

In the years to come, I hope Americans will look at the gleaming new bridges, high speed rail networks, and modern airports we build and feel pride in their country. I hope they’ll also feel that the system of government the insurrectionists attacked on January 6th still works and is worth defending.

There is more to come in the Build Back Better bill, which will restore the SALT deduction, make it easier to care for our youngest kids and oldest loved ones, and speed America’s transition to clean energy. I’ll write to you soon about that.

Meanwhile, thank you for helping us get as far as we have — let’s keep moving forward.

Best,

Tom

---
|
---
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district.
[Donate Once](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38425616/315393967/-2036603538?amount=25&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211108_1_9&refcode2=dc9dd279-c140-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzlkZDI3OS1jMTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t04tw7gQauj1N88B7HDdcBbZ4eXn7YITL-JEOs0WzL0=)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY T
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2pu3osb89o5t7brjin5sklp6ue225kh11oc2eh0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie6oj2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfpsq2latc3olg2mkvo9cd9p87u1g7khb3pdlq1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie6oj2c9h2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo918p11aniq9cvtb65c6jbt7ba7rferh7eqnvf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie6oj2c9h2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zggbs1eftnl83si0dpk5vhckh1hnnfbgmo11vqv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie6oj2c9h2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjdm85i2ee8fc2j6u4o9gg2b9sjmm5hpa5pb4k7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie6oj2c9h2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqc4d1apn1kviintde30k9g0hrqq0e4gqqcpu9k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie6oj2c9h2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0fglpu219ee21umuq8d8m1b213b5e33j5ttsi60_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpie6oj2c9h2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.

Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY T | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” “Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.” Outrageous! The New York Times’ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline for you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue.
