name: National Republican Polling
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr38t4gu0mkm7qp69ub3soerfb8l8ukrisc9oqno_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpieep32cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpl5q7fl2r31rqrp48i25j2jph10v91uv1ro25b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpieep32cjh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5luh0nec6nk2l1ad305ng74f2ttao0cm7ql7o7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpieep32cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2q89j7vm47m527q4tcepim3su796jrbio2du79o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdj69pr4c9ie49fg)

name: Wes Moore
subject: honestly;
body:
| | I’ll be honest with you: Election Day is one year out. And frankly, with Democrats’ loss in Virginia and a close call in New Jersey, we need all hands on deck. In this race, I pledge to you that I won’t shy away from the tough questions. I’ll fight for bold, generational change for our schools, health systems, and economy. But first, I need your help. [**Because after this week, Maryland is a clear target for the GOP, and I’m going to need an army of support to compete in this race and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38426585/315398654/-711004501?refcode=20211108_em_fr_b1_moore_30_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzc0ODYwZi1jNjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZ76UP8f50HUQ21bF-2V5lv0M0Oj8kESQLoxSYhXzk4=) I can’t overstate the urgency of this moment. Hello,
Today is Admiral Mike Franken’s birthday!
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHPEnsMPg7K1rtfXlRb1y1uYq2pLoaXiBi-NsKL0C5CUDjSbQvUIToVv4d_v36vIaQmKS9ckA-eCRnVo31QH_YvV8dtUlFqyHMllJJ4XcCgB8wMGtAfFWuhIRkOSuimp84eOfW9rNlNm3OSmzK6EFYTNxYvPoW_MI33Jrhvm8-bQmboUJcA4sLr3Xz1wnQAbn0rXHXsPl_wpzWNXSrx6VKNZsaB5CJxjRMS_BOhFewQFktN4JecQox0vBSS0cGH0U93R-P9oGTbA_v_iMJJgFvDJodzrQrsuOLB0Dl1KrRYr87lRc1pfwPy1Kq5iwGP7HZIGWPVmYtEJVt6NtnDBGu8aFaZz3Wap7oMAQpkvF6_4W/3gu/2Cz37cx_RsCvw-M1fnBzPw/h1/B-3BNZFOfVunzrm6h4LUp10FyR5SZEAA8vi6CNzom-g)
But that’s not all: **Today also marks one year from Election Day 2022 (that’s right, Mike’s birthday is going to be _on election day_ next year!).**
Mike won’t be getting any birthday gifts from corporate PACs this year (he’s not taking their money!), so we were hoping you could chip in to his Senate campaign today and help give him the dignified retirement of Chuck Grassley instead. :)
Senate control will be decided in Mike’s race against Grassley. Iowa was one of the closest races in 2020, and it’ll be even closer in 2022.
Luckily, only 27% of Iowa voters say they want to re-elect Grassley in a recent Des Moines Register poll – but Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions on nasty TV ads against Mike.
**We need just 64 more gifts to hit our birthday goal:** [**Please, can you chip in now – no amount is too small – to wish Mike Franken a happy birthday, defeat Chuck Grassley, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHPEnsMPg7K1rtfXlRb1y1uYq2pLoaXiBi-NsKL0C5CUDjSbQvUIToVv4d_v36vIaQiRNjJhMvwesGRS43WxS138sko-ZMAgTeV-raD2GElQ-jv9Zsaf8mXDC_eLGSEpfEcye9VpkK7GzEdlPTnJFrtP1BH4mXHI6oceHTHYC-hw4hgcag58WiWgPfsgqWZsTTAUpdZItMNkeuTMRLORejbRuTVphU3KGXNsVhW6T2LySSZVdhZA2Jhl59z8JQvJuQfchiUOOlHkpNkS3qILB9i7SMKOsW1yT4H33te2J2MbfN8NKpglh6V4z-RDVsm98X0hehZ13wiBIP3JwJyHelHbRh8Pm2lUaB5z6ROZ5QgAw/3gu/2Cz37cx_RsCvw-M1fnBzPw/h2/hL9j5MpY66eAv7Ru_Vjc7w-aIqwm9VD_KzGwrnN0i-c)
Thanks for everything you do,
Team Franken

name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Diehl Calls for Reinstatement of Nurses
body:
End Vaccine Mandates
| | | |
---
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
DIEHL: STOP FIRING NURSES, END THE VACCINE MANDATE
Diehl Urges Hospitals to Revoke Vaccine mandate for Nurses

(Whitman, MA - 11/8/21) Geoff Diehl is calling on Massachusetts hospitals to end their termination policy for un-vaccinated employees which is causing hundreds of nurses to lose their jobs right before the holidays at a time when [the healthcare industry is already short-staffed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GAdObUjKph1aPvAnDDlWURbOASgIw1JTtNZX2TrZ6lmTySyp7fC6DSpqTrketB2SbRs6IK1Zu1q-PjlcGi9UlSM5nibScocZi4Lxn8W776Jub_UprVI4Mm0oz0t5ens4BVxYS1LvglVQQEWSzb521fhUMRlIfj0bcAGIBOw96hlEg-UHSco-SXA5kSpqWjUaETKp3Hx7ihwTyiThKwFuidlLMDuPWN414XY6MzT-C5iwE8H8g6ccSIrzg-0BV3yXyp8KmwF9eGs=&c=jAPFUBshn7x6S48NZIwlJg_D-WEmQEf3hMtZ69rmzr-g8sV1PVYKxQ==&ch=ealnM9_Ml1h1dHCFmtAD4D2mJxzR82NXZzC2B2O1iCnLBAsgFVBdnA==), and there is a question as to whether these workers can even claim unemployment benefits.

In an updated article in the [Boston Business Journal yesterday](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GAdObUjKph1aPvAnDDlWURbOASgIw1JTtNZX2TrZ6lmTySyp7fC6DSpqTrketB2Ss693bmBa1qMrneSRP9B2UmLKCpnH11AeMXKVHVo1CDQmhMGuMjPta4rL6q-_noJl4fnQfqeJr1RyefI4IS4iy0K2y5YivtXoSnzb1QHPNf9lDmdhmgY2wAgDngK6F-ZozOo2F4FEP8963nppslSvcrioiEGnJBqTdIXBD7eljSvyI_wFS3JpMatMqGjOOcXm5VT70S8TfYY=&c=jAPFUBshn7x6S48NZIwlJg_D-WEmQEf3hMtZ69rmzr-g8sV1PVYKxQ==&ch=ealnM9_Ml1h1dHCFmtAD4D2mJxzR82NXZzC2B2O1iCnLBAsgFVBdnA==), "The state's largest health systems are terminating hundreds of health care workers for failing to meet vaccine mandate deadlines. The terminations include employees who filed a lawsuit against the health system over its vaccine mandate, after the courts decided Thursday not to issue a preliminary injunction to prevent the health system from moving forward with the terminations. The broader court case is still ongoing. Dr. Eric Dickson, CEO of UMass Memorial Health, said he expects more people to be vaccinated as suspensions and terminations loom closer, "I and a bunch of others are really worried about what this winter is going to look like.""

"These brave nurses, who were on the front line and unvaccinated during the Covid outbreak, are going to be fired because they want medical freedom over their own body?" questioned Diehl. "Some of these healthcare workers have developed their own natural immunity, some may have concerns over the efficacy or safety of the vaccines, and some may have religious beliefs that conflict with what they are being forced to take. I would think that nurses, of all people, would know what's best for their body and I find it incredible that the hospitals they serve would put them in this awful position."

Nurse firings aren't just in Massachusetts: "I'm willing to lose my safety, security, my house, everything for freedom," [a nurse working for Kaiser Permanente said, in a viral video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GAdObUjKph1aPvAnDDlWURbOASgIw1JTtNZX2TrZ6lmTySyp7fC6DSpqTrketB2SxhTCYqPogV0forfEz9gHkUOGrhI8yiYYslW81Sog0WaYSxCV0rePmPRkqrBk_M0pxzfAtZHIwyG3wpamHiBD8UGJJWt6oUHIYMsw3T-uZHsTftRhEbD51UBm_rhbA1-yEdW-j3qLC7XKu5p2MXl-ntC0PXM3SHQ2kIF0EmpvFi8vGy72_fXOEaFWVxNO6keSYVd0JXxD-2w=&c=jAPFUBshn7x6S48NZIwlJg_D-WEmQEf3hMtZ69rmzr-g8sV1PVYKxQ==&ch=ealnM9_Ml1h1dHCFmtAD4D2mJxzR82NXZzC2B2O1iCnLBAsgFVBdnA==). "I want you to think about that." The nurse said she has been working since the beginning of COVID "when we didn't know what was going on. "They're firing nurses who are willing to work. Doesn't make sense to me. So you have got to ask yourself that question: what kind of world are we living in when we have a pandemic," she added.
Even worse, "It seems that a worker who violates their company's vaccine policy may not be eligible for unemployment benefits," states a Forbes article, entitled, "[In A Dramatic Turn, The Once-Heralded Nurses And Healthcare Workers Are Being Fired For Not Getting Their Vaccination Shots.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GAdObUjKph1aPvAnDDlWURbOASgIw1JTtNZX2TrZ6lmTySyp7fC6DSpqTrketB2SLomJFiFPBKyFxxqrHU4pAkM7XkG3IAEBNwwYSmswLQf6672Y3SFdsXYpoIfEv7euG43VLiNU738XdvsLhn0ccftt8p8gWQy9TAKKHrhg21wr1jJr6VykCKlw_LLLibWrb9cvuN5WglckrsyDrYbLhb-LuTx1q3bi81QHTGtA2rGSoCTcfG062C-kp9j8yXbQQUQXF8C92QKzNeuPYlKjaLlvQVFnFiKLWIg9gdMbDQ-5IKgNvcEOys5CKXGOuqQ7-0M_EMgXkuO-3wObNT5czC8KkryjKfi9dA72p6zkIPkV_7YnHAHNnv2A-_YSZDA-&c=jAPFUBshn7x6S48NZIwlJg_D-WEmQEf3hMtZ69rmzr-g8sV1PVYKxQ==&ch=ealnM9_Ml1h1dHCFmtAD4D2mJxzR82NXZzC2B2O1iCnLBAsgFVBdnA==)"
###
|

|

---
|
---

name: Michele Rayner
subject: Empowering our youth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38427943/315404515/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzk4YThiOS1jYjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uafsVo8-cF7bil19iEFxgp1a27oeaSmC0BK5ChAKJGE=)

Peter,

We have an opportunity to right a wrong that has disproportionately impacted Black women: **It's time for President Biden to cancel student debt.**

It shouldn't be the norm for a Black woman with a dream of an education and career to feel like she's drowning, as her student loans hinder her from attaining economic security and prosperity. She should not have to feel like she's choosing between keeping food on the table or getting an education.

This is not normalcy -- this is _suffering_.

**Last year alone, Black women suffered disproportionately higher rates of outstanding debt, owing an average of $41,466**. Black women are also the most educated group in the U.S., while simultaneously having the highest amount of student debt -- more than any other demographic.

Higher education has always been a stepping stone towards bigger and better opportunities in our country. But with almost 60% of Black women having difficulties repaying student loans, closing the education and economic gap by canceling student debt is _long_ overdue.

**That's why it's on all of us to use our people-power to demand the Biden administration move swiftly and provide this relief _immediately_ to more than 43 million borrowers -- _because racial justice can't wait. Economic justice can't wait. Education justice can't wait._**

**[Will you add your name alongside mine and demand President Biden cancel student debt and help millions of people across the entire country?](https://act.micheleforflorida.com/a/2111_email_rayner_studentdebt1?ms=em21_211108_studentdebt1&refcode=em21_211108_studentdebt1&noskip=true)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.micheleforflorida.com/a/2111_email_rayner_studentdebt1?ms=em21_211108_studentdebt1&refcode=em21_211108_studentdebt1&noskip=true) By canceling student debt, President Biden could _immediately_ alleviate crushing financial pressure felt by millions of students and families around the country -- especially for Black and brown folks, where we see the economic impact of student debt hit hardest, just as it does in various other spaces like health care, the pandemic, food insecurity, and so much more.

**Let's be clear -- the dreams of our students cannot and will not wait.**

The future of our democracy depends on every decision we make now, and by turning a cold shoulder to the abundance of debt we are leaving on our students' backs, this administration risks creating the largest gap to higher education we will ever experience. **_This will damage our country's future, permanently._**

I will not allow this administration to let students fall to the wayside. We need to empower young people to complete higher education and provide them with the necessary tools to succeed, not hold them back through the weight of student loans.

**[Peter, it's time that we step up. Sign your name to demand President Biden cancel all student debt -- because closing the economic and education gap for those who need it the most can't wait.](https://act.micheleforflorida.com/a/2111_email_rayner_studentdebt1?ms=em21_211108_studentdebt1&refcode=em21_211108_studentdebt1&noskip=true)** [SIGN ON](https://act.micheleforflorida.com/a/2111_email_rayner_studentdebt1?ms=em21_211108_studentdebt1&refcode=em21_211108_studentdebt1&noskip=true) Thank you for fighting with me -- let's keep pushing!

\-- Michele [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2111_email_rayner?refcode=em21_211108_studentdebt1)

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1d1144ef-393e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/f798a8b9-cb40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzk4YThiOS1jYjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uafsVo8-cF7bil19iEFxgp1a27oeaSmC0BK5ChAKJGE=&id=140435042). name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Reviving the CCC = good paying, climate change-fighting jobs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Reviving the CCC = good paying jobs.

Not only that, if Congress passes the Revive the CCC Act to bring back and modernize the Civilian Conservation Corps (CCC) -- an environmental work relief program in the 1933 New Deal -- these new jobs will be working to fight the effects of climate change.

It’s a double win -- tackling both issues that hugely and immediately impact our state.

Studies have shown that this modern-day employment, job training, and conservation program could employ tens of thousands of people in our region, offering living wages and sustaining careers to help workers build stronger futures -- especially workers who have suffered the most due to systemic racism and discrimination.

The earth will thank us, too. The CCC would result in the restoration of wetlands, planting of millions of diverse, native plants and trees, and removing invasive trees and shrubs -- this will potentially absorb over 20% of all carbon emissions in our region!

The new legislation was introduced this year by three members of Pennsylvania’s congressional delegation — Democratic U.S. Reps. Dwight Evans, Susan Wild, and Conor Lamb. Contact your legislators to tell them that you support MORE JOBS and FIGHTING CLIMATE CHANGE through the Revive the CCC Act. [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/revive-the-ccc-act/]

TAKE ACTION [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/revive-the-ccc-act/]Thank you,

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

clean_body: There’s no room for complacency. | = 🚨🚨 ELECTION DAY COUNTDOWN ALERT 🚨🚨 Peter, this is important. Mark your calendar for Tuesday, November 8, 2022, exactly one year from today. That will be the day we expand our Democratic Senate majority, hold the House, and stop Trump’s far-right movement from infiltrating Washington again. = Democrats are facing a daunting challenge next year. The midterm election cycle is one of the toughest we’ve seen in a long time — so we can’t take our foot off the gas for a minute. If you still don’t think next year’s elections matter, consider this: ⚠️ If Democrats lose one more Senate seat, they lose the Senate majority. ⚠️ If Democrats lose five more House seats in 2022, they lose the House majority. ⚠️ If we don’t help Democrats secure both chambers of Congress next year, we can kiss Biden’s ambitious agenda to Build Back Better goodbye. Over the next twelve months, our mission is to continue investing in award-winning digital and television content to spread Biden’s message near and far and give Democrats the momentum to pull off another historic win. Republicans can’t be allowed to seize control of Washington — we must secure our House and Senate majorities for years to come. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country **= = Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. # A power grab beyond the pale
---
We own ourselves. Sovereignty over our own bodies is the most fundamental of our inalienable rights. If the right of bodily integrity is not honored, all our other rights are jeopardized. Sadly--or infuriatingly--Michael Bennet will continue to blindly follow the inept Biden administration and the radical Left's attempts to infringe on that right. Their push to mandate the COVID-19 vaccine through threats to private businesses is an alarming step towards fascism and tyranny. Don't expect them to stop willingly. An overweening government that believes it knows better than its citizens will always seek new forms of control over our lives; methods like these can be deployed to dismantle every aspect of our freedoms. This naked exercise of unjust power is corrosive to the human spirit, and it sets a dangerous precedent. If you are ready to stand for individual rights and resist government intrusion into personal decisions, then we must stand together now. If you're ready to reject these travesties, these blatant infringements upon our unalienable rights, let's do so together with courage, strength, honor, and steady resolve. Can I count on your support? We cannot abdicate our responsibility to defend the rights of humankind by allowing our government to gain compliance through the use of force. The unconstitutional, coercive power of administrative agencies is a clear and present danger to freedom, depriving people of their livelihoods and making a life conceived in liberty impossible. At this crossroads, our path forward will be determined by the caliber of public servants placed into the halls of power by voters like you. I pledge to continuously hold myself to account in view of our founding values and the best interests of We the People. I need your support today to bring my call of duty to the Capitol.
---

**One year from today, Peter, Tennesseans will go to the polls to choose their next governor.**
At this milestone, I wanted to take a minute to step back and reflect on how far we’ve come in just a few months.
When we launched this campaign, I said in my announcement speech that this would be a campaign for ALL Tennesseans. No matter what you look like, where you were raised, or who you’ve voted for in the past, this campaign is for anyone who believes in those core Tennessee values of hospitality, volunteerism, and caring for our neighbors — the same values that our corrupt leaders have abandoned for lies, conspiracy theories, and divisiveness.
At every stop on our campaign’s 95 County Tour (83 down, 12 to go!), I’ve met with Tennesseans who are desperate for change. People like you and me with families, who want to be able to afford good healthcare, be paid fairly for a hard day’s work, and be able to provide their children with a strong education.
These conversations — one individual, lunch, event, or gathering at a time — are the highlight of my experience on the campaign trail so far:

I am not a career politician. I am not “the establishment” candidate — but I am a fighter. I am a respected physician, a concerned dad and husband, and a dedicated Tennessean.
I’m also a truth-teller, like it or not. **And here’s what I know to be true:**
We can thrive with improved education for ALL Tennesseans.
We can thrive with better healthcare.
We can thrive by growing businesses that strengthen families.
And we can thrive by fortifying rural Tennessee and modernizing our infrastructure.
**Together, Tennessee thrives.**
Thank you for joining us as we work to restore real leadership for the people of our great state.
— Dr. Martin

clean_body: | | = One year from today, Peter, Tennesseans will go to the polls to choose their next governor. At this milestone, I wanted to take a minute to step back and reflect on how far we’ve come in just a few months. When we launched this campaign, I said in my announcement speech that this would be a campaign for ALL Tennesseans. No matter what you look like, where you were raised, or who you’ve voted for in the past, this campaign is for anyone who believes in those core Tennessee values of hospitality, volunteerism, and caring for our neighbors — the same values that our corrupt leaders have abandoned for lies, conspiracy theories, and divisiveness. At every stop on our campaign’s 95 County Tour (83 down, 12 to go!), I’ve met with Tennesseans who are desperate for change. People like you and me with families, who want to be able to afford good healthcare, be paid fairly for a hard day’s work, and be able to provide their children with a strong education. These conversations — one individual, lunch, event, or gathering at a time — are the highlight of my experience on the campaign trail so far: = = = I am not a career politician. I am not “the establishment” candidate — but I am a fighter. I am a respected physician, a concerned dad and husband, and a dedicated Tennessean. I’m also a truth-teller, like it or not. And here’s what I know to be true: We can thrive with improved education for ALL Tennesseans. We can thrive with better healthcare. We can thrive by growing businesses that strengthen families. And we can thrive by fortifying rural Tennessee and modernizing our infrastructure. Together, Tennessee thrives. Thank you for joining us as we work to restore real leadership for the people of our great state. — Dr. Martin P.S. name: Peter Franchot
subject: We’re One Year Out
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
Today is a major milestone for our people-powered movement: we’re officially one year away from the 2022 General Election.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyeargeneral2021?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyeargeneral2021?amount=20.22]On November 8, 2022, we have a historic opportunity to redefine the possibility of state government. If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’ll deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
I’m going to make sure that no family has to choose between life-saving healthcare versus putting food on the table. I’ll put Maryland on track to becoming the first net zero state in the nation and a national leader in renewable energy. And I’ll pilot fully debt-free paths to a vocation or a college degree, so that all of Maryland’s students can get the education that they deserve.
Together, we can bring the big ideas and bold solutions that we need to make sure no family is left behind. On this major milestone day, will you chip in what you can to propel our people-powered movement to victory?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyeargeneral2021?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyeargeneral2021?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyeargeneral2021?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyeargeneral2021?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyeargeneral2021]Anything you can give is greatly appreciated. This is shaping up to be the most expensive election in our state’s history, and it’s critically important that we don't fall behind on our fundraising goals. Otherwise, we risk getting outspent by Republican opponents in the General Election. We can’t let that happen.
I can’t thank you enough for your continued support of my campaign. Thanks to you, our movement is growing stronger by the day. I’ve already secured the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials from all across the state. And a recent poll has shown that I am leading the Democratic field for Governor by a wide margin. We have the momentum in this race. With your help, we’re going to pull ahead even further.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oneyeargeneral2021?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4f1c7162362046e9a8f21124ae81300b&_e=aj_RAUl86t0vEMirzKK-6UG1MEJ7WdsXrO-BZW2Ol3WSbav48bJWS_wPvwy9rV_BMFsg7k0l79q7Ms_gfJ_c3NKgd0xtQdkW31ik2Nnv-L8JTaM_q4UCA3x8xfHNwexaTalGk_US_j6vqXRHog47ol9t1CiUG2HukJvaq-r3o12ZCTVzr8F1WMItGucSgOO15yJizp4VF0FQLPWldfwVJTDt4CVYdBjoXPyRSVS_1i2lmWeweaqBU_AOlZpAwbHPKZDYrRIIoXPpaAUG0ujiYBKWjaaDpxJuoHJ90fwFp37A6OwTBmKh-SowrCiQ_MRviLL24IgavEqHCOIIJh6rxZLSIPYh_inpD1D7MMhjnmxAySH6JQW1mxU2cmO5b6YA)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4f1c7162362046e9a8f21124ae81300b&_e=aj_RAUl86t0vEMirzKK-6UG1MEJ7WdsXrO-BZW2Ol3WSbav48bJWS_wPvwy9rV_BMFsg7k0l79q7Ms_gfJ_c3NKgd0xtQdkW31ik2Nnv-L8JTaM_q4UCA3x8xfHNwexaTalGk_US_j6vqXRHog47ohykGz1KD9SXaF2vzKnQu6k1AIEXpW93g9cKvVCwmfqVFDPJhJkfSOzVv4lDMSDqkBPlV58iCeGFjiyv-YwWcrJZpNSZBhtSxozahrJwnIGcFwx1Sqo57duI88_VEYBtQNueJeBzD6h3NgM9dht86XftIQVH9HB6ol0Q6hpzBe8Zjf_jvfINWj1UdRU6CKEEVfohwexkA4vWS3_IOZjp4oB1dOGgp7wqQjfFtBk63JEN)**

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.

# **Friend — Election Day is exactly one year from TODAY. And the choice facing Kansans and Americans couldn’t be clearer.**

---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhsl233q3pselvu73niibc6vua4kjo8m4konv1ho_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4cbhe6rm2ob1elgnep73csr3ctpkmlp74tr5mph3fd35epie8pdie6p66sple3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6cdb76dj30tr7coqe1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphm2o36cjjm4oh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zip6286lq6i3r03i9t9gjntbel58eqbn7f7pd180_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6cp77c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgrqfq7dvdrt7r05gpk7gq2iduajk8l10hokqv3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6cp77c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsgj1cjoif26luod5e1g823gihapn7rhsqi9grfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6cp77c9h2bs) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: This Is Living Podcast Episode 3: How To Parent With Purpose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
If you like what you hear, be sure to leave a 5-star rating and a positive review! [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=5eeaa6ea91b2469ba0ccdd79e57818cf&_e=jGy9um8nK-xnUq4QoDf8F5bHtjZgRsBdpF_4rPQZFWNulvdF6zh2oCTgZtZ1riBzKTB39MhPZbOWAPLDCzS3vf7OPCJTlcRa9zuujaxU9YVpfIg-Ekhuu7k256CDKezIS0pRW726_KOyGEW-OwY2WZmg4oU4Vw7vtfv6qwuQFV5DkfM7oqCDWYEFwS-HUAhtNNPWHyHDZwQrQJ8dq2QfB7Bcvoywt-koGJ3qpiMzCJpeWX2ACKLgKgqB1-d-wJ86OluhRuoDqeDj3imq_8aa2CgA23GLBbkCcm-JhtxJhRIqMt8CtZQ12sXeZr4lTpQ2KH7BnBn4v3-NuNtby-A33WAstVtyiza_5qBwWW7efEUnKUaenAQMS7uqiHE8WBQaRTqLWCQgZ2T23UFSNxep0qaK49iVugtihKfG1BbIuEs%3D) | |
---

What does it look like to parent with purpose, and how do we find balance in the busyness of life?

In this episode, we discuss strategies for getting momentum as a family and finding purposes for the most important moments in life. Kids are worth it. They're worth fighting for. They're worth prioritizing. They're worth being at the top of your list of what matters most to you in life.

Our three kids are the center of our lives, two boys and a baby girl; all with different and amazing personalities, features, and giftings. How do you get momentum as a parent? Kids are tough and difficult, but oh so worth it! They are gifts from the Lord, and we want and need to be intentional about parenting them!
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=5eeaa6ea91b2469ba0ccdd79e57818cf&_e=jGy9um8nK-xnUq4QoDf8F5bHtjZgRsBdpF_4rPQZFWNulvdF6zh2oCTgZtZ1riBzKTB39MhPZbOWAPLDCzS3vf7OPCJTlcRa9zuujaxU9YVpfIg-Ekhuu7k256CDKezIS0pRW726_KOyGEW-OwY2WZmg4oU4Vw7vtfv6qwuQFV5DkfM7oqCDWYEFwS-HUAhtsb4UgPxifkMglCCgxYoP_AQYN0bo7wnmeyObme-U6ZqYpJrlu4UK8BaFsZMTvvMnEbZ0A18adfTNp45fqewFpi0rN3ZE5rsOBpwKmzIObFwNKGaGlkWVj4LKIXna6JrUjQ6eiFbO-jSv9vyL6JWLNOzozYI1jljq97Md_lJmOj0qXcbT9kjsiN14f0elRXnkyeNl81dm7WpWoJvYIxNUpNGFQvVJ2cvJ9PpV-Cgetu0%3D)

name: Holly McCormack
subject: One year away
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] https://www.hollyforcongress.org [https://www.hollyforcongress.org]

Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9dd37d73-b940-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/761762ce-d540-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjE3NjJjZS1kNTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfgWiQXQp-tJFYFcK9cASKvuesd5VLpAc0ctpq1UjDY=&id=126471745 .

We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work. Check out our Website [] , Twitter [] , and Facebook [] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [] In solidarity, Holly McCormack DONATE [] Join the #MackPack [] [] [] [] [] Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: It's official: My race is a target
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dem Darren Soto is vulnerable |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=53305c2d38&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

BREAKING NEWS: the NRCC has listed my race as a "targeted race"!

_They saw how well I did against Darren Soto last year and now it's time to defeat him!_

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's swing 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fea1f5c0b0&e=afa21b7626), in the shadow of Disney World. It's currently held by Darren Soto- an AOC wannabe who isn't long for this political world!**

In 2020, I garnered more votes against Democrat Darren Soto than any Republican ever had. Florida is turning Red- and this district is leading the way!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=06ca50c074&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Here's the reality you need to know: Florida is getting REDDER.

_There are now more registered Republican voters than Democrats in Florida for the first time in the Sunshine State's history.

"When I got elected governor we had 280,000 more registered Democrats than Republicans in the state of Florida," Gov. Ron DeSantis told a crowd at the National Conference of State Legislatures on Friday. "Today, and it will probably be fully publicized very soon, for the first time in the history of Florida we have overtaken Democrats. There are more registered Republicans in Florida than Democrats."

The crowd applauded Gov. DeSantis, who then joked that Republicans would have won the tightly contested New Jersey gubernatorial race if the state’s Republicans hadn’t moved to Florida.

DeSantis explained that Republicans are fleeing to Florida to escape coronavirus restrictions, lawlessness, crime, and other factors.

DeSantis also explained that Democrats have not governed well in the parts of the country they control.

"Once these areas go deep blue they get destroyed," DeSantis said. "How many places that are deep blue are well governed in this country? Can you name me some?"_

The nation's best Governor, Ron DeSantis, is right.

Blue areas are NEVER governed well.

But we still have some Dems to defeat here in Florida- and with more and more Republicans here, NOW is the time.

**With the national help we are sure to get, that I did NOT receive last time when I challenged Soto, This race for this swing district is sure to go my way this time!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=760b137669&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **I AM the America First candidate in our district. I ran alongside President Trump last year, and I will do so this year.

Darren Soto is finished. He voted for the inflation; he voted for the Afghanistan debacle; he voted for the massive spending and tax hikes; he voted for the Socialism.**

[I will fight Biden and his Socialism every time. We will remove him from office!. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=483d781996&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto hasn't stood up against a single bad idea Biden has had. He hasn't cast one single vote to hold Biden accountable for this disaster. Typical America Last Democrat!_

I can flip this district- if the country swings as Republican as NJ and VA swung this week, the Dems are doomed! [Help me win this district and evict Nancy Pelosi from office!!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9bd057e639&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=00a65662c9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b364056728&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=efb5a78452&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d68a03e46a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

name: Nancy Mace
subject: AOC’s worst nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
As the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, the radical Left can’t and won’t intimidate me. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=273d96c5aa0b483f9b4e4c42fb791e74&_e=Z-f7zP0NyePAQOw4JWCBjsQS4ADhR3kisPjS_2QFSo7xIH4xUez6ip3tK2uhgw9Y13hsFDTCopM4aLo1-ZhcTbigLyA-WUuoM-c5sUHIXSTcOcu-7uClwG8Og1JoVBo9HrIvrJ365_w6NgegWA4mtst15hy9yBPxLhADbHcwst-sBvN9YVTGbh35qBkpL345GVjpeCKZpBWX29qNK3QAPiYCDmV-C2ykG4bFq9V0BSX263XkkvZZj5gH1vLSLsvYUaAetLIcphw2WLFy4m2-BMoaFGdQUaghU6jwY-g0I8M8EX3ChrlWvgtDGAb9OSkuHE_FD1tailQOZeJfOlHqdrsHap3U1KMJhs8JEQjBev_DjVDxDrGmae-xWaV9QzgvI2cFsA9oDN-6xvtErOFgJBo00BTjap_jwJ8VBrjeoMQ%3D) [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=273d96c5aa0b483f9b4e4c42fb791e74&_e=Z-f7zP0NyePAQOw4JWCBjsQS4ADhR3kisPjS_2QFSo7xIH4xUez6ip3tK2uhgw9Y3xuIEFdtJ6AN_qKNJ4zqdkoUbu2a2on7FBhXz_iefxc5WJerHDwB9R3cpYlRVfkD4_gmckJbKr447-6Lb37ZdtKJD1k89RKHO5Y3Rncks0X4BK2HWDpT-CMXZKw6Gi20EJW0DihIal8EXFiECbgyPZWSSONFI_BfsfN0PV9bLs21kkQvxSpgc3awezeD9-FhXN7edsj07275_C3VmrF-btgb8KiT2Oc035vUbzVCZCHTgqffAodQ0pcdGkw4ErQeYUpdgERjy8SVSXy5sqQnRROTOo9JREYWkXqF3sXLNAbbfZktBdYg78D9Hqg3uPFFPFJ9_UkLhEYyJ7G4ZVNLTJZPk38SPtwKD7yf5wbIN3MFsJo7vz0p9NcprhVkrJrC) Fellow Liberty Lover, As the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, the radical Left can’t and won’t intimidate me. I came to Washington, D.C. to BREAKTHROUGH their manufactured outrage and the far-left cancel culture silencing people who care about D.C.'s out of control spending like you and me, not to bow down to it! My name is Nancy Mace, and I’m the freshman constitutional conservative Republican Congresswoman from South Carolina. [**SUPPORT CONSTITUTIONAL CONSERVATIVE NANCY MACE**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=273d96c5aa0b483f9b4e4c42fb791e74&_e=Z-f7zP0NyePAQOw4JWCBjsQS4ADhR3kisPjS_2QFSo7xIH4xUez6ip3tK2uhgw9Y3xuIEFdtJ6AN_qKNJ4zqdkoUbu2a2on7FBhXz_iefxc5WJerHDwB9R3cpYlRVfkD4_gmckJbKr447-6Lb37ZdtKJD1k89RKHO5Y3Rncks0X4BK2HWDpT-CMXZKw6Gi20EJW0DihIal8EXFiECbgyPZWSSONFI_BfsfN0PV9bLs3i_u_FvXf1EN2vvp4wElwxNQFZ5j2-aZYRvVsoNVZv210ytvE81rJDnV0cc7IEEuBEFJf5bP_V2Vg0btWyT8CidUlYfAajW7uDXqVSiYM1AQmlOA2H28RNXHfhTmWbqqumRY03Fy-A3LHTPmzWbanFR5dxVILfaSFG9Ft6D-UP5MEOJlDi0kddYtoe3xpfdyBe9awQm_2ZIekZUYf9NbpB) I’m writing to ask for your support today because I’m Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the tax-hiking, shutdown-loving, big government leftists’ TOP TARGET to defeat! You see, as a pro-small business, successful entrepreneur who wants to put my district before D.C., I’m driving the left crazy in Congress and on national TV as a compelling new voice in the Republican Party. But I’ve REALLY managed to set off Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and the other unhinged members of “The Socialist Squad” like Ilhan Omar. Radical leftists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ilhan Omar can keep coming after me all they want... _I won’t back down. Not one inch!_ I come by my grit and stubborn refusal to quit as the daughter of The Citadel’s most decorated living graduate, Brigadier General James Emory Mace (Ret.). It was my dad’s example as a man I truly admire that inspired me to enroll at The Citadel as one of its very first female Cadets. Sure, I wanted to make him proud, but I went to South Carolina’s military college to prove to myself I could do it. **Believe me, it wasn’t easy.** The first time I ever saw my father cry was when he shed tears of pride as I accepted my diploma from him at graduation. Since that day, I’ve accomplished a lot. I’m a mother of two fantastic kids and a published author. I started my own company and served as a tax-cutting, common sense, free market fiscal conservative Republican Member of the South Carolina State House for three years. **_Today, I’m bringing the same sense of duty, honor, and pride of service ingrained in me at The Citadel to the U.S. Congress._** In fact, during my first month in office, I fought to make good on one of my core campaign promises: cosponsoring legislation to keep the esteemed Marine Corps base at Parris Island open. You see, this 100-year-old base has trained over ONE MILLION brave Marines and plays a crucial role in our national defense -- and Nancy Pelosi put the base on the chopping block! Well, I won’t have it. [**STAND WITH NANCY MACE**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=273d96c5aa0b483f9b4e4c42fb791e74&_e=Z-f7zP0NyePAQOw4JWCBjsQS4ADhR3kisPjS_2QFSo7xIH4xUez6ip3tK2uhgw9Y3xuIEFdtJ6AN_qKNJ4zqdkoUbu2a2on7FBhXz_iefxc5WJerHDwB9R3cpYlRVfkD4_gmckJbKr447-6Lb37ZdtKJD1k89RKHO5Y3Rncks0X4BK2HWDpT-CMXZKw6Gi20EJW0DihIal8EXFiECbgyPZWSSONFI_BfsfN0PV9bLs0mWjsmllFUNVYn9_PS3a_4VkQ4meJ7RrEpVDl3eOjAG1K4Jo5eUWM1y0sLcje2m0Z4uZeXm4tFYmDk_MeV0fZmghJ_-OYVc__xKp3jtr9Z7_GvCXoGKXIPMkPdWeLTJqM6Kj4GMB0Wo1_N6p9RKgJeGsMr8MpTatCfEfGsiMax4BTHOfigBDMSTAmG6AAxHd3L2XgHLJcC5164MES_0Lhq) I’ve also stood up to oppose reckless, budget-busting legislation like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the elitist leftists’ spending bills. I support targeted relief for those who truly need it – not bailouts with sky high costs working families simply can’t afford. I’m a hard pass on adding to our national debt, just as I am a hard pass on any legislation that unfairly punishes states like South Carolina that have safely reopened their economy to bail out mismanaged blue states like New York and Illinois! I’m not only championing our constitutional Republican ideals in Congress... I’m also directly taking on the left-wing radicals on national TV and social media. **And I’m not only talking about Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.** I’ve gone toe to toe with her best friend in Congress, too, leftist Democrat Congresswoman Ilhan Omar, over her blatantly offensive anti-Israel rhetoric and I’ve repeatedly pointed out Nancy Pelosi and the radical leftists’ overt hypocrisy and double standards. **Now, I need your help to successfully defend my seat.** I’m a veteran campaigner who always outworks the rest, I can’t run an effective, winning reelection campaign without YOUR help! Even before I became one of The Squad’s most outspoken and effective Republican opponents, my reelection was already destined to be an uphill fight. That’s because Nancy Pelosi and her left-wing Democrat allies are out for retribution after I narrowly defeated their handpicked Congressman last November who voted lockstep with Nancy Pelosi. After spending nearly $7 Million trying to beat me, they came up short by just 5,415 votes out of 426,699 total votes cast – that’s 1.26%! Make no mistake, with Nancy Pelosi desperate to cling to her razor-thin leftist majority in the next election, this is a seat she’ll fight tooth and nail to take back. And the fact that I’m Vice Chair of the Republican Party’s campaign to retake the House in 2022 will only make the target on my back even bigger and brighter! **_[That’s why I’m asking you to join my grassroots team by sending your most generous gift of $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 to “Nancy Mace for Congress” right away!](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=273d96c5aa0b483f9b4e4c42fb791e74&_e=Z-f7zP0NyePAQOw4JWCBjsQS4ADhR3kisPjS_2QFSo7xIH4xUez6ip3tK2uhgw9Y3xuIEFdtJ6AN_qKNJ4zqdkoUbu2a2on7FBhXz_iefxc5WJerHDwB9R3cpYlRVfkD4_gmckJbKr447-6Lb37ZdtKJD1k89RKHO5Y3Rncks0X4BK2HWDpT-CMXZKw6Gi20EJW0DihIal8EXFiECbgyPZWSSONFI_BfsfN0PV9bLs0b8DLm9aCWauGyKdOVUgIXdKSzsSeQMvneTYpI0j-OKokDGAmLz_fpdSdemlbcS_G2RZzOijDU_r-zxieetBOxqTwpf32XDJ9jlXCdKiwDVtUbeLn4G6WR9HaPVBELZnyKjCekcbhhjsma3o-xK_eHbTxEfyiSLDjfigSjCzaIjPh-KXmOUoNVDq8H1xLlocvX-3awlJ1HhyN7thBrFWKV)_** clean_body: As the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, the radical Left can’t and won’t intimidate me. Fellow Liberty Lover, As the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, the radical Left can’t and won’t intimidate me. I came to Washington, D.C. to BREAKTHROUGH their manufactured outrage and the far-left cancel culture silencing people who care about D.C.'s out of control spending like you and me, not to bow down to it! My name is Nancy Mace, and I’m the freshman constitutional conservative Republican Congresswoman from South Carolina. I’m writing to ask for your support today because I’m Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the tax-hiking, shutdown-loving, big government leftists’ TOP TARGET to defeat! You see, as a pro-small business, successful entrepreneur who wants to put my district before D.C., I’m driving the left crazy in Congress and on national TV as a compelling new voice in the Republican Party. But I’ve REALLY managed to set off Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and the other unhinged members of “The Socialist Squad” like Ilhan Omar. Radical leftists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ilhan Omar can keep coming after me all they want... I won’t back down. Not one inch! I come by my grit and stubborn refusal to quit as the daughter of The Citadel’s most decorated living graduate, Brigadier General James Emory Mace (Ret.). It was my dad’s example as a man I truly admire that inspired me to enroll at The Citadel as one of its very first female Cadets. Sure, I wanted to make him proud, but I went to South Carolina’s military college to prove to myself I could do it. Believe me, it wasn’t easy. The first time I ever saw my father cry was when he shed tears of pride as I accepted my diploma from him at graduation. Since that day, I’ve accomplished a lot. I’m a mother of two fantastic kids and a published author. I started my own company and served as a tax-cutting, common sense, free market fiscal conservative Republican Member of the South Carolina State House for three years. Today, I’m bringing the same sense of duty, honor, and pride of service ingrained in me at The Citadel to the U.S. Congress. In fact, during my first month in office, I fought to make good on one of my core campaign promises: cosponsoring legislation to keep the esteemed Marine Corps base at Parris Island open. You see, this 100-year-old base has trained over ONE MILLION brave Marines and plays a crucial role in our national defense -- and Nancy Pelosi put the base on the chopping block! Well, I won’t have it. I’ve also stood up to oppose reckless, budget-busting legislation like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the elitist leftists’ spending bills. I support targeted relief for those who truly need it – not bailouts with sky high costs working families simply can’t afford. I’m a hard pass on adding to our national debt, just as I am a hard pass on any legislation that unfairly punishes states like South Carolina that have safely reopened their economy to bail out mismanaged blue states like New York and Illinois! I’m not only championing our constitutional Republican ideals in Congress... I’m also directly taking on the left-wing radicals on national TV and social media. And I’m not only talking about Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. I’ve gone toe to toe with her best friend in Congress, too, leftist Democrat Congresswoman Ilhan Omar, over her blatantly offensive anti-Israel rhetoric and I’ve repeatedly pointed out Nancy Pelosi and the radical leftists’ overt hypocrisy and double standards. Now, I need your help to successfully defend my seat. I’m a veteran campaigner who always outworks the rest, I can’t run an effective, winning reelection campaign without YOUR help! Even before I became one of The Squad’s most outspoken and effective Republican opponents, my reelection was already destined to be an uphill fight. That’s because Nancy Pelosi and her left-wing Democrat allies are out for retribution after I narrowly defeated their handpicked Congressman last November who voted lockstep with Nancy Pelosi. After spending nearly $7 Million trying to beat me, they came up short by just 5,415 votes out of 426,699 total votes cast – that’s 1.26%! Make no mistake, with Nancy Pelosi desperate to cling to her razor-thin leftist majority in the next election, this is a seat she’ll fight tooth and nail to take back. And the fact that I’m Vice Chair of the Republican Party’s campaign to retake the House in 2022 will only make the target on my back even bigger and brighter! Your support means everything to me. My friend, thank you so much! Sincerely, Hon. Nancy Mace (R-SC) P.S. As a strong, outspoken, constitutional, fiscal conservative Republican Congresswoman, I’m Nancy Pelosi, “The Squad,” and the rest of the radical leftists’ worst nightmare! Rest assured, they’ll go all out to defeat me in my next race as their TOP TARGET! Friend,

Gov. Ducey is using federal funds intended to help slow the spread of COVID-19 to instead pay parents to move their children out of schools that require students to wear masks. This is the latest stunt by an administration putting politics ahead of public health.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38430006/315417420/41694283?refcode=X_110821_DuceyCostingUs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWMwNzZlOS1kNjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-jSG2wz_2xSH56Wt_w-0UT9kfFihegagb1LhJ2WUa4=)

According to the Arizona Daily Star, the state could lose $163 million in COVID relief money if he continues this scheme. But rather than working on a solution, the Ducey administration is digging in.

**Arizonans need elected officials who believe in science, listen to doctors, and put public health over political ambition. We need people like Kirsten Engel.**

If you agree, we hope you’ll chip in what you can today to ensure this seat stays in Democratic hands, and not with another Doug Ducey crony.

clean_body: Read how the Ducey administration puts politics over public health and how you can help Friend, Gov. Ducey is using federal funds intended to help slow the spread of COVID-19 to instead pay parents to move their children out of schools that require students to wear masks. This is the latest stunt by an administration putting politics ahead of public health. = According to the Arizona Daily Star, the state could lose $163 million in COVID relief money if he continues this scheme. But rather than working on a solution, the Ducey administration is digging in. Arizonans need elected officials who believe in science, listen to doctors, and put public health over political ambition. We need people like Kirsten Engel. If you agree, we hope you’ll chip in what you can today to ensure this seat stays in Democratic hands, and not with another Doug Ducey crony. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Paid for by Engel for Arizona Thanks, Team Engel Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: 365 days to win this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This race just got downgraded to toss-up!
#
We are only 365 days away from Election Day and this is a really bad wake-up call, team –
**Sabato's Crystal Ball just moved our must-win race to a TOSS-UP. **
With Senate control hinging on Nevada, this downgrade is the most alarming development in our fight to defend the Senate so far.
CNN is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country -- and the GOP is already outspending me to flip this seat and the Senate red. They've poured more than $2 million into attack ads to defeat me, and this downgrade indicates their efforts are working.
Just one seat will decide Senate control, and a new poll already shows me trailing my Trump-endorsed opponent by 2 points. **I'm being outspent and in danger of losing. I truly cannot afford to miss my midnight fundraising goal if we want to win in Nevada and defend the Senate.**
But as of this afternoon, I'm falling $5,204 short of my critical goal. Missing goals at this point in the race could force us to make difficult decisions and cut back critical investments, which just can't happen when our race could determine the Senate majority. I don't have anywhere else to turn, so I'm coming to you personally with this urgent request:
**[Please, will you rush $5 or more now to split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help defend our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar counts in a race this close.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38430151/315417660/486063674?refcode=jr_em_nd_211108_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmJhMjYwMC1kNzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnA-q4yHXEZ9ebcdihSRsi-4R-OwrXbIn0STQuEphFs=)**
Thank you so much for being on my team.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: America is broke
body:
{First Name}, We cannot continue to spend money on things we don’t need. House Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Tim Ryan are ramming through their radical agenda in the new infrastructure bill to satisfy their socialist base.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xjHL5TRGfweNVCKoofu3VdloHo4CjCDTLbMtgHZNhOqo0sahWVvTxTmik66VGoF31_h5M2VxGi-qCnYbEcmbWU0d0rEwThkYCP9gV1ToNg0frh7kwvpOW_7L8JFpeigwBoF8RfN21PD-dbNCyoEbjlbiRFM1IQlURwRqfuqTMt29ya7K-2ptlA==&c=2cpuqUr4Rv_gT42uyUJK7GZix8ACGB8JjVv3UZLuuJHlgymoDCzAgw==&ch=HxzGicB9q0WMxhQWEo4dPFjU6xsh4_SPdRlu-EEPhhXrY3HhzAHDrw==)
---
| Peter,
We cannot continue to spend money on things we don't need.
House Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Tim Ryan are ramming through their radical agenda in the new infrastructure bill to satisfy their socialist base.
These spending bills will create a culture of dependency and will destroy the economy with runaway inflation and unemployment. Make no mistake, this is more than a bill to improve highways - it includes leftwing pet projects like $500 MILLION for "tree equity."
[Click here to help me end Socialist spending >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xjHL5TRGfweNVCKoofu3VdloHo4CjCDTLbMtgHZNhOqo0sahWVvTxTmik66VGoF31_h5M2VxGi-qCnYbEcmbWU0d0rEwThkYCP9gV1ToNg0frh7kwvpOW_7L8JFpeigwBoF8RfN21PD-dbNCyoEbjlbiRFM1IQlURwRqfuqTMt29ya7K-2ptlA==&c=2cpuqUr4Rv_gT42uyUJK7GZix8ACGB8JjVv3UZLuuJHlgymoDCzAgw==&ch=HxzGicB9q0WMxhQWEo4dPFjU6xsh4_SPdRlu-EEPhhXrY3HhzAHDrw==)
This was done after voters soundly rejected Democrats and their radical agenda at the ballot box last Tuesday.
But the worst part is RINO Republicans helped them pass this bill!
Ohioans are concerned about increased prices at the pump, illegal immigrants crossing our borders, and indoctrination in our classrooms. Ohioans cannot continue to suffer under the Democratic agenda.
I am running to stop the fiscal disorder. When I am elected I will put an end to runaway spending in the Senate.
The Democratic agenda is unsustainable and needs to end, When I am elected I will put an end to Democratic fiscal madness. If I lose, America will go down a path of fiscal destruction. It is no exaggeration to say that this is the most important Senate race in 2022. I need your support to beat Democrats.
[Donate to my campaign today to STOP Democrat attacks on the economy.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xjHL5TRGfweNVCKoofu3VdloHo4CjCDTLbMtgHZNhOqo0sahWVvTxTmik66VGoF31_h5M2VxGi-qCnYbEcmbWU0d0rEwThkYCP9gV1ToNg0frh7kwvpOW_7L8JFpeigwBoF8RfN21PD-dbNCyoEbjlbiRFM1IQlURwRqfuqTMt29ya7K-2ptlA==&c=2cpuqUr4Rv_gT42uyUJK7GZix8ACGB8JjVv3UZLuuJHlgymoDCzAgw==&ch=HxzGicB9q0WMxhQWEo4dPFjU6xsh4_SPdRlu-EEPhhXrY3HhzAHDrw==)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: You need to see this to believe it
body:
As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Cri
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z62845uveo8qq8t7hln51b0vb2j9emht6dou6rf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tj2ekonbdtimdqj6dbgmth65cjgc9ir8pth6ti35db7mlgedctme2rj8o76mdjrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphlcspm8dtim5j31c5ic8r749fg)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhp7nabb72suluidptdrpc27d58duqsidbad20k8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh2bs)
---
Fellow American, As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Critical Race Theory” agenda of the radical Left. But hear me on this: I can tell you, from firsthand experience, that there is _GREAT_ reason for optimism! **Turning Point USA recently launched our Exposing Critical Racism Tour** , a no-holds-barred effort to fight back against the racist Left on college campuses. And so far, it has been one of our most successful tours _EVER_ _!_
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo1vldk7gctlmv267faiq1hqq8oe75ol77a4oon8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh2bs)
---
But with four dates remaining (and the potential for more to be added!), I want to ask for your help to make the most of this tremendous live event. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more today to help us continue promoting the Exposing Critical Racism Tour, executing these live events to their fullest potential, and supporting these students to ensure that our presence has a lasting impact on their campuses?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4qe862ak473auopeqpl3fculmj2sgl2nhke5u2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8em48h1m28n8uttuf4fld0cbp1cnk9pbbdmevo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh2bs)
---
I’m including a few photos of some recent events in this email, because you really need to see the enthusiasm among these young patriots to believe it. _**_THOUSANDS_**_**of college students have come out to these events -- even on some of the most Left-wing college campuses in America. We even drew a sizable crowd in Burlington, VT a few days ago!** And these students aren’t just coming to be entertained. They’re being equipped with the facts, the arguments, and the encouragement they’ll need to stand up to their college administrations and professors, and to take on the racist ideology of the radical Left wherever they encounter it. Because, as I’ve said many times, _if America doesn't kill Critical Race Theory, Critical Race Theory will kill America._
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgkll670d7nspl4c444v6i3d86kn2g5m6h9g0300_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh2bs)
---
That’s why we're going right into the belly of the beast by visiting college campuses with the _TRUTH_. [**Will you help us continue this vitally important tour with your generous gift right now?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr5s4o51ik56a7dmulida5dcnadg69r64ksm3lpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh2bs) Your gift will enable us to fund the travel expenses for my team. It will cover the cost of the promotional work that will bring students in the door. It will help provide transportation for students to off-campus venues when we're not allowed to meet on campus due to draconian COVID restrictions (a challenge we have dealt with a few times already). **And it will help fund TPUSA chapters on these campuses and many others, so that conservative students in hostile environments can sustain their camaraderie and support for one another long after the event is over.** Many conservatives have written off places like the University of Vermont or the University of Oregon. They say they're too far gone... too steeped in radical Leftism. And that's _PRECISELY_ why we're going there on this tour. For many students, this event may be the only exposure they get on their college campus to the truth about Critical Race Theory. Already, we're seeing just what’s possible when we carry the truth into those dark places. Students’ eyes are being opened. They’re finding their courage. They're fighting back against the poison of Critical Race Theory, socialism, and Marxism and standing up for our pro-America values in some of the most hostile environments in America.
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4k7elaf6hbqp8v6lsf5cqifh4iad6a1b28vi20g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh2bs)
---
[**Will you help us reach even more of them with your much-needed gift today? Please click here to pitch in your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or whatever you can possibly afford.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjpj8itq23tmo1npftbi3isf2cm367bv1u9va9qo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc06oj96psr17qj484fnaailg4n2g0ijlffaegd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g6aoj4chh2bs)
---
Thank you for standing with the next generation! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

And these students aren’t just coming to be entertained. They’re being equipped with the facts, the arguments, and the encouragement they’ll need to stand up to their college administrations and professors, and to take on the racist ideology of the radical Left wherever they encounter it. Because, as I’ve said many times, if America doesn't kill Critical Race Theory, Critical Race Theory will kill America. That’s why we're going right into the belly of the beast by visiting college campuses with the TRUTH. Your gift will enable us to fund the travel expenses for my team. It will cover the cost of the promotional work that will bring students in the door. It will help provide transportation for students to off-campus venues when we're not allowed to meet on campus due to draconian COVID restrictions (a challenge we have dealt with a few times already). And it will help fund TPUSA chapters on these campuses and many others, so that conservative students in hostile environments can sustain their camaraderie and support for one another long after the event is over. Many conservatives have written off places like the University of Vermont or the University of Oregon. They say they're too far gone... too steeped in radical Leftism. And that's PRECISELY why we're going there on this tour. For many students, this event may be the only exposure they get on their college campus to the truth about Critical Race Theory. Already, we're seeing just what’s possible when we carry the truth into those dark places. Students’ eyes are being opened. They’re finding their courage. They're fighting back against the poison of Critical Race Theory, socialism, and Marxism and standing up for our pro-America values in some of the most hostile environments in America. Thank you for standing with the next generation! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Thank you, Virginia.

body:
Let's get to work

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718176:Jg1e692N_:m:1:3253819041:5D65BA35FC09049752669E335D0BECE8:r)
---
Peter,

Virginia, we did it. None of this would have been possible without YOU. I am so incredibly thankful and blessed for each and every one of you. _**We won this, and we won this together!**_

Day one, we are going to get to work. We are going to restore excellence in our schools, invest in the largest education budget in the history of the Commonwealth, EMBRACE our parents, not ignore them, reduce our cost of living, and cut taxes on the retirement income of our Veterans.

We are going to keep our communities SAFE - we will stand up for Law Enforcement. We are jump-starting our jobs and reinvigorating our economy. **Most importantly,** Virginia will be OPEN for business.

My team and I have already set up a game plan, but to achieve that we have to start NOW. We have no time to waste. We need to start off strong going into Day One. | | [**START DAY ONE STRONG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718176:Jg1e692N_:m:1:3253819041:5D65BA35FC09049752669E335D0BECE8:r)
---
It's time for Virginia to be the place where everyone wants to live, not leave. Together, we will change the trajectory of the Commonwealth, and we are starting that transformation on DAY ONE!

**There is no time to wait; we work in REAL time, not Government time.** Let's keep this momentum going.

name: Giffords.org
subject: We need your help to win our lawsuit against the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They broke campaign finance law and illegally supported candidates who support their agenda.
#

**Big news: We are SUING the NRA for years of violations of campaign finance law. Will you have our backs in this fight?**
[**Make a $3 contribution today to help us fight back against the NRA’s illegal tactics and hold the gun lobby accountable.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)**
We wanted you to be among the first to know:
**We are suing the NRA.**
We filed a groundbreaking lawsuit for violations of campaign finance laws dating back to 2014. We know the NRA engaged in a broad pattern of illegal activity involving violations of the federal election laws’ contribution limits, ban on corporate contributions, and disclosure requirements.
[**Want to support us in this legal fight? Make a $3 contribution today to help us fight back against the NRA’s illegal tactics and hold the gun lobby accountable:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211108-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)**

| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211108-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211108-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211108-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211108-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211108-1-15&t=27&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)**
---
****
The NRA made as much as _$35 million_ in unlawful campaign contributions to Senate candidates and to Donald Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign. They exceeded federal limits and evaded restrictions on corporate contributions, and then falsely reported this spending in filings with the FEC.
**They did all this in order to elect extreme right-wing candidates who would never put reasonable checks on their pro-gun agenda.**
It’s time to hold the NRA accountable for illegal actions that corrupted politicians who were supposed to protect Americans from gun violence.
But remember, while the NRA illegally funnels money into campaigns, we’re doing the honest work to hold them accountable, and to elect gun safety candidates up and down the ballot.
[**Donate to help us do it.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-15&t=28&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)
Thank you for helping to save lives.
The team at Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-15&t=29&refcode2=1193_3935704_RpLoPG&akid=1193%2E3935704%2ERpLoPG)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:

[**We know we have what it takes to take this fight to Cawthorn and win. If you’re with us, will you rush a donation of $14 for the new NC-14?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38430746/315420041/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211108_FR_Redistricting3_B1_other_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWE5ZTUwMS1kOTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pjFR6vIhdUA-KJecsXPpUrxKdCHPQlT8wQNRTPtW0IA=) | | | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38430747/315420042/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211108_FR_Redistricting3_B1_other_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWE5ZTUwMS1kOTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pjFR6vIhdUA-KJecsXPpUrxKdCHPQlT8wQNRTPtW0IA=)
---
The NC GOP yet again drew district lines to favor Republicans statewide. Let us be clear: This is an attempt to harm our democracy and silence the voices of thousands of North Carolinians.
While other districts became more red under these maps, ours became _significantly more blue._ This means that NC-14 is one of the only competitive districts in the state, and we have a stronger chance at making Cawthorn a one-term representative.
**But we also have to stay very focused on the work that lies ahead.**
The reality is that NC-14 remains a red district. And with these new lines, Republicans are going to use this to their advantage to keep seats red and take over the House majority.
In order to win and flip NC-14 blue, we’re going to have to continue putting in the work by organizing and reaching out to voters. Saturday’s Day of Action was just one stop of many to convince voters that Jasmine is the best candidate to lead Western North Carolina forward.
And on Wednesday, Jasmine and our team are heading to Watauga County, which was drawn into the district, to meet with college students and begin building our organizing operation there!
[**Traveling across the district, knocking on doors, making phone calls, and writing postcards all take significant resources, which is why we’re asking: Will you chip in $14 or more to help give us the resources we need to win in our new district?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38430748/315420043/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211108_FR_Redistricting3_B1_other_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWE5ZTUwMS1kOTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pjFR6vIhdUA-KJecsXPpUrxKdCHPQlT8wQNRTPtW0IA=)

| | |
Patriot, I hope you're doing well since the last time I checked in.

First of all, I just want to thank you for your dedication to the conservative cause. It is because of grassroots patriots like you that Republicans are able to fight for conservative values. You understand what's at stake and you don't shy away from taking a stand when it's needed. That's why I wanted to come to you first with this offer.

**[I'm opening up my 2022 GOP Membership to top supporters only until midnight. Tomorrow morning, I'll be checking the first 50 names who responded, I hope I can count on seeing your name there!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718856:Jm02p92yN:m:1:3299561967:3DDAB37E7668D322D8C1C6262DCDBF85:r "I’m opening up my 2022 GOP Membership to top supporters only until midnight. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.
