Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 16, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-44564919137-echo7-1011D318DC01D9A90FD390069D1D59AB@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Don't agonize, organize
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Last week we got bad news out of Virginia: Democrat candidate for Governor Terry McAuliffe lost to the Trump-endorsed Republican candidate, Glenn Youngkin.

Political pundits had their day making predictions about what these results might mean for the future, and what they had to say might have made some folks feel pretty blue. But there's something important to remember in times like these: **don 't agonize, organize.**

**[Instead of agonizing over the Virginia election, this team has decided to keep on organizing for the midterms -- which are exactly ONE YEAR AWAY TODAY. Will you join us? Rush a donation of $20.22 before midnight to help Derek power up our base and defend the House majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/YFNKKUe3tXpI7AbtLxjNRH5TCcL8nQT-RKKPi-Q5n64=/FNkWUJ5xEt512vGqS0uluriC-nsKrH5W7rptU6hshbA=?refcode=em21_211108_1Year_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211108_1Year_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&amount=20.22)**

Let's be clear: it wasn't all bad news last Tuesday. For starters, the race in Virginia was extremely close: a few thousand votes here and there would have made the night end very differently.

Plus, Democrats had tremendous victories in other elections across the country: from Boston to New Hampshire to New Jersey and even in our neck of the woods! **We still have time to deliver victories in the midterms, even if we may face some headwinds -- but we need to organize now.**

**[The midterm elections are exactly one year away. Help us organize now to defend Derek's seat and the House majority by rushing a donation of $20.22 before midnight.](https://act.myngp.com/el/YFNKKUe3tXpI7AbtLxjNRH5TCcL8nQT-RKKPi-Q5n64=/FNkWUJ5xEt512vGqS0uluriC-nsKrH5W7rptU6hshbA=?refcode=em21_211108_1Year_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211108_1Year_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&amount=20.22)**

Let's go,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

name: Gary Black
subject: One year from today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/676903569b82f94c/48a29aee5fd4aacec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — TODAY marks exactly one year until Election Day. We’ve got a lot of work to do between now and then.**

---
Raphael Warnock, Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, Stacey Abrams, and the rest of the Democrats are on a mission to fundamentally change America. **Their idea of fundamental change is soaring fuel prices, open borders, IRS tracking, more government control of education, and $450k payments to illegal immigrants. Clearly, their fundamental change comes at quite a cost.** I’m standing in the gap to stop them... to restore a Republican U.S. Senate majority with one conservative vote... and to send a message that Georgia is still a RED state. [**Will you, if you haven’t already, stand in that gap with me? Contribute now to help us win.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/676903569b82f94c/7769cb185b1c27d7c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/676903569b82f94c/311ee4e642e19acec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
**Since making the decision to run for the U.S. Senate five months ago, the outpouring of support across Georgia has been tremendous.**
---
|
---
* Strong endorsements from Doug Collins, Nathan Deal, and Sandra Deal.
* Support from more than half of all Georgia sheriffs.
* Support from local elected leaders across the entire state.
* County Coordinators in all 159 Georgia counties.

---
|
---
These early milestones are B.I.G. and crucial to our success. But the work is just beginning, and**our team must have the resources to go toe to toe with Raphael Warnock, who has $17 million in the bank. ** We need resources to order more yard signs and bumper stickers, to distribute campaign materials and travel across the state, and to run more ads targeting undecided voters. [**Will you help fuel the effort?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/676903569b82f94c/c65eadf3cb6e0744c3d6b838967d376c/37793) If we defeat Raphael Warnock, Republicans win back the U.S. Senate. It’s as simple as that. I’m the ONLY Republican running who can make this race about Biden and Warnock's failures — and that’s the only way we will get this done and win back this Senate seat. **We can’t take another chance on an experiment. Too much is at stake. Trusted experience is the key, and with exactly one year to go, it’s time to leave it all on the field.** [**I hope you’ll stand with us and donate now if you haven’t already. If you have donated and you’re able to give again, I hope you’ll match your contribution now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/676903569b82f94c/3457664251a599afc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/676903569b82f94c/c084d063645ebba2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/676903569b82f94c/b19e52611efabdbac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/676903569b82f94c/5b32d0f802ab483ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=676903569b82f94c&d=d0621e796a4b3d31c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=676903569b82f94c).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

clean_body: Thank you for your continued support. | Peter, It’s me: North Carolina Republican Party Chairman Michael Whatley. I’m so glad that I reached you. I want you to know that I’ve noticed how hard you’ve worked in recent months to support our Republican Movement and make America great again. That’s why I’m proud to offer you a place in the exclusive Chairman’s Club. | Official CHAIRMAN’S CLUB INVITATION EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | Note: If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | The Chairman’s Club is an elite group of the most dedicated and generous Grassroots Republicans, Peter. That’s why I know you’d be a perfect fit! Unfortunately, I can only hold your spot until 11:59 PM TONIGHT. So please don’t delay in accepting your offer. Congratulations! And welcome! Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Happy Birthday to the next Governor of Nevada!

| | **Did you miss what was said about election night? Here’s the latest:** **Now Governor-Elect Glenn Younkin swept the Virginia Governor’s race on Tuesday, **defeating former Governor Terry McAuliffe 50.7% to 48.6% in an unprecedented win. Many are calling the race a bellwether for the 2022 midterm elections and a clear sign that Americans are **not happy with the far-left direction of the Democratic party. **

Big news, folks: Congress has now passed the historic bipartisan infrastructure package and sent it to President Biden’s desk. **This bill will bring $3.7 billion in formula funding to New Mexico, plus the opportunity to compete for much more.** **It is a huge deal.** And it’s on top of the over $9 billion we’ve already brought into New Mexico through Democrats' _American Rescue Plan_ , which made historic investments in child care, education, and Tribal programs, and cut child poverty in half. And our work isn’t done yet. We are ready to build on this incredible progress by passing the _Build Back Better Act_ to lower your household costs, create jobs, and cut taxes — all while tackling the climate crisis. **I’m ready to get this next bill passed and keep putting this historic funding straight to work for New Mexico and our country.** **The support of this grassroots team makes a real difference as we work to change lives and livelihoods for the better. There’s no overstating what a huge impact the _American Rescue Plan_ and _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ will have on New Mexico and our country.
The _American Rescue_ _Plan_ made the largest investments ever in transformative programs that are already impacting people for the better. We brought the largest expansion in access to affordable health care since the Affordable Care Act and drastically reduced child poverty with the expanded Child Tax Credit. We also cut taxes by tripling the maximum Earned Income Tax Credit and raising the income cap.
Now, through the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ , we’re going to make the biggest investments ever in public transit, clean drinking water, clean energy transmission, and the electric grid. Not to mention the largest investment in passenger rail since Amtrak.
We’ve made huge strides. Now it’s time to pass the _Build Back Better Act_ and make the largest investments in climate action in U.S. history — which include language from my legislation to give household rebates for purchasing and installing electric appliances and equipment, and will establish a Civilian Climate Corps. Combined with the infrastructure bill, the _Build Back Better Act_ will add an average of 1.5 million jobs each year for the next decade.
**We’re in a historic year, and it’s because of you and your support that we’ve been able to accomplish all of this. So please, know that any donation of any amount really is making a difference.**

We brought the largest expansion in access to affordable health care since the Affordable Care Act and drastically reduced child poverty with the expanded Child Tax Credit. We also cut taxes by tripling the maximum Earned Income Tax Credit and raising the income cap. Now, through the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act , we’re going to make the biggest investments ever in public transit, clean drinking water, clean energy transmission, and the electric grid. Not to mention the largest investment in passenger rail since Amtrak. We’ve made huge strides. Now it’s time to pass the Build Back Better Act and make the largest investments in climate action in U.S. history — which include language from my legislation to give household rebates for purchasing and installing electric appliances and equipment, and will establish a Civilian Climate Corps. Combined with the infrastructure bill, the Build Back Better Act will add an average of 1.5 million jobs each year for the next decade. We’re in a historic year, and it’s because of you and your support that we’ve been able to accomplish all of this. So please, know that any donation of any amount really is making a difference. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

clean_body: 365 days, 364 days, 363 days... | | = Election Day is in exactly one year, Peter. This race is going to be extremely competitive, but it’s one we can’t afford to lose. This election is about so much more than partisan politics — it’s about every single Coloradan who's ever had to choose between a paycheck and a prescription, who is struggling just to make ends meet. And it’s about uniting our community and sending our first Latina and only doctor to Congress. We deserve a representative who will stand up for our community’s progressive values — not big corporations and special interests. One year goes quickly, and we need to make every single day count, especially considering we’re fighting in one of the most competitive races in the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you! Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. | Friend,

The Republican win in Virginia is proof that the momentum for the Conservative movement in our country is at an ALL TIME HIGH. The Radical Democrats are terrified, because they know **it’s Georgia's turn to ride the Red Wave in 2022. **

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris tried their hardest to destroy the America we know and love in their first year in office. Their ally, Nancy Pelosi, has aided and abetted their radical transformation of America because she knows her time as Speaker is coming to an end.

The Red Wave is coming, and with it we will _restore our rights and liberties_ , _secure our borders_ , _protect the unborn_ , and most importantly; _bring our Georgia Values to Congress_.

[**_To keep up the momentum I need YOUR support; can I count on you to chip in just $5, $10, or even $25 right now to make sure it’s Georgia's turn to ride the Red Wave? >>>_**](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=50f8c5cd30&e=598f6aa24c) **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=d2eacf3d0e&e=598f6aa24c)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: North Carolina has new extremely gerrymandered maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Republicans in the North Carolina legislature recently pushed through new legislative and Congressional maps.
#

Friends -
Republicans in the North Carolina legislature recently pushed through new legislative and Congressional maps.
Once again, they chose to try to rig our democracy in their favor with more extreme partisan gerrymandering. Republican legislators have made clear they believe that they should get to pick their own voters, not the other way around.
It's anti-American and anti-democratic.
**[If you agree, add your name to demand politicians stop rigging our democracy and elections. North Carolinians deserve fair maps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38431954/315426168/1960421774?refcode2=96df3b4b-df40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211108-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmRmM2I0Yi1kZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FnLBgZ1OARfmJoNEcLViUHCtA8UIXttLEoRBmkx2JnM=&emci=eb551899-a540-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96df3b4b-df40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20912107)**
When Republicans’ old maps came before me on the Supreme Court, I called them out for what they were: gerrymandered maps that disenfranchised voters.
If the new maps are left unchanged, Republicans are likely to hold 11 seats in Congress compared to just 4 for Democrats. That is unacceptable in a state where the presidential vote was near-evenly split.
**[If you agree that this gerrymandering goes against core tenets of our democracy, then please add your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38431955/315426170/1960421774?refcode2=96df3b4b-df40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211108-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmRmM2I0Yi1kZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FnLBgZ1OARfmJoNEcLViUHCtA8UIXttLEoRBmkx2JnM=&emci=eb551899-a540-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96df3b4b-df40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20912107)**
Thank you for joining me in speaking out today.
\- Cheri Beasley

name: Mark Warner
subject: One year from Election Day

body:
One year from now, voters will head to the polls to decide the fate of our Democratic majority in the United States Senate.

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38432002/315426331/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzkyMDg3Mi1kZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6XIgLzXEycr94UvRmQ2xdt6biXQ1kXPd8VqywjwAt_I=&emci=d7a7f88c-b640-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=33920872-df40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek,

One year from now, voters will head to the polls to decide the fate of our Democratic majority in the United States Senate. They’ll decide if our government will continue to focus on real results for the American people, or descend into a whirlwind of attacks on voting rights, health care, reproductive rights, and so much more. [_**There is so much at stake in this election. Help us keep the Senate blue with a $5 contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38432003/315426332/-485201754?refcode=mw_em_211108_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzkyMDg3Mi1kZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6XIgLzXEycr94UvRmQ2xdt6biXQ1kXPd8VqywjwAt_I=) In the coming year, I want to make sure every one of our Democratic candidates has the resources and the support they need to win their elections. And I don’t just want to defend our majority in the Senate -- I want to expand it. That’s the only way we can continue to invest in infrastructure, health care, and jobs -- the kinds of investments needed to keep our pandemic recovery moving. Without a Democratic majority, that will all go away. [_**Let’s work together to build on our successes and ensure we come out of the 2022 election with a blue Senate. Make a $5 contribution today. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38432004/315426333/-485201754?refcode=mw_em_211108_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzkyMDg3Mi1kZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6XIgLzXEycr94UvRmQ2xdt6biXQ1kXPd8VqywjwAt_I=) Thank you, Mark Warner

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: You need to see this to believe it
body:
As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Cri
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb9ct4skg0hehjenp341kb2phfhlcfr134gk2390_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o72cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thje1pb1crleeqn1d376soe6srgeior8pr361im0pjlm3j7ct9gs8or0stmm1jjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphlcspm8ptnc9j32s5ic8r749fg)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgl3nim3f1gq59nto52pohk9qdlrdl16t89uvlao_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o72cth2bs)
---
Fellow American, As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Critical Race Theory” agenda of the radical Left. But hear me on this: I can tell you, from firsthand experience, that there is _GREAT_ reason for optimism! **Turning Point USA recently launched our Exposing Critical Racism Tour** , a no-holds-barred effort to fight back against the racist Left on college campuses. And so far, it has been one of our most successful tours _EVER_ _!_
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjmtefngpb3ssrt3jop5d49scj39oe1klpdq5i4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o72cth2bs)
---
But with four dates remaining (and the potential for more to be added!), I want to ask for your help to make the most of this tremendous live event. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more today to help us continue promoting the Exposing Critical Racism Tour, executing these live events to their fullest potential, and supporting these students to ensure that our presence has a lasting impact on their campuses?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ukhqk5jkman68uio645sc7r16gcehkc58fdjvg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o72cth2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zubpnabklg09061km2q2c6kl4g6o7iuarpfdc288_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o72cth2bs)
---
I’m including a few photos of some recent events in this email, because you really need to see the enthusiasm among these young patriots to believe it. _**_THOUSANDS_**_**of college students have come out to these events -- even on some of the most Left-wing college campuses in America. We even drew a sizable crowd in Burlington, VT a few days ago!** And these students aren’t just coming to be entertained. They’re being equipped with the facts, the arguments, and the encouragement they’ll need to stand up to their college administrations and professors, and to take on the racist ideology of the radical Left wherever they encounter it. Because, as I’ve said many times, _if America doesn't kill Critical Race Theory, Critical Race Theory will kill America._
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z35oaluf9mb6lvicu05lk1p8g33dnej3brn124l8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o72cth2bs)
---
That’s why we're going right into the belly of the beast by visiting college campuses with the _TRUTH_. [**Will you help us continue this vitally important tour with your generous gift right now?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoqbeer9kg2c7ou7287o1da7dabl068au17f8t60_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o72cth2bs) Your gift will enable us to fund the travel expenses for my team. It will cover the cost of the promotional work that will bring students in the door. It will help provide transportation for students to off-campus venues when we're not allowed to meet on campus due to draconian COVID restrictions (a challenge we have dealt with a few times already). **And it will help fund TPUSA chapters on these campuses and many others, so that conservative students in hostile environments can sustain their camaraderie and support for one another long after the event is over.** Many conservatives have written off places like the University of Vermont or the University of Oregon. They say they're too far gone... too steeped in radical Leftism. And that's _PRECISELY_ why we're going there on this tour. For many students, this event may be the only exposure they get on their college campus to the truth about Critical Race Theory. Already, we're seeing just what’s possible when we carry the truth into those dark places. Students’ eyes are being opened. They’re finding their courage. They're fighting back against the poison of Critical Race Theory, socialism, and Marxism and standing up for our pro-America values in some of the most hostile environments in America.
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znn7qetlojkfvkoh5h656qsgjnq3ogk20idan4hg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o72cth2bs)
---
[**Will you help us reach even more of them with your much-needed gift today? Please click here to pitch in your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or whatever you can possibly afford.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrnnoel4qpfaksgrnn4uju7padd8o7oegr49un0o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o72cth2bs)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58718312:JOLyA92LN:m:1:3253819041:AA02DC06499FF313E9F3E35347EA2690:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

clean_body: We need all hands on deck = Hi Peter, We’re exactly one year away from Election Day! That may seem like a while away, but here’s the deal: Last week’s elections nationwide showed us that we have a lot of work to do to prepare for a midterm showdown where Republicans are going to throw everything they can at us. My team and I are focused on building campaign infrastructure that can carry us through 2022 and help deliver meaningful change for Iowa , but we need the full support of this grassroots team behind us every step of the way. = | = = Peter, this is shaping up to be one of the most competitive House races in the entire country. National Republicans have already signaled that they will throw the kitchen sink at this district, and I can’t fight back without you, Peter. That means putting in the work to build a strong grassroots foundation now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Liz Mathis Candidate for Congress, IA-02 Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: What's A Pipehitter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719150:JpdvA92N7:m:1:3298722022:D91EBFB7DEF189C7A8479A6285AEC442:r)
---
| It seems we have triggered the radical Left by standing up for our American values and for being willing to actually fight for what we believe in.

When I launched **[CAVPAC](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719150:JpdvA92N7:m:1:3298722022:D91EBFB7DEF189C7A8479A6285AEC442:r "CAVPAC
")** ,** ** we called on all patriotic Americans who care about our core values to join as Pipehitters in our Conservative Cavalry. This clearly spooked the Democrats because they started mocking me and our dedicated supporters.
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719150:JpdvA92N7:m:1:3298722022:D91EBFB7DEF189C7A8479A6285AEC442:r)
---
But we don't back down in the face of attacks. Pipehitters are unapologetically American and will never give an inch in the fight for our future. _**Pipehitters are the radical Left 's worst nightmare because we won't let them destroy our country.**_

Working in the Trump Administration, I am used to being attacked by the "woke" mob for doing what is right. Thankfully, my parents raised me to not let bullies push me around. That's why I'm doubling down my efforts to recruit more proud Americans to join us in the battle for the future of our country.
**Show the Radical Left They Can 't Bully Us**
---
| | [CHIP IN TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719150:JpdvA92N7:m:1:3298722022:D91EBFB7DEF189C7A8479A6285AEC442:r "Join CAVPAC")
---
Nothing will bother Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and AOC more than seeing a list of thousands and thousands of patriots who refuse to back down from our American values.

**[So, I'm encouraging every single principled conservative to join the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry to send a clear message to the Left: we aren't giving an inch.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719150:JpdvA92N7:m:1:3298722022:D91EBFB7DEF189C7A8479A6285AEC442:r "So, I’m
encouraging every single principled conservative to join the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry to send a clear message to the Left: we aren’t giving
an inch.")**

The battle for the future of our country is a worthy one. **_The momentum is on our side, and we MUST act now._ **I know we will be victorious if grassroot conservatives from all across the country join me in championing American values.

Never Give An Inch,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719150:JpdvA92N7:m:1:3298722022:D91EBFB7DEF189C7A8479A6285AEC442:r)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719150:JpdvA92N7:m:1:3298722022:D91EBFB7DEF189C7A8479A6285AEC442:r "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719150:JpdvA92N7:m:1:3298722022:D91EBFB7DEF189C7A8479A6285AEC442:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

But if we’re going to **end this cycle** of the GOP drawing unconstitutional maps every ten years and forcing us into legal battles while North Carolinians miss out on the representation they deserve, **we HAVE to elect Democrats to the legislature so we have a say in the next redistricting process.**

name: Don Boudreaux, PhD
subject: I'm hopeful about America's future because...
body:
I can’t emphasize enough how much this intellectual giant’s words have inspired Mercatus for the past 40 years and continue
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zutgok5bgbbla02m7dha7be4a6matv0s5pq3cp4o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8d1iempm5dhjmkqj3db7chqb9cj7m1om4c5ke1im8shgesqr6cbj62om2oln61jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6cdb76di6fdr3cooj1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphm2o30s3j66oh5u)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z86l41n7n8om2i7snnvau3fqfevns5uapjgq71g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow Liberty Supporter, _" We must make the building of a free society once more an intellectual adventure, a deed of courage."_ The great economist Friedrich Hayek wrote those words 70 years ago and his words are every bit as relevant today! My name is Don Boudreaux.
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg0dclan5184l8e57rt89cd0eo2ti1b5gc26i8e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs) As a senior research fellow at the **Mercatus Center** and an economics professor at **George Mason University** , I've eagerly accepted Hayek's challenge, and so too have my colleagues. I'm emailing you today to [urge you to join us in this pivotal challenge](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zondqbplkv5vu2au0ni77glp4u0ed27mtdhjldc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs) that'll decide America's fate...whether our kids and grandkids will inherit the same nation founded on the values of individual liberty. **[Will you stand with Mercatus by making your best, tax-deductible gift to support free market ideas in the academy?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkvjc2odc53uq63fcgekr5tup7bipdq12ucq4fqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)** _If you donate $50 or more, I 'll send you a free copy of F. A. Hayek's famous 1949 essay, "The Intellectuals and Socialism," as a token of my appreciation for your generosity!_ F.A. Hayek and his Mont Pelerin Society colleagues were the lonely few scholars with the courage to stand strong in defense of a free society and a liberal social order when those ideas seemed dead. Thanks to Hayek and great thinkers such as Ludwig von Mises and Milton Friedman, the ideas of freedom that you and I hold dear inspired major movements, including the Reagan Revolution in the U.S. and Margaret Thatcher's reforms in the U.K. I can't emphasize enough how much this intellectual giant's words have inspired Mercatus for the past 40 years and continue to motivate us daily in our tireless efforts... **...to do everything in our power to build a free society!** But to make the critical impact needed to win our battle against the powerful forces fighting to kill the cornerstone of a free society--individual liberty--[I need your help](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zoe238so7028b6pncae1pkli14mer90d3dd94n90_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs). **[So, please stand with Mercatus today by accepting Hayek's challenge and making a generous, tax-deductible gift before you close this email.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvsflhbu6jtjn262mv3ubfjtl427s4j2a97ueoug_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)** With [your generous gift today](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu84m045b3p9je9hndgd1oepe16eq2v23vurp8q8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs), you'll play a major role in supporting the Mercatus Center's programs and our scholars, who are working exhaustively to:
* Provide powerful university **research that debunks economic fallacies** and make the undeniable case to restore fiscal sanity;

* **Train a new generation of outstanding economists and academic leaders** who make the case for a free society; AND

* **Reach key audiences including Congress and decision-makers in DC**...governors and state legislators...influential policy organizations and citizen groups...and _ordinary Americans_ ...with better economic ideas!

I know there are a lot of terrific organizations out there fighting to advance liberty. **_But none are quite like Mercatus!_** I couldn't be prouder of my colleagues' excellent work, which has put the Mercatus Center at the heart of the biggest policy debates in DC and around the country. Our scholars don't toady to politicians or advance half measures. [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp5hc7mdk3eb158vhkm657be7eb2o8kmft76ue88_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs) Mercatus scholars have the integrity to boldly say what's right...just like Hayek did! The truth is...our staff makes the ideas of freedom heard like no one else! _But it 's up to you and me to amplify their abilities and message, and to get their important free market ideas to the people who need to hear them._ **[That's why I hope you'll stand with me and the rest of the Mercatus team today by donating $25, $50, $100 or more.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjrp8mjj4cld14coero08rg70k32d95svc40q05g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)** _And don 't forget...as a special thanks for donating a $50 or more, you'll receive a free copy of Hayek's "The Intellectuals and Socialism" essay!_ As I mentioned earlier, this essay is just as relevant now as it was more than 70 years ago when he wrote it. It clearly lays out the reasons why the work of Mercatus is so vital today. You probably aren't surprised that the bulk of Americans do not embrace socialism. But here's the problem...the intellectuals who drive the debates do. As a result, collectivists in academia have pushed this agenda further and further. So, where do these so-called intellectuals get their flawed and destructive ideas? **_As Hayek explains, they get them from the universities._** Sadly, university professors were at the core of the "New Deal" and "Great Society" policy revolutions that devastated American liberty in the 20th century. FDR's "Brain Trust" came from Columbia University, and the architects of LBJ's Great Society expansions of government originated at Harvard. These disastrous ideas were pushed by the "second-hand dealers in ideas" who used them to shape public discourse, change public policy, and fundamentally alter... **...the people 's relationship with the American government!** By setting the terms of the debates, _the intellectuals brought us to the situation we 're in today_, with a
* **Massive government** that's grown FAR beyond its intended role, and

* An American polity who increasingly have less and less of **our natural rights that are also guaranteed by the U.S. Constitution!**

Mercatus Center scholars recognize the critical role universities play in this process. That's why our core mission is to advocate for a free society, which we do by offering **_strong, free-market alternatives to "politics as usual."_** **It 's critical that we expand our programs in 2022 so [I'm counting on friends like you to stand with us by making a generous donation now](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zb9tat872nrun9i46hmg46rpmr4hii8tpsts41ko_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs).** You'll be glad to hear that by [supporting our work](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6rus7gt8srlik20546hulqcjbfas1l064cqpbio_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs) you'll make a powerful difference. That's why I hope you'll... | | | | [Donate $10](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zaoeebd4s38ngsi1d8nk5d87ie7tjh1g4pcv6810_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)
---
| | | [Donate $25](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3fke65ub828qetfihtkpnc6dn04n8ip24iblnmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)
---
| | | [Donate $50 & get your free copy of Hayek's "The Intellectuals and Socialism."](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4e94b1h6v7975ce24p9c4q1muskha5avpjkp7j8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)
---
| | | [Donate $100 & get 2 free copies of Hayek's "The Intellectuals and Socialism."](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztuitp04ba43sbhi2jisb828e9qg2d5tj9nne3e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)
---
| | | [Donate $250 & get 5 free copies of Hayek's "The Intellectuals and Socialism."](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqp99th5d0tvdegeiebborftg333mbk8cr34pcno_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)
---
Before I continue, let me make something abundantly clear.

Even though I'm writing with great urgency, I'm extremely optimistic. In fact...

**...I have great news to share with you!**

At this moment in history, in October 2021, you and I have a phenomenal opportunity to successfully follow Hayek's roadmap to restore American liberty.

That's why I'm asking you to join our Mercatus team in taking full advantage of this opportunity.

Why am I making this request?

Simply put, it's only through the [generous support of liberty advocates like you](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp4ttoqbhohjss72ipradta071tf0fmkdprpnh7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs) that Mercatus is able to fully fund our scholars' research and other work focused on...

**...making a deep and lasting impact that 'll change the future course of America back in the direction of a free society... one that respects liberty and our Founders' small-government vision.**

My Mercatus colleagues CAN accomplish this major challenge, BUT only [with your help!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi59kses0go38q4ahnfp78710jht5ilqfo7u7hp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)

**And it 's why I'm urging you to [stand with our team in the all-important fight for liberty by making your best gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvbjt4bmod49kb6hiq9hgi3jhgl1eqb6gcaebgr8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)**

For too long, we've let the intellectuals get away with promoting collectivist ideas and government action as the solution to all our problems. For too long, they've dominated debates with their utopian notions and addiction to government spending and regulation.
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1pu83ctf0ohgui2qfato5q2iitavqer2o9pdmco_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)
Now is the time for you and me to fight back. It's time to live up to Hayek's challenge to "regain that belief in the power of ideas."

Your investment in the Mercatus Center will make all the difference. I hope we can count on you today. Please give now and help build the free society of which Hayek spoke.

_And don 't forget...as a special thanks for your generous gift of $50 or more, you'll receive a free copy of Hayek's "The Intellectuals and Socialism" essay!_

Thank you for reading my email -- and thank you in advance for standing with Mercatus in the fight to restore freedom.

Yours in the fight for liberty,

Don Boudreaux
Mercatus Center Senior Fellow
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbm67j43nf56utiekck90btrob92k0bsic0lkn00_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5g61o76cdh2bs)

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, [please use this preferences page](http://e.conservativefwd.com/prefs/9z2z0aeb39kjsgbnterrlmclpgpss5sqtjp83vil5mg).
625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zq69oopnptdpilolc0v1i58i54n5e0p5ijb862f0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdgm0o70sphm49fg)

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: We're a year out, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Time is running out | | |
---
Folks – With Election Day only a year away, we've got to buckle down and get to work to protect our razor-thin majority. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and New Hampshire is at the top of his list. If we learned anything from last week's election, it's that **__McConnell's chances of flipping the Senate red are very real.__** Republicans have already spent over $4 million attacking Maggie, and GOP megadonors are lining up to throw their support behind Chris Sununu if he jumps into New Hampshire's Senate race. **If we're going to protect this critical seat and keep our Senate blue, we need to strengthen our grassroots support NOW, not a year from now.** That's why we're reaching out, friend, to humbly ask if you can make your first online contribution today. **[The next year will be an all-hands-on-deck situation, and your support today is crucial.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38432691/315429554/-1803038125?refcode=e20211108_staff-1yr&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWYxYjNlNy1lMTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7hH0Fgoflc1oX9FL_1y17END4S6-utuXvYsmXdwryE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38432692/315429555/-1803038125?refcode=e20211108_staff-1yr&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWYxYjNlNy1lMTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q7hH0Fgoflc1oX9FL_1y17END4S6-utuXvYsmXdwryE=)

clean_body: Time is running out | | | Folks – With Election Day only a year away, we've got to buckle down and get to work to protect our razor-thin majority. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and New Hampshire is at the top of his list. If we learned anything from last week's election, it's that McConnell's chances of flipping the Senate red are very real. Republicans have already spent over $4 million attacking Maggie, and GOP megadonors are lining up to throw their support behind Chris Sununu if he jumps into New Hampshire's Senate race. If we're going to protect this critical seat and keep our Senate blue, we need to strengthen our grassroots support NOW, not a year from now. That's why we're reaching out, friend, to humbly ask if you can make your first online contribution today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you for being on our team! – Maggie Hassan's campaign staff | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)

I don't have a second to spare.

**As of today, we are officially ONE YEAR OUT from Election Day.**

And at this pivotal moment for our Democratic House Majority, **I need you to remember what 's at stake.**

**I need you to remember** that almost exactly one year ago, we DEFEATED Donald Trump, ELECTED President Joe Biden, and DEFENDED our House Majority.

**I need you to remember** that we defended our democracy from an armed insurrection, passed the American Rescue Plan, and got to work on our historic Build Back Better agenda.

**And finally, I need you to remember** how close we came to almost losing it all.

****[Because as I write this, we're staring down a RAZOR-THIN House Majority -- and Republicans are closer than ever before to taking it from us once and for all.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_zQVejW_)****

Please hear me:**I know we have what it takes to defy the odds and come out on top once again --_but only if grassroots Democrats like you are with me every step of the way._**

**[So I need to know: Are you committed to bringing the fight to Republicans EACH AND EVERY DAY -- from now until November 8, 2022? If you are, I'm asking you directly to rush in $3 to defend our House Majority and show the world that House Democrats have what it takes to win even the toughest fights. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of Nov. 8th: GOP traitors & stop the radical left!
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* National: We MUST stop the “Build Back Socialist” bill!
* National: Fight vaccine mandates
* Local: Sign up for our candidate training – new price of only $39!
* Recommended Reading & Listening
* Reminders about school board webinars and defending doctors

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**National: We MUST stop the “Build Back Socialist” bill!**
Over the weekend, House Democrats did not have the votes to pass the so-called “Infrastructure” bill (really just more radical left-wing policy and spending). Instead of allowing them to fail, and thereby save America, 13 traitorous Republicans voted yes and saved the radical Biden agenda.

You see, “Infrastructure” had to pass to grease the wheels for the “Build Back Socialist” bill (also known as “Reconciliation”) to pass. We are now one step closer to that multi-trillion-dollar spending bill that contains nearly every extremist item on the Left’s wish list.

**[PLEASE CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVE THIS WEEK!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcy9maW5kLXlvdXItcmVwcmVzZW50YXRpdmU_bWlkPTQ0NTUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=9-PwqC62p3xbjgpQEDs_9g) Urge him or her to vote NO on “Reconciliation.”**

[**See our website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYWN0aW9ucy9hY3Rpb24taXRlbXMtMjAyMS0xMS04P21pZD00NDU1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVEjYnVpbGRiYWNrZGV0YWlscw&K=2Fg-9k7hq-0Y5cT_7GbQHw) for a list of crazy, left-wing policies, and to see if your Rep. is one of the 13 GOP traitors who voted for the bill.
|
---
“If there’s one thing you can count on in American politics, it’s this – radical Democrats will always fail to understand (or deliberately ignore?) the messages sent by the electorate,” writes Tea Party Patriots cofounder Jenny Beth Martin in _Townhall_.

Somebody needs to tell House Speaker Nancy Pelosi that the Democrats took a shellacking on November 2. Despite major setbacks in blue Virginia and a near-upset in New Jersey’s gubernatorial race, Pelosi is acting as if nothing happened. At least, according to Jenny Beth, that would explain why the Speaker is still trying push paid family leave back into the “Build Back Socialist” reconciliation bill.

Pelosi infamously forced through passage of Obamacare and even made her vulnerable members walk the plank to vote for a carbon tax, setting the stage for the Democrats’ 63-seat loss in the 2010 midterm elections. With the 2022 midterm elections less than a year away, Pelosi and her fellow Democrats are once again ignoring the American voters are their own peril. [The 2021 election results prove that their seats are anything but safe.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9qZW5ueWJldGhtYXJ0aW4vMjAyMS8xMS8wNC9kZXNwaXRlLWxvc3Nlcy1kZW1zLWRvdWJsZS1kb3duLW4yNTk4NTU3P21pZD00NDU1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Ytn2acq2Op9xq4uudcYbMQ)
|
---
**National: Fight vaccine mandates**
**Ask your GOP Senators to sign the Marshall Vaccine Mandate letter**
Call your Republican Senators to ask them to sign into the Marshall Vaccine Mandate Letter (unless they have already signed, then call to say thank you, the list is below). If you do not have Republican Senators, share this call to action with people you know in states that do have GOP Senators. [See this tweet about Sen. Roger Marshall’s letter.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9Db2x1bWJpYUJ1Z2xlL3N0YXR1cy8xNDU1OTc3ODY0NTc5NTAyMDg4P3M9MjAmbWlkPTQ0NTUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=cmHbQ0jevVUPMb0vYtvnyA) This commitment from Republicans would end forced vaccination, and so it is extremely important we get more senators to sign the letter.

[**See our website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYWN0aW9ucy9hY3Rpb24taXRlbXMtMjAyMS0xMS04P21pZD00NDU1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVEjbWFuZGF0ZXNkZXRhaWxz&K=B8LLjeZ8mo2jSMRv5kfkog) for more information and links about this letter, including who has signed it already, as well as social media you can share. We also have information on the website about using the Congressional Review Act to nullify the vaccine mandate.
|
---
[A recent Gallup poll shows](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9uZXdzLmdhbGx1cC5jb20vcG9sbC8zNTU4MzgvYW1lcmljYW5zLXJldmVydC1mYXZvcmluZy1yZWR1Y2VkLWdvdmVybm1lbnQtcm9sZS5hc3B4P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxlcnQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1tb3JlbGluayZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c3luZGljYXRpb24mbWlkPTQ0NTUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=1zC1_tBjd1Tz8XVR0rk1_Q) that Americans have had enough of leftist tax and spend policies after less than a year of Biden's presidency. During the pandemic last year, many voters were supportive of more government intervention, but now 52% want less.

The biggest swing is among independents who have shifted 19 points in favor of less government intervention. Additionally, most respondents think the federal government has too much power, and a plurality think the government is doing too much to regulate businesses.

Biden's efforts to regulate the economy to death are pushing voters toward small-government policies. A majority of Americans realize that to create growth, we need to unleash entrepreneurs, not smother them in red tape.
|
---
**Local: Sign up for our candidate training – new price of only $39!**
**Even if you don’t know if you want to run for school board or city council, etc., attending our one-day training will help you decide, and if you decide to run,** **you’ll be equipped to win.** You might also be a person who is going to help someone else run for office – this training is for you as well! [**Sign up today!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvY2FuZGlkYXRlLXRyYWluaW5nP21pZD00NDU1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=As6Pl3FTl5gJEaKh46wzVw)

Also, some really exciting news! A very generous donor believes this is such a worthwhile cause that the cost of the training has dropped from $79 to just $39! That $39 just allows us to break even on the cost of the venue and the food and beverages provided.

Again, you don’t have to be 100% committed to running yet. Sign up – it’s only $39 – go to the training, and see what you think when the day is over.

Lastly, do you know someone who has expressed interest in running for local office? Or, are there people in your life that you just know should run? Send them this email! **Tell them to[get signed up](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvY2FuZGlkYXRlLXRyYWluaW5nP21pZD00NDU1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=9vCkF0dWafZUfD28i1UKvw) and help save our country!**
|
---
Democrats claim that by cutting their social spending bill from $3.5 trillion to $1.75 trillion, they have moderated it. This isn't even close to true. [The bill is still chock full of extreme and radical proposals](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2J1ZGdldC1hbmQtc3BlbmRpbmcvY29tbWVudGFyeS85LWV4YW1wbGVzLXNob3ctd2h5LWRlbW9jcmF0cy1yZXZpc2VkLXNwZW5kaW5nLWJpbGwtc3RpbGwtYXdmdWw_bWlkPTQ0NTUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=UaAAnsOgpfRKE2-eAIwkKg), and still spends more money than America can afford.

The bill would fund environmental justice programs at colleges, create a backdoor to amnesty for illegal immigrants, provide subsidies to wealthy electric car owners, and mandate hiring new IRS agents. All of these programs push a leftist worldview while expanding the role of government into the private sector.

Page after page of the bill is full of these ridiculous proposals, and if Democrats somehow succeed in passing it, they will face the American people's wrath at the polls in 2022.
|
---
**Recommended Reading and Listening**
Cleta Mitchell’s podcast “Who’s Counting?” with guest Hans von Spakovsky: [Who's Counting? - Election Integrity Network (whoscounting.us)](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93aG9zY291bnRpbmcudXMvd2Nwb2RjYXN0Lz9taWQ9NDQ1NTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=FBV_cKTI6YdRFvGK70wwQg), as well as her podcast with guest Scott Walter, President of Capitol Research Center, titled, [“How Leftwing Billionaires Use Charitable Dollars for Political Purposes.”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93aG9zY291bnRpbmcudXMvMjAyMS8xMS9ob3ctbGVmdHdpbmctYmlsbGlvbmFpcmVzLXVzZS1jaGFyaXRhYmxlLWRvbGxhcnMtZm9yLXBvbGl0aWNhbC1wdXJwb3Nlcy8_bWlkPTQ0NTUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=bRHWVgZX8e6pP7qJZf4USg)

Hans von Spakovsky and John Fund’s new book is out. Order here:
[Our Broken Elections – Encounter Books](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZW5jb3VudGVyYm9va3MuY29tL2Jvb2tzL291ci1icm9rZW4tZWxlY3Rpb25zLz9taWQ9NDQ1NTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=e--9qXMK6NBiAkmVAzi3Sg)
[Our Broken Elections: How the Left Changed the Way You Vote - Kindle edition by Fund, John, Spakovsky, Hans von. After Joe Biden won Virginia by ten points in 2020, most pundits wrote off Republicans' chances in the state. They couldn't have been more wrong. Glenn Youngkin beat Terry McAuliffe in Virginia last week to win the governor's mansion. Republicans also did better than anticipated in other states, almost picking up a stunning gubernatorial victory in deep-blue New Jersey.

What the talking heads didn't anticipate is how unpopular Joe Biden's policies are with most Americans. From the botched withdrawal from Afghanistan to vaccine mandates to efforts to indoctrinate school children, Democrats are pushing unpopular and divisive policies.

If the Left continues to double down on their failed policies, [they can expect future elections to have the same results as this one](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzEyLTQ2Y2Q3ODdjMzNiNTRlMWFiNGY3MmVjM2RiZjVjM2Nh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vb3Bpbmlvbi9lbGVjdGlvbnMtZGVtb2NyYXRzLTIwMjItbGVvLXRlcnJlbGw_bWlkPTQ0NTUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=rkS71dzpYzUy1THNfrs13A). Republicans need to continue exploiting the failures of Democrats and shouldn't be afraid to push the same issues in 2022 that worked so well in 2021.

name: Great America Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6564%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=K3Qd7ZidO1UrrokCjlceFg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67833%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bhWJreXFKYfec1I6HLtuBA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67834%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8XiThHFEi2V%2fUFP5h1eXDA&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67845%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NZpMQPBVgifHMVtnthcFtg&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67846%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TSWV1U2cReb1AcGWqgtDGQ&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67846%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TSWV1U2cReb1AcGWqgtDGQ&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67847%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vwhb3AQPJT%2bKUai50PeZdA&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67848%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s1pIM3gf1IuduPe2naz7zw&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6564%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=K3Qd7ZidO1UrrokCjlceFg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6564%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=K3Qd7ZidO1UrrokCjlceFg&sysid=1)
