Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” “Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.” Outrageous! The New York Times’ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline for you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

In the next year, you can bet my multiple extremist Republican opponents and their allies will be pouring everything they’ve got into defeating me and flipping this seat red. And PA-07 isn’t the only thing on the table — Republicans know that without this seat, they have no chance at taking back control of the House of Representatives. I am determined not to let that happen, but I'll need your help. name: Ben Downing
subject: Governor Baker’s inaction on climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for By the Downing Committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38433367/315431904/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211108_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzZhNTZkOC1lNDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRxjXUnZVBcghhpyZti3t01UiyoWR_Z0ZZZBhxtF4qA=)
Team, For decades, even centuries, Black and brown residents of Massachusetts have borne a disproportionate burden of environmental harm and fossil fuel use. Communities of color and disenfranchised communities are disproportionately impacted by polluting infrastructure, which drives down air quality and drives up asthma, chronic heart disease, and other related health outcomes. This issue has only been exacerbated under the Baker Administration, which has pursued controversial projects like the Weymouth Compressor Station, Palmer Biomass site, and proposed East Boston substation. In Massachusetts, we should not have to demand the Baker-Polito Administration act with urgency around climate change. **Focus on Governor Baker’s record: If you accept the science of climate, you need to use every lever of power to eliminate fossil fuels. Permitting the Weymouth Compressor Station makes solving the climate crisis more difficult and threatens public safety.** I am proud of the incredible community leaders of Fore River Residents Against the Compressor Station (FRRACS) who are working together to shut down Enbridge’s fracked methane gas Weymouth Compressor Station on the South Shore. _It never should have been permitted in the first place_. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38433368/315431905/-778200516?refcode=AU_BBD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211108_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzZhNTZkOC1lNDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRxjXUnZVBcghhpyZti3t01UiyoWR_Z0ZZZBhxtF4qA=) I stand with FRRACS activists against the Weymouth Compressor Station and against Line 3. When I am Governor, they will always have a seat at the table. A clean energy future is safer, healthier and more secure than continuing to rely on fossil fuels. True action on environmental issues demands a proactive, comprehensive approach to solving the climate crisis. **We can’t afford four more years of Governor Baker’s inaction on climate change. Please pitch in $3 or anything you can to grow our movement to elect a Governor who understands the urgency of our climate crisis:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38433369/315431906/-778200516?express_lane=true&amount=3&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_BBD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211108_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzZhNTZkOC1lNDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRxjXUnZVBcghhpyZti3t01UiyoWR_Z0ZZZBhxtF4qA=)

clean_body: | = Team, For decades, even centuries, Black and brown residents of Massachusetts have borne a disproportionate burden of environmental harm and fossil fuel use. Communities of color and disenfranchised communities are disproportionately impacted by polluting infrastructure, which drives down air quality and drives up asthma, chronic heart disease, and other related health outcomes. This issue has only been exacerbated under the Baker Administration, which has pursued controversial projects like the Weymouth Compressor Station, Palmer Biomass site, and proposed East Boston substation. In Massachusetts, we should not have to demand the Baker-Polito Administration act with urgency around climate change. Focus on Governor Baker’s record: If you accept the science of climate, you need to use every lever of power to eliminate fossil fuels. Permitting the Weymouth Compressor Station makes solving the climate crisis more difficult and threatens public safety. I am proud of the incredible community leaders of Fore River Residents Against the Compressor Station (FRRACS) who are working together to shut down Enbridge’s fracked methane gas Weymouth Compressor Station on the South Shore. It never should have been permitted in the first place. = I stand with FRRACS activists against the Weymouth Compressor Station and against Line 3. When I am Governor, they will always have a seat at the table. A clean energy future is safer, healthier and more secure than continuing to rely on fossil fuels. True action on environmental issues demands a proactive, comprehensive approach to solving the climate crisis. We can’t afford four more years of Governor Baker’s inaction on climate change. Please pitch in $3 or anything you can to grow our movement to elect a Governor who understands the urgency of our climate crisis: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Truly grateful for your support. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P
body:
There’s no such a thing as a safe Democratic seat in 2022

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38433715/315433370/-1119657662?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmZhN2FiMC1lNjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9uIWWs_WX5Ke6qqtN0T-6rwVZGZXSuNzrdeVFk7KLrs=)
---
Peter, this is really important.

In light of _devastating_ Democratic losses and close-calls in Virginia and New Jersey, I’m calling on 600 Democrats to step up and help protect our House majority.

[**So, Peter, before midnight, will you submit your feedback and take my November Campaign Strategy Survey? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38433716/315433371/-503061624?refcode=TCFC_20211108_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmZhN2FiMC1lNjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9uIWWs_WX5Ke6qqtN0T-6rwVZGZXSuNzrdeVFk7KLrs=&emci=4a5879ac-783e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=02fa7ab0-e640-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=19912009) | [**600 DEMOCRATS NEEDED:** TAKE THE STRATEGY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38433717/315433372/-503061624?refcode=TCFC_20211108_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmZhN2FiMC1lNjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9uIWWs_WX5Ke6qqtN0T-6rwVZGZXSuNzrdeVFk7KLrs=&emci=4a5879ac-783e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=02fa7ab0-e640-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=19912009)
---
What happened in Virginia and New Jersey is a powerful reminder: There is no such thing as a safe seat for Democrats in 2022.

**But hope isn’t completely lost:** If we work like never before to get big-ticket legislation passed and crystallize our plan to defend House Democrats, _we’ll be able to hold onto our Majority in 2022._

So I need your input now -- _planning a winning strategy will take time and a lot of forethought._

I have to ask again: [**Will you take my November Campaign Strategy Survey and help protect House Democrats up and down the ballot? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38433718/315433373/-503061624?refcode=TCFC_20211108_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmZhN2FiMC1lNjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9uIWWs_WX5Ke6qqtN0T-6rwVZGZXSuNzrdeVFk7KLrs=&emci=4a5879ac-783e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=02fa7ab0-e640-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=19912009)
[TAKE THE STRATEGY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38433719/315433374/-503061624?refcode=TCFC_20211108_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmZhN2FiMC1lNjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9uIWWs_WX5Ke6qqtN0T-6rwVZGZXSuNzrdeVFk7KLrs=&emci=4a5879ac-783e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=02fa7ab0-e640-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=19912009)
---
I’ll be reviewing responses tomorrow night -- so please respond immediately.

_\-- Tony Cárdenas_

clean_body: There’s no such a thing as a safe Democratic seat in 2022 | = Peter, this is really important. In light of devastating Democratic losses and close-calls in Virginia and New Jersey, I’m calling on 600 Democrats to step up and help protect our House majority. | What happened in Virginia and New Jersey is a powerful reminder: There is no such thing as a safe seat for Democrats in 2022. But hope isn’t completely lost: If we work like never before to get big-ticket legislation passed and crystallize our plan to defend House Democrats, we’ll be able to hold onto our Majority in 2022. So I need your input now -- planning a winning strategy will take time and a lot of forethought. I have to ask again: I’ll be reviewing responses tomorrow night -- so please respond immediately. \-- Tony Cárdenas | | Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P.O. Box 15320, Washington, DC 20003 www.tonycardenas.com Democrat Tony Cárdenas is a father, husband, second-generation immigrant, and a champion in Congress for working families. name: Blake Masters for Senate
subject: Masters: The Rundown 11/8
body:
Update from the Masters campaign trail
---
| | | | | | Blake Masters for Senate | November 8, 2021
---
|
---
| The Rundown
---
| Welcome to The Rundown! You'll receive monthly updates from Blake Masters' campaign & a roundup of our national media coverage.
Counting down: We're exactly one year out from the General Election.
---
| | | [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF0lwBWQa2uLKdK_A9swBXgQogWE92COPicFMvvT6blmO2po8hrUrxY1GgAjiBRqK23LZHc0c6cjakCm7HCinbobOEObPP43ipw==&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==)
---
| | |
---
| From the Trail
---
Blake has spoken at dozens of rallies, clubs, & living room meet-and-greets across Arizona:
---
| | |
---
Blake addresses the Pima County Young Republicans
---
| | |
---
Blake speaking to a packed crowd at PebbleCreek
---
| | |
---
| National Endorsements
Blake has pulled in some huge national endorsements from respected figures!
President Trump's national security advisor [Robert O'Brien declared](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSFwx4oIRFPzpgrYJgRivyjdRukk7vVTWPr_VxSq1ro9UR7wYgDnB4vPWQ2dYVrdoDTpcgYhMUa_GwY0v7aZAgX_syTrRDr_2zdFm5vk2KUBYzwzJSaiLzReXq0TK9BQI3O2Scq5OLuRQ7YF4mwxozMdisC8uUfuXzXQ==&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==), "If we want bold solutions we need a new generation of leaders like Blake in office."
Republican Study Committee Chairman [Congressman Jim Banks](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSFwx4oIRFPzpgC4S_QjFHvSRyoAxn79D29hcXcEoj6IhusKp6v4nGTkWoBVOF40WQYjcDI6yN4YAGUTXLUhcNwpJWKyexr71fRoNRI8Z-9gmDaFj180yFoasCpHWCH59MoSG_G8zf46A9zsP8NaHP5V4iY_WggNgQI-86eycCFsLqbCzg6ayNG7D71DtaKQSj4X_mMYqieNKp7wSsabFh0NqW0DappIzLYA==&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) explains his support for Blake: "He is pro-worker, pro-family, and America First."
Over the summer, [Tucker Carlson voiced](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF9ltpoz8fVPUr59GG-idlr_EXH3755A3dDVo-BkhAphXlCyDizvTOJxAAX25V1dzxn4H_Tvmm6Ukq1Sb5eNdzsYnvhUo6CFe_Fhb9kf71ej3QSfQutYGLE0mATZ41W_sow7cC8WZkpiEO6DrY2kt_96T5VWYbJYTTEGP-DKFLvE_&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) his support for Blake: "I can't understate how much I'm rooting for you."
Major Media
Blake sat down for an [interview with the Stanford Review](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF0lwBWQa2uLKXGfjXPaMrPcnCii8GtlcPFjRyoZvtc5k0uvi1T0H1vjLJl_Krv8vpZxeRKDrB0-6jN1MxLu3OVMa3usd9JVdIbnR1L1shetJvjaiKyama85X8-qSWokSgp2q-_hfQvsP&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) where he discusses his career in Silicon Valley and why he's running for Senate.
Dave Rubin had Blake on [the Rubin Report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF9ltpoz8fVPUQPnie-tMfgdOut6rvYoclUvFG70KBVPRkzpocPgml6VCcJ9nFZj_O68a0vDQGiWCs_0gh5OfblBTYSiKsoNgOuGHKvUG2m50pWEe5YJeyyXyRxvwU0vOfFFnqny26zhYLSH38-fsSN-ojdWDnXM17Q==&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==). They discussed the major issues we face, including the threats posed by China and Big Tech.
Blake went on [Varney & Co](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSFwx4oIRFPzpgB9jNHZ2mSvgDl53zyS-2shoIGK-y3l12KuYlribtHVy3nM8Ou4BkwnIx_Tg_DNHeovUkbJU99Xuiv-xC_M6TgfSna2Fflm57DzbPte5Iz4s6hjPP3igc3xsH4IBi-e7fswk7PFrHVA4=&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) to discuss the border crisis. Blake sharply criticized Joe Biden for abandoning the successful border and immigration policies of the Trump Administration.
On One America News Network, Blake went on [Tipping Point](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF2BO1WtgqqMd_aM2NATEWOfST8qXY6fGW6YIaxfHzbrepnV9mZnuXcsNUz3bb4yau57sV2B0poVlzBDRdbzEQHiFC1rOusj1lYkrLMtPeAlq6cNxej1LgVSIZ0QB52-D0iEWc4o5O4jgMLRePTuXn0gMH6QtpSESLOKqXK1R8sD1UPqu_U7EiqrmRtAA_zSaP_Fw5bFykDYg&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) to talk about Biden's plan to give illegal immigrants massive handouts.
Blake joined the[ Ben Shapiro Show](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF9ltpoz8fVPU4cPASzWAWCqOPcx5rbXzp56gn5zeKhdRUm-hIpLDeK02zaXQHxq_fHhYwjvkAtHVpfJt-8QS_hjGoqfBvb3QnV3YnlZ9AqbUj6M508VWiXPD8PsPuX-CnM_0wXz0Vj_ic8n5P14jRqVMPMz49HIW6g==&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) to talk about the state of his race and the biggest problems facing the country.
On [Tucker Carlson Tonight](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF9ltpoz8fVPUfSG21LoCDgbPJVbSHS7AlECEWhrVYABNamKASc1AcCh1ZG86WDfP4C4X9t4lsqb9yVNgtW57hgqSETe7i3CQtp8wEKDQ5-Xp39k_inbYVNAAHRVc6cUW8f1KNj9WIRlLDYqA7Qy8vvvRq6qUn1eWO6a2cHV7D8W8aP0cGisCWfs=&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==), Blake took on Critical Race Theory, labeling it "evil and toxic." He described local school board meetings, full of concerned parents, that he's attended in Tucson.
Recent Writing
Blake wrote an [op-ed in the Wall Street Journal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF0lwBWQa2uLKKPHll_PmFMQRDLvxG0auw7Ol-JG3RD9AsgrsNChKY3kcpq1K-fq5K3O0zyZD1EQczOnOQ2MCnlNKjJVxfxG96ntBQw5p-LvVnsvHG6e9r8uGsDYpLeNXMK5xBt4xaye6_BCHGPkDGmhRmCCubGo0k7RVk94ywTSEw9YimPU5rdnu3jZERFoDATtKIcvG-yVbqIIH3iE0JgbKYHJiPvbXTADU7IH0iKGjNuNgT7BK_m5ArJe3KiB_MSzpT1lmZYmbWk0q7OIQOMQ=&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) calling for much needed regulation of Big Tech, laying out the dangers and steps that can be taken.
Blake co-wrote a huge [op-ed in the New York Post](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSFwx4oIRFPzpg5BpIX8m8EB4Txugkv0duiH2Bd0JuKEz-AcTrSkifBpG8iILsT7loLQwqcKJUotQbi7u52kVp8hQJivk1J4y20K2WQ7IeN3dLK-SIkxYOr6M9Zr2hMrhwOYKIi38P9iEk2SqUnvuG1Nv0bhAs4wqWJPt_C278lWtSrW-BWwX6ewc5IqVasQQ48A==&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) on the ways that Big Tech--and Mark Zuckerberg in particular--handed the 2020 election to Joe Biden.

---
| Voters love meeting the Masters family
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF0lwBWQa2uLKjQoJiItoZmIbIhJ9hawGjG0sariTAJYKzeY04Qv2NAkMFHEvLKuCFIh-rRHF6BC6pZTjas1cCmpc7SiAn7CmKLdfMBhof6lRpsxmG3HDGjI=&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF0lwBWQa2uLKSXLhh3e5B_wWVpzoU063IuMc_uMrx0lx5B7poAsvKUmYMKuqIlXp1Rc54Vhfg4s6AL89baiWN7gal2cGCy-4HA==&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012fdEK1N4q_CVJ8VDZsk46Nns2I5PJysQUcqJYP4REzur8z2t2QZSF0lwBWQa2uLKKQQooUvT0iALnryF17ouPDheSWhlOfFPek7QyAb3wCT4Yk2-6mvo4RDt5qjT1jmi_Rcqe91PTsZPXLJxxBYFHNq96boBMZLz&c=Uu5WQiPPH9oYzMG1kHfCck8tswLoZfP07iOAYfFfzE3srSA5RHoPCA==&ch=17kUedrpvBwmX7mTxH9cq_YnbSDzUSzjPxQWxlFurNsgtans8yGiFA==)

name: Hattie Stockton, Finance Assistant
subject: PLEASE NOTE: Upcoming Events for Tiffany Shedd for AG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:

From fighting back against the Trump administration to protecting our voting rights—Indivisible has been at the frontlines of defending our democracy. Indivisible knows firsthand what it means to hold leaders accountable to the people they’re elected to serve, and I couldn’t think of a better partner for our grassroots, people-powered campaign. ******[We are less than 7 months out from Primary Day. clean_body: Their first 2022 endorsement announcement! | | | Team, If you have joined us in the fight to hold members of Congress accountable in Chicago, you know that Indivisible is an organizing powerhouse. From fighting back against the Trump administration to protecting our voting rights—Indivisible has been at the frontlines of defending our democracy. As a lifelong organizer myself, I’m honored to have received their National endorsement in this race. Indivisible knows firsthand what it means to hold leaders accountable to the people they’re elected to serve, and I couldn’t think of a better partner for our grassroots, people-powered campaign. **** This is the moment IL-7 has waited for, for far too long. Change is coming. ** Team, we are building a true grassroots coalition to bring change to IL-7, and Indivisible National is joining, the Illinois Youth Climate Movement, 14th Ward IPO, Women’s March Illinois, Black Lives Matter Women of Faith, Oak Park Sunrise Movement, Youth Committee 4 Change, Northside DFA, Western Springs Indivisible, Elect Black Women PAC, Way to Lead PAC, Justice Democrats, and For the People PAC. The people are with us! Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Hi there --
This is Jordan from Republican Headquarters. I heard my colleague, Sarah, reached out to you a few times. He just announced his new app for freedom-loving Patriots. _Almost_ everyone seems to be THRILLED to sign up. But as of 9:00 AM, we DO NOT have a response from you. So I'm touching base one last time: Do you plan on signing up?

President Trump is building a platform for proud American Patriots like you and me. He promised: ✖️ No Conservative censorship ✖️ No shadow bans ✖️ No blacklists. It's incredible!

Chuck Grassley (R), Democrat Abby Finkenauer launched her campaign – giving Democrats the best chance in decades to flip this Senate seat blue. BUT THEN: The campaign arm of the Senate Republicans is sitting on more than $27 million in the bank to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and try to dismantle Democrats' Senate majority. NOW: Abby still needsto raise another $10,000 before midnight tonight to keep pace with November's grassroots fundraising. With Senate control split 50-50, every single seat is indispensable when it comes to protecting our Democratic majority. We are counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us fight back against GOP spending and help Abby win! Remember this, Peter: If Abby defeats Sen. body:
It’s official, friend. Ron DeSantis has officially filed to run for re-election.
We need to fight back NOW. Our team set an urgent goal of raising $10,000 online TODAY to counter DeSantis’ momentum. Click here to RUSH a contribution of $5 or more right now →

Team, DeSantis has been raising ~$5 million per month into his political committee. We can expect his fundraising will kick into an even higher gear after this announcement.

The country’s top Republican donors are already bankrolling DeSantis’ re-election campaign, and we know he’ll spend $150 million on his reelection campaign.

That’s why we can’t delay in fighting back with grassroots support from you. Help us reach our URGENT $10,000 online fundraising goal by clicking here to make a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=desantisreelection]

| In just one year, we're replacing Nancy Pelosi and her far-left allies in the House with a new guard that's going to put America First in President Trump's vision.
[Is that a mission you can get behind?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001enFbDVYMCKByth8s_0GTz64qAoSKWnvnDu1C6b_f4qTc4TLsgKIqhGmr5LYwFJnswWiKM2x8fDRJgKquOThHYKwWARJDii1_EN3-iUNc1uch6w8bbpxrCm6GvulQE1zEZgUp5cmWtvZUrX9MyceuqquZNhzCBWVcqFB3GnOxO6_7VQnl1246fA==&c=pIljOzENoqDygejuSLhrSaDWWovRN77Mox_eAsFYjyE4wIvlWI0rDQ==&ch=vw85YKn3qjsVVVyULWQJMvlDG_Wlh-Jd_gCoTUuPu__VjLCoGG0JPA==)
If so, America First needs a groundswell of grassroots support to kickstart this 365-Day Countdown. We need to make sure that November 8, 2022 is an overwhelming victory for OUR movement - not for the Deep State, the globalists, and the mainstream media that are all pushing for us to fail!
Will you help elect more America FIRST Republicans like Matt Gaetz - not more Liz Cheney RINOs - so that we can actually push back against the forces that want to erase our movement?
---

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Thank you, Virginia.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
Let's get to work

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719217:JET7y92jN:m:1:3298722022:26067F58BFCCBF0AA08CAE3433EAD0D6:r)
---
Peter,

Virginia, we did it. None of this would have been possible without YOU. I am so incredibly thankful and blessed for each and every one of you. _**We won this, and we won this together!**_

Day one, we are going to get to work. We are going to restore excellence in our schools, invest in the largest education budget in the history of the Commonwealth, EMBRACE our parents, not ignore them, reduce our cost of living, and cut taxes on the retirement income of our Veterans.

We are going to keep our communities SAFE - we will stand up for Law Enforcement. We are jump-starting our jobs and reinvigorating our economy. **Most importantly,** Virginia will be OPEN for business.

My team and I have already set up a game plan, but to achieve that we have to start NOW. We have no time to waste. We need to start off strong going into Day One. | | [**START DAY ONE STRONG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719217:JET7y92jN:m:1:3298722022:26067F58BFCCBF0AA08CAE3433EAD0D6:r)
---
It's time for Virginia to be the place where everyone wants to live, not leave. Together, we will change the trajectory of the Commonwealth, and we are starting that transformation on DAY ONE!

**There is no time to wait; we work in REAL time, not Government time.** Let's keep this momentum going.

| [$15](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58719218:JET7y92jN:m:1:3298722022:26067F58BFCCBF0AA08CAE3433EAD0D6:r "YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC")

Because of your support, we will be able to start Day One off strong. We aren't going to wait until January, we are going to start now.

God Bless you, and God Bless the Commonwealth of Virginia.

**Let 's GO and let's get to work!**

For Virginia,

Friend,

DeWine is gaslighting YOU.

All 8 of his school board appointees support Critical Race Theory.

He says he supports President Trump but then bends the knee to Biden, allowing nearly two-thirds of Ohio's school districts to require masks.

When the National School Boards Association accused Ohio parents of “heinous actions”, “inciting chaos”, “hate crimes,” and “domestic terrorism,” DeWine remained silent. When they requested the Department of Justice, F.B.I., and the Secret Service to be called in to silence parents, DeWine did nothing.

DeWine is a wimp who is unable to fully defend our freedoms. Ohio deserves a real leader.

I’m running for Governor to fire DeWine and restore your God given right to raise your children as you see fit. I need your help to make that happen. Please consider donating today so we can protect our children and put Ohio First.

subject: Fall Updates from the 5th District
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/spartzforcongress/fall-updates-from-the-5th-district?e=57d5bacdc3)
---
|
---
[](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=4426217373&e=57d5bacdc3)
|
---
Good Afternoon —After the recent election of Governor-elect Glenn Youngkin in Virginia, it’s clear that the **RED WAVE IS COMING**! The conservative cause around the country is alive and well!
[](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=20b1dd7726&e=57d5bacdc3)
|
---
# Fighting For You: Town Halls
I’ve noticed that the issues important in the Virginia race are also important here at home. In the town halls that I’ve held in September and October, the feedback has been consistent and clear:
### We want Washington OUT of State and Local decision making.
From [**vaccine mandates**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=9086859c04&e=57d5bacdc3) to [**IRS overreach**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=1ce98b6beb&e=57d5bacdc3), Washington needs to stop dictating how Hoosiers need to live their lives — and I plan to use my vote in Congress to defend those freedoms.
_Listening sessions so far have been held in Anderson, Arcadia, Carmel, Cicero, Elwood, Fishers, Gas City, Greentown, Indianapolis, Marion, Noblesville, Tipton, Westfield, and Zionsville with more to come!_
|
---
# Deeper Dive: School Boards
Parents have made it clear that they want meaningful input in the education of their children. As a mom of two young girls — **I couldn’t agree more**.**My Perspective:** Too many school boards are wrongly limiting interaction between them and the people they represent. I believe that all elected and appointed officials, at every level, should be held accountable for the votes they make and outcomes they create.**What I’m doing about it:** [**Attorney General Garland inappropriately directed the FBI**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=d212371619&e=57d5bacdc3) to intervene on behalf of the school boards as they restrict interaction with the people they represent.
* Both in [**a letter directly to the Attorney General**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=0bc8f001c3&e=57d5bacdc3), and [**in-person at a Judiciary hearing**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=e8058f0215&e=57d5bacdc3) last month, I confronted the Attorney General about this overreach.
* Actions like these make the [**FBI resemble the old KBG that I grew up under in the Soviet Union**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=a37412e5ea&e=57d5bacdc3) and overstep the Justice Department’s role and authority.
* I also pressed the Attorney General on actions to protect the Second Amendment, prevent FISA overreach, and reign in threats to the country from our botched policies on the southern border and Afghanistan withdrawal.

**Why action matters:** Congress **must** hold the Biden Administration accountable. I will continue to push for answers on your behalf and demand respect for the rule of law at all levels of government.
[](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=fa83211c6d&e=57d5bacdc3)
|
---
# New: 5th District Lines Redrawn
Every ten years, each state must redistrict their congressional lines based on population. In the next election cycle, I’ll be running in a [**newly-drawn 5th District**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=9d6d624f9c&e=57d5bacdc3). In the last few months I’ve been able to hear from you at the:
* [**Young Republicans meetup in Marion County**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=d02ecf5ecd&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**Howard County GOP**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=ef944a3939&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**James Dean Parade in Grant County**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=56ba1b6051&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**Tipton County Pork Festival**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=f4fa5bc67a&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**Madison County Lincoln Day Dinner**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=bc59d104e9&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**Westfield GOP meeting in Hamilton County**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=5a89e450cf&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**My Birthday Celebration**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=ca935e24bf&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**Frankton Heritage Days Parade in Madison County**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=9d955fa32b&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**Jim Banks’ Annual BBQ**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=78101c2a6e&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**Swayzee Days in Grant County**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=818fc83001&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**Zionsville Fall Festival in Boone County**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=138acf0fba&e=57d5bacdc3)
* [**Upland Labor Day Parade in Grant County**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=ffd48aa919&e=57d5bacdc3)

A special thank you to the [**Delaware County GOP**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=d36573d3c4&e=57d5bacdc3) for welcoming me to the county — new to my district in ‘23!
[](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=fc72c29c11&e=57d5bacdc3)
| [See the new maps →](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=5b1fbd86ad&e=57d5bacdc3)
---
|
---
# Accomplishments: Legislation I Pushed Through Congress Becomes Law
Last month, I worked with my colleagues to push the Consider Teachers Act of 2021 through the House, Senate, and across Biden’s desk to become law.**What this legislation accomplishes:** [**WSCH in Lawrenceburg**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=bb8901a2b2&e=57d5bacdc3) shared more about the law’s passage and said that the legislation fixes “a broken system burdening teachers with unfair loans, passed the U.S. House of Representatives today.”**Why the legislation is necessary:** According to WSCH, “The TEACH Grant program provides grant assistance to students who serve four years as a full time teacher in high-need, often underserved communities.”
* “However, often due to basic clerical mistakes, thousands of teachers have found their grants converted into loans that must be paid back with interest.”
* “The Consider Teachers Act aims to fix this broken system permanently, and provides extra time for teachers to complete service requirements due to the coronavirus pandemic.”

**My view:** “As a mother and educator, I understand the importance of strong teachers for high quality learning,” said Congresswoman Victoria Spartz. “I was happy to join my Senate and House colleagues in leading the Consider Teachers Act, which clarifies and streamlines some processes for the TEACH Grant program.”
| [Read More on the Consider Teachers Act →](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=14500763b5&e=57d5bacdc3)
---
|
---
# Biden Failure: Americans Remain Abandoned in Afghanistan
I think it’s **unconscionable** that the Biden Administration left Americans on the ground in Afghanistan when handing over the country to the Taliban.
* In the process, there were hundreds of Americans left behind, including Hoosiers that are still in need of evacuation.
* Since August 1st, **I**[**’ve sent three letters to President Biden and Secretary of State Blinken**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=5c9dccd1c9&e=57d5bacdc3) demanding that they assist a Hoosier that I’ve been in touch with in need of rescue.

I commit to you, and to the Hoosiers abandoned in Afghanistan, that I will not stop until they are home safe.
[](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=2d18adf324&e=57d5bacdc3)
| [See My Latest Letter to Biden →](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=809e57cec5&e=57d5bacdc3)
---
|
---
# The Red Wave Is Coming!
As your congresswoman, my priority is to pass constitutionally conservative legislation important to Indiana and the residents of the 5th District. This just isn’t possible with the legislative process championed by Speaker Pelosi.That’s why I’m working with [**my colleagues in the Party**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=fead540cc1&e=57d5bacdc3) to elect **more** **common sense republicans** around the country to tackle important issues like our growing national debt and porous southern border — issues Speaker Pelosi and her caucus are simply unwilling to tackle.
|
---
# Help Me Retire Speaker Pelosi!
With recent Republican gains in Virginia, it’s clear that the out-of-touch policies of the Left are not what the country wants. Help me elect more constitutionally conservative members and bring our party back into the majority!
| [Donate Today →](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=fe79659f29&e=57d5bacdc3)
---
|
---

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38435320/315440270/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDg5ZGY4Mi1lZDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CM5NYfbQMPylemCPfBrCy35JPQo-wr35o0hb9QfWsb4=)
In August we passed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act in the Senate and this weekend our colleagues in the House voted to send it to President Biden for his signature. Coloradans spoke and I listened. Colorado alone has 481 bridges and more than 3,600 miles of highway in poor condition. We need to fix our roads, expand access to broadband, revive good-paying jobs, and fight climate change. This bill achieved this and more with bipartisan support. Take a look:
* The largest single federal investment in American history to expand broadband coverage across the state, consistent with my bipartisan BRIDGE Act.
* Funding to repair and rebuild roads and bridges across our state.
* The Carbon Capture Improvement Act that I introduced to help finance carbon capture projects as part of our goal to boost our clean energy economy and reduce carbon pollution.
* Robust funding to improve Tribal access to clean water, consistent with my Tribal Access to Clean Water Act.

This historic investment in our roads, bridges, water infrastructure, and the high-speed broadband Coloradans need to compete in the 21st century is just a first step. I’m working to pass policies to support our children and hard-working families, address the threat of climate change, restore our Western forests and watersheds, mitigate the risk of wildfires, and expand access to health care. **The work is far from done but your support today makes continued progress possible, so I’m asking: Please donate $10 — or what works for you — to help defend this seat so we can continue this fight.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38435322/315440272/-1836949484?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211108_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDg5ZGY4Mi1lZDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CM5NYfbQMPylemCPfBrCy35JPQo-wr35o0hb9QfWsb4=)****

clean_body: | = In August we passed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act in the Senate and this weekend our colleagues in the House voted to send it to President Biden for his signature. Coloradans spoke and I listened. Colorado alone has 481 bridges and more than 3,600 miles of highway in poor condition. We need to fix our roads, expand access to broadband, revive good-paying jobs, and fight climate change. This bill achieved this and more with bipartisan support. Take a look: The largest single federal investment in American history to expand broadband coverage across the state, consistent with my bipartisan BRIDGE Act. Funding to repair and rebuild roads and bridges across our state. The Carbon Capture Improvement Act that I introduced to help finance carbon capture projects as part of our goal to boost our clean energy economy and reduce carbon pollution. Robust funding to improve Tribal access to clean water, consistent with my Tribal Access to Clean Water Act. This historic investment in our roads, bridges, water infrastructure, and the high-speed broadband Coloradans need to compete in the 21st century is just a first step. I’m working to pass policies to support our children and hard-working families, address the threat of climate change, restore our Western forests and watersheds, mitigate the risk of wildfires, and expand access to health care. The work is far from done but your support today makes continued progress possible, so I’m asking: Please donate $10 — or what works for you — to help defend this seat so we can continue this fight. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= I look forward to building on this historic investment by passing legislation that delivers for Coloradans, and for Americans nationwide and I thank you for your continued support as I continue to serve in the Senate. — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: LBR
subject: Infrastructure week ✔️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Last week, my colleagues and I voted to pass the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, a bipartisan framework of investments in America’s crumbling infrastructure.

This is what delivering on a campaign promise looks like. Rush a $5 donation right now to make sure that we keep a Democratic majority in Congress so we can keep fighting for the American people.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_november?refcode=EM_FR_211108infastructure_hill_lbr_90D_7_ng_na_text

The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act is a critical step in making long-overdue investments to existing infrastructure in Delaware and across the nation. That’s why I was proud to cast my vote to pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Agreement, while also voting to advance the transformative Build Back Better Act.

These funds will allow Delaware to make historic improvements to its surface transportation and highway infrastructure as well as its broadband and clean water initiatives throughout the state.

I’m proud to have worked alongside Senator Carper and Senator Coons to get the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act bill over the finish line and onto President Biden’s desk for signature, and I look forward to passing the Build Back Better Act.

This is just step one, and this wouldn’t have happened without the support of hard-working Americans like you.

I’m going to need your help in the next year to make sure that we keep the Democratic majority in Congress -- can you chip in $5 right now to make sure my campaign has the resources to keep Delaware blue?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_november?refcode=EM_FR_211108infastructure_hill_lbr_90D_7_ng_na_text

Thank you for your support,

LBR

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_november?refcode=EM_FR_211108infastructure_hill_lbr_90D_7_ng_na_text]

Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress

Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

name: Charlie Crist
subject: a story about my grandfather, opportunity, and Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
my story is an American story |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38435616/315441621/-1091140578?refcode=20211108_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRjMTc0OC1lZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iueGOnLHtsuXk3MfcAxE7lPUW7WqkoYGnCcB58RQsE=)
---
Friend, my story is a story about opportunity.

My grandfather immigrated to the United States in 1914 from the island of Cyprus. Though he arrived on Ellis Island with only pennies in his pocket, he was full of determination to succeed in his new country. He started out making five dollars a month shining shoes and then cleaned clothes for years so that my father, Charles Crist, Sr., could go to college and become a doctor, ultimately raising four kids.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38435617/315441622/-1091140578?refcode=20211108_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRjMTc0OC1lZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iueGOnLHtsuXk3MfcAxE7lPUW7WqkoYGnCcB58RQsE=)
---
When I was three, my parents moved to St. Pete, and I grew up attending public schools in Florida’s “Sunshine City.” In high school I was the starting quarterback for our football team, and I later played football at Wake Forest University before transferring to Florida State.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38435618/315441623/-1091140578?refcode=20211108_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRjMTc0OC1lZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iueGOnLHtsuXk3MfcAxE7lPUW7WqkoYGnCcB58RQsE=)
---
After college, I earned my law degree and started my career. Over the years, I’ve had the honor of serving my fellow Floridians as state senator, attorney general, governor, and congressman -- but I’ve never forgotten that I stand on the shoulders of giants.

I often stop to think about all the opportunities provided to my grandfather, an immigrant to this country who didn’t speak English. And I also think about the values my mom and dad taught me right here in Pinellas County.

**[These opportunities and values are unique to our Florida, and I’m running for governor to protect and expand upon them for future generations -- to build a Florida for All! Will you join with us in that effort by donating today to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38435619/315441624/-1091140578?refcode=20211108_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRjMTc0OC1lZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iueGOnLHtsuXk3MfcAxE7lPUW7WqkoYGnCcB58RQsE=)**

Thanks for reading,
Charlie Crist

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38435620/315441625/-1091140578?refcode=20211108_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRjMTc0OC1lZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iueGOnLHtsuXk3MfcAxE7lPUW7WqkoYGnCcB58RQsE=)
---

name: Patty Murray (D-WA)
subject: One year from now it’s all on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Will you become a Founding Donor to my 2022 campaign?
#
Peter,
**It’s hard to believe, but as of today _we are only 365 days away_ from Election Day.**
That means we have one year to do everything we can to stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate.
We saw last week, in states like New Jersey and Virginia, that Democrats can’t take anything for granted. And you better believe that Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP aren’t wasting a minute. They know they only need to flip _ONE SEAT_ in 2022 in order to take back the Senate majority and now have the momentum on their side.
**[We have one year to make sure we’re ready to win this fight, Peter. Will you become a Founding Donor to my 2022 campaign and contribute $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38435621/315441735/677971007?refcode=pm_em_211108_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MThkNWM1OC1lZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDSiAQlrbY7cV9zW6C2FLF61IeVxUnl12nQ0sfK1yb4=)**
Voters want to see results. Which is why I’m working as hard as I can with Senate Democrats to deliver for families in Washington state and across the country. We’ve made another historic step to create jobs and strengthen our economy with the bipartisan infrastructure bill, and I am fighting every day to get Build Back Better over the finish line too to help lower families’ costs for child care, health care, take climate action, and continue tax cuts for working families. But we know the Republicans are eagerly waiting for the chance to roll back our progress. We can’t give them that opportunity. We need to be ready to fight back and win.
**I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help fuel this fight until Election Day:**
**[Pitch in $5 now, become a Founding Donor, and help me keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38435622/315441736/677971007?refcode=pm_em_211108_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MThkNWM1OC1lZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDSiAQlrbY7cV9zW6C2FLF61IeVxUnl12nQ0sfK1yb4=)**
Thank you,
Patty
** **
** **

clean_body: Will you become a Founding Donor to my 2022 campaign? Peter, It’s hard to believe, but as of today we are only 365 days away from Election Day. That means we have one year to do everything we can to stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. We saw last week, in states like New Jersey and Virginia, that Democrats can’t take anything for granted. And you better believe that Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP aren’t wasting a minute. They know they only need to flip ONE SEAT in 2022 in order to take back the Senate majority and now have the momentum on their side. = Voters want to see results. Which is why I’m working as hard as I can with Senate Democrats to deliver for families in Washington state and across the country. We’ve made another historic step to create jobs and strengthen our economy with the bipartisan infrastructure bill, and I am fighting every day to get Build Back Better over the finish line too to help lower families’ costs for child care, health care, take climate action, and continue tax cuts for working families. But we know the Republicans are eagerly waiting for the chance to roll back our progress. We can’t give them that opportunity. We need to be ready to fight back and win. I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help fuel this fight until Election Day: = Thank you, Patty **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Hi Friend -- ONE YEAR from today, Wisconsinites will go to the polls and determine who will serve the state of Wisconsin for the next four years. **2022 is right around the corner, and we have to do everything we can to elect a Republican governor and senator.** [**Will you chip in $20.22 to help us prepare?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVJFpStSBn4tnZGVf1L3QK1l3LKS9AJjAzWac4uhesG8I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1yearout_3&n=2) As the past two years have shown, the Democrats have no problem infringing on the liberties of Wisconsinites. Tony Evers and his cronies allowed for chaos to ensue and unemployment claims to pile up, all while he continued to hide in Madison. Liberals have continued to align themselves with toxic socialist policies. There is so much at stake in this election, and we have to make sure that Republicans emerge victorious next year. As we saw in 2020, the Democrats know that Wisconsin is a top target and funding from Hollywood elites and coastal liberals will continue to pour into our state -- **and they’re shaking in their boots after the red wave that started last week**. **We’re prepared to fight hard for Republicans up and down the ballot, but we can’t do it without your help!** [**Please pitch in $20.22, $40.44, $60.66, or $80.88 now to make sure Wisconsin stays red!**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVJFpStSBn4tnZGVf1L3QK1l3LKS9AJjAzWac4uhesG8I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1yearout_3&n=3) The election results in Virginia proved that there is a movement happening across America. We need to make sure we seize on the moment to make sure we deliver Republican victories up and down the ballot a year from now. Can you chip in? Sincerely, Mark Jefferson
Executive Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin P.S. Don’t sit this one out! name: Mark Meuser
subject: You may not be first, but you won’t escape this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
I have never seen something as egregious as the vaccine mandate that the federal government is forcing on us. |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=febbb99733ff4911853d9c514b5f2ec5&_e=bzZEX-yuLbCPcjlAGEKvwC5pnkheVbgvd-T4M0tf5MbgEsp3W5hC0Bkbw874qVqxNsBn05gAxfGfAr6-oI4J9DshIZIUkxy0ZuiCpOi7YXJSOufJO5exIMU8rTTc_qfCdhJzBkXJhIQE6IKlXK8-aLABHUR5IgJZQeKJVhLzVg-VEN5Sqej9NVhr7INHk2IWExCKbmxnVa5_wONLGTTJJ0eWQHNojbfcWbd7rUGgNcg0jkNmMe8Z4K81M9y0Ux09kTxY2nsGiRtEJ9JWGuhQD1MALNk2gFMrngxeETh7rCLDL9NPa1ptXHZhilDHF9u8OaG6cWEiKW6HhEkDvNxDaw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I'm a constitutional law attorney. I spend every day reviewing constitutional violations and filing complaints to protect our inalienable rights as Americans. **But I have never seen something as egregious as the vaccine mandate that the federal government is forcing on us.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=febbb99733ff4911853d9c514b5f2ec5&_e=bzZEX-yuLbCPcjlAGEKvwC5pnkheVbgvd-T4M0tf5MbgEsp3W5hC0Bkbw874qVqxNsBn05gAxfGfAr6-oI4J9DshIZIUkxy0ZuiCpOi7YXJSOufJO5exIMU8rTTc_qfCpSG7Mwuy-9tOEUvIVZTN3XpbohZbvPRKKa2d5_XU6yWgGC_FbIVbjPM-IeOmcLVan6hi8wvelkaZSFWJYY0vXrvf3bDiyy4jLXc1BehonIO3dSoUeVMU5BZv-4gEG-h_sU7fwqDMzu53ajlsg3G_pt4KSX1DR5Y-Ccb63d52nIdZAA7QoQKqsS8CL3HYEwk2jEOBMYJ4yk7L0RnhdcFMUw%3D%3D)

Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and to now add potential forced vaccinations. **Democrats' overreach is beyond out of control, and some liberal legal pundits and the mainstream media think that mandating medical treatment is within the government's right. Let me assure you, it is not.**

You may not be the target of the first rounds of vaccine mandates, but it's only a matter of time before Democrats force you to be vaccinated even to leave your house.

As for today's announcement from OSHA, my firm and I have already filed a lawsuit to stop these mandates.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=febbb99733ff4911853d9c514b5f2ec5&_e=bzZEX-yuLbCPcjlAGEKvwC5pnkheVbgvd-T4M0tf5MbgEsp3W5hC0Bkbw874qVqxNsBn05gAxfGfAr6-oI4J9DshIZIUkxy0ZuiCpOi7YXJSOufJO5exIMU8rTTc_qfCo7KKGRJ5xFmO9E-O-LZZGYTqR0cqqS-yI-zF1PLa-_-tueTaUTna4VnKz76buGmVZCgaNzn8qKtmfdNFgVPXb-yGbLHUo6Bm8Q4k2fv6LhadNFIodVCQFnCJXP1ql9Fe6xJy40aOM6kQFBpBG14rPTdML7ycQSR63S8j05oFumXyUMTH3Kd9aWiEi-a7fsbVZqBlWUw8-HcUcM7mDxqfEQ%3D%3D)
**It is outrageous that whether we can work if we’re unvaccinated will be decided by a group of bureaucrats we didn't even elect!**

Chances are if you are reading this, you agree with me that the heavy hand of government has gone too far. [**You know that it is a violation of our rights as Americans to have our medical autonomy taken away from us.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=febbb99733ff4911853d9c514b5f2ec5&_e=bzZEX-yuLbCPcjlAGEKvwC5pnkheVbgvd-T4M0tf5MbgEsp3W5hC0Bkbw874qVqxNsBn05gAxfGfAr6-oI4J9DshIZIUkxy0ZuiCpOi7YXJSOufJO5exIMU8rTTc_qfCbjswNoeJqxIyT963g_0ulVOfSHlGwVKeufhEtiXhtrBWCkbdPw4yerOU1vxHau04Pd9hu5GDM4UTqBTlUfR4XXwZJtnQX26zEHKAkgIQqrrXIv31qh88bdxWc8dfEKvk2suvvVtxFG3kB1nvSeoJ13JK7pzfNNfrrIZZVP1Jbp4Ty5FnQo1r673sYukUte161rxB5ea0GFn1IxO793_n4Q%3D%3D)

[**But being reactive can only be effective for so long. I need your help to get to the root of the problem. Can you help me make it to the U.S. Senate where I can stop this government overreach at the source?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=febbb99733ff4911853d9c514b5f2ec5&_e=bzZEX-yuLbCPcjlAGEKvwC5pnkheVbgvd-T4M0tf5MbgEsp3W5hC0Bkbw874qVqxNsBn05gAxfGfAr6-oI4J9DshIZIUkxy0ZuiCpOi7YXJSOufJO5exIMU8rTTc_qfCp7mAKmLoBut5FEZ8dNmySv3LMDJ-QN6n4dtrtE0Gbs261rIFUbM3_c6B6ChVOWzzqUXOgGA6imPUyI-lnrYujx1XiWgoeQ_OZt1oXfHXqIVMOIBhGjByg1rLBZS_etBbVXRqA69JSdQaayg1-10H_R_HfPlRBXFLHne4sW2qPs0d7nlcd_sqNKDfjT6-N9UsjaBfM1mD-LoeDE2nURA6BQ%3D%3D)

Running for office as a Republican in California is a challenging but winnable battle. We need to stay strong and show our opponent that we are ready to take him on. [**Can you help power my campaign for U.S. Senate by making a quick contribution of $5 or more today?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=febbb99733ff4911853d9c514b5f2ec5&_e=bzZEX-yuLbCPcjlAGEKvwC5pnkheVbgvd-T4M0tf5MbgEsp3W5hC0Bkbw874qVqxNsBn05gAxfGfAr6-oI4J9DshIZIUkxy0ZuiCpOi7YXJSOufJO5exIMU8rTTc_qfChVQohNkpeLrssa-k11hIsmw_sP4ADyjAyLfe8bbQhAXT8TTfpo83ht3sdMUciEXB5uxq5IqVMABV1A2Qvu5NJ6KMCLQ4d6oQpUlMdoCHjZr4LbPPJ-xhVJ5ya5p6ENVs1UkXJA6V7MLRDIwBC0pzwBs9i1jo29kvBfmjzy8ZzPOgjqsy52j6QDywCfaX5WOysiifjKyCgMoOihTP_qCepA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

**Mark Meuser**
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[** Donate Now >> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=febbb99733ff4911853d9c514b5f2ec5&_e=bzZEX-yuLbCPcjlAGEKvwC5pnkheVbgvd-T4M0tf5MbgEsp3W5hC0Bkbw874qVqxNsBn05gAxfGfAr6-oI4J9DshIZIUkxy0ZuiCpOi7YXJSOufJO5exIMU8rTTc_qfCPmHahbcKPRrDbSUZXrPZ4F4bN2LYhGKtuzmwlSZ7w38I21QLzIBCrkL_HS7OAUOPl2XPhyDzlrjToOx1_PhVqdDyJawlZwtdt-C5fhVrWr5-7QCvQ24071njGikYTAzhsXAuz_Uhy966Kza3gqDZB-3SHiqoCZxcXdbZDcA5OFP-ek6oYeiyw-LPqacvdnZshYcPnXARfzMFzBFuvzOFgg%3D%3D)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re trying to draw me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8nk1924jod4iperic63308pek3e3ms3emc3mn9o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr72cdleoq3fddmcuqr1ohks5pr4plh69pjas5jc9g74oticgpr4d1gc1rmeob0sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3impj3ap5jcdjrcob664ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6cdgm8or0chhm49fg)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zierhhqvq1chn4vjs8778lp3shco0l6cltuj369o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5i66o34cdh2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znmaf5mpk9rjhc61g0i6tg9ktr6qepfv5mj42sd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5i66o34cdh2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrlern4a258v8pda1makvlasdjf0r31k7ubccb60_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5i66o34cdh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvufd81tmkn2m8fsvrg1t18n1njjfbiu1n1q5hqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5i66o34cdh2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb46p64c34k2adkap5mg4sfsnd41vedijhn9g92o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5i66o34cdh2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeb8442il0a7mo2irj2n3h4cnkmhn9b7tqvtaup0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c5i66o34cdh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS

body:
I have never seen something as egregious as the vaccine mandate that the federal government is forcing on us. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99f74ab78e75434caa8810ef69b990b6&_e=SfBfPPEnPLfifoKdj_rND40356Wze7sGMUk-MfIZXwHvO2XwkQVhr_R4ZTnuOj9ICRUM0-1icV-EhlPWTQ3EcBHUNRb_OsbbrjJrJxmRXGn6FL70g8wW7NMRZkEZOhe9p0H1RgoxOf70mXXAbKZt9zG58VXNDpRrSvtAab6M0G20Z7j56OwVO4AoQ0qU2c32nSxk7f7japQ10PsROFfWZxiP5Vfq0XUeP1PV7fw8l3lwuHa-V1DpMv2t7I3eWNw0f82B5dXoUFXfKvgmQE0cEAX82OT5uysqLoS7an2uNScfLVT_MSiGDvI1v6Qos68ADM99ZoNRpnpPLR4qnHpqlQ%3D%3D)
