Peter,

I'm a constitutional law attorney. I spend every day reviewing constitutional violations and filing complaints to protect our inalienable rights as Americans. **But I have never seen something as egregious as the vaccine mandate that the federal government is forcing on us.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99f74ab78e75434caa8810ef69b990b6&_e=SfBfPPEnPLfifoKdj_rND40356Wze7sGMUk-MfIZXwHvO2XwkQVhr_R4ZTnuOj9ICRUM0-1icV-EhlPWTQ3EcBHUNRb_OsbbrjJrJxmRXGn6FL70g8wW7NMRZkEZOhe9N6eea2UrZvSeKXY7XQyopdjA60yKjRsUIsWDooUdx4OOZ9ENiql-w5Xi0xxLk7q4ufrOWALEKOR3u_wI0SuB3jlQEs0WUVCGcod35TnwQqhRpmo74stcZQ4hq6x51X_Sz3AfO0lKckysQmAPGY_QJL7C0nj4lwNBlCffPoCdhPUHp3DkiCEoz5fddl54fx3cs9ufPh_oskZxVxisSo7Zkg%3D%3D)

Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and to now add potential forced vaccinations. **Democrats' overreach is beyond out of control, and some liberal legal pundits and the mainstream media think that mandating medical treatment is within the government's right. Let me assure you, it is not.**

You may not be the target of the first rounds of vaccine mandates, but it's only a matter of time before Democrats force you to be vaccinated even to leave your house.

As for today's announcement from OSHA, my firm and I have already filed a lawsuit to stop these mandates.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99f74ab78e75434caa8810ef69b990b6&_e=SfBfPPEnPLfifoKdj_rND40356Wze7sGMUk-MfIZXwHvO2XwkQVhr_R4ZTnuOj9ICRUM0-1icV-EhlPWTQ3EcBHUNRb_OsbbrjJrJxmRXGn6FL70g8wW7NMRZkEZOhe9qHAvYbkg0oLFYcde6nsxXEhx35GmIyqCMTMUR-UkdgzygSJXaq4OvT65eB9K5yuuIlL1ZUcuC6oRsWvf9YuvHJsMeIGih0ttHR4WtuiKrtCHJIYlVXhwqIV9F1b2Xpj3_07FjURVAUWVnnDgN4TSMbzPZh_GVFdgpzc5AL5RSIaBrk8ob7FuQFnPMLkhUtZzCYon9xslot_1eHXe3r2ihw%3D%3D)
**It is outrageous that whether we can work if we’re unvaccinated will be decided by a group of bureaucrats we didn't even elect!**

Chances are if you are reading this, you agree with me that the heavy hand of government has gone too far. [**You know that it is a violation of our rights as Americans to have our medical autonomy taken away from us.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99f74ab78e75434caa8810ef69b990b6&_e=SfBfPPEnPLfifoKdj_rND40356Wze7sGMUk-MfIZXwHvO2XwkQVhr_R4ZTnuOj9ICRUM0-1icV-EhlPWTQ3EcBHUNRb_OsbbrjJrJxmRXGn6FL70g8wW7NMRZkEZOhe90XFxMpY0Zjyyu_W4Q_9-hNqKb-awZHvPBk2liIEdmIVt5YHs2Aqv7SbEFMKzk4bayq-zk2w9r_xIIJqcIG66B6rZsaeVmhoiwW4g-8W2o0jPYiV00nFiNKVkw6baq0o-4Hn7ILq454LvVXCnYVjXZQ6h4teUULxL2KwY2kXMrZu9YvZvYb4cHBCxVb44FQ6H1UlSoo5mLZ3-gZ5Mk-igmQ%3D%3D)

[**But being reactive can only be effective for so long. I need your help to get to the root of the problem. Can you help me make it to the U.S. Senate where I can stop this government overreach at the source?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99f74ab78e75434caa8810ef69b990b6&_e=SfBfPPEnPLfifoKdj_rND40356Wze7sGMUk-MfIZXwHvO2XwkQVhr_R4ZTnuOj9ICRUM0-1icV-EhlPWTQ3EcBHUNRb_OsbbrjJrJxmRXGn6FL70g8wW7NMRZkEZOhe9M5U_z-4G4vt9ZPIMLW0YaM9ZiyULGytQ5tBK12VE_udjIHyGooEtDauTaMCwVlNSKbzL53y-ELLtoYFwOHuU30GgcvmuNysJ4gu5tjYOv1H9BuTK_FXlu6_6LBGqT636u7J1XoU6q0nuhfXSkqWUQZfdTIOULubPBmZ1ZqtIObbVPnAM9W8bHDNV1wZdkPYzl5dSygNCMCtaAPEONW1UZg%3D%3D)

Running for office as a Republican in California is a challenging but winnable battle. We need to stay strong and show our opponent that we are ready to take him on. [**Can you help power my campaign for U.S. Senate by making a quick contribution of $5 or more today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99f74ab78e75434caa8810ef69b990b6&_e=SfBfPPEnPLfifoKdj_rND40356Wze7sGMUk-MfIZXwHvO2XwkQVhr_R4ZTnuOj9ICRUM0-1icV-EhlPWTQ3EcBHUNRb_OsbbrjJrJxmRXGn6FL70g8wW7NMRZkEZOhe91c64mcqT6IzlwkcY8uFNIs9HQVF1EM8zjpE3sn9Zm8PTAYu4RIzIzXlMJVeMZPQaV8oK_Gn5rlWUFYCuKmioUXpVm--hg_ffL1dYG2REg_UCGeooevX55I2K6RPUyMsJQdi-synkiM7lqekQWtnTlycBz9B8NzWTK3EtUoqR75qp74rN0MHRdqv9FX15cUVbTgf848iYva8QJWVFl7mLTA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

**Mark Meuser**
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[** Donate Now >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99f74ab78e75434caa8810ef69b990b6&_e=SfBfPPEnPLfifoKdj_rND40356Wze7sGMUk-MfIZXwHvO2XwkQVhr_R4ZTnuOj9ICRUM0-1icV-EhlPWTQ3EcBHUNRb_OsbbrjJrJxmRXGn6FL70g8wW7NMRZkEZOhe9DXxMiO0SAPgUco9R0KaciezOqvW2CpOiXsoNZDL64F1MIeu4Ua_noTMjjM7gGPA4gZBcXZ8n7elhzno-VLurQKFLenkKY8APoIrQuGXh_3ZWWy9eWo31qX6mhmJ9JsqxG1yZ2qfyF35LFEIc5Jktj8PbgK2ReaDbQSo5tJ6q1KG6rZBIGE4_FcKHy_Ayc_CbBtB5oCP2ZR7MCJ9aw-1J4w%3D%3D)

name: Mark Meuser
subject: See you at the finish line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
It makes sense that my favorite hobby would be so competitive. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66dd821eb36e4b4c8ab8535b3cfa536c&_e=mw4DC2NQR6DL4f8B65Sr23dWaT4g6G0lgbLk5zWcnINDbF6U8_gOjboxAQtrVBMWoudEyVL5JBY-zQpaG7t1U9U-t6xspsaOlhwRxq8v5Sr54kkaos6K4cI_QJB_Bux8ER90bzk0bxuS6efM1GOazlNupYyzYX4FqKr1sKLXrOnhREeb2atwbQz9JrVQhVdufFSFal9Y8GgkgQvEi-RlPScUVGc7gLbotANxc4VGrtGW28E8tZi5y28LlAr8zd09QSpTjqn9gOBIwPp04-Pjy7q3cwAM453RKgb3D-YQuU7AS9OsxjqM-419ALH5drkBZlepEhKSZ2JYejRIyhjLMQ%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I wanted to share with you how I spent my weekend.**On October 30th, I finished Ironman 70.3 Oceanside. I have now finished 2 full Ironman races and 13 half Ironman races.**

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66dd821eb36e4b4c8ab8535b3cfa536c&_e=mw4DC2NQR6DL4f8B65Sr23dWaT4g6G0lgbLk5zWcnINDbF6U8_gOjboxAQtrVBMWoudEyVL5JBY-zQpaG7t1U9U-t6xspsaOlhwRxq8v5Sr54kkaos6K4cI_QJB_Bux8yBhmeAn8HXExG8r4vmyv_VQvrQyDUaFKTPORQxOaHqwjJ0Rz6ONJ_ctOKf2DSEFgShUWatoGY_NO54O1P6zGhbbzP7qXg46Ofgg1yoP7sotiGwaqqXU3s1PYzDjQUlKeeoxXlT4curG3EsNN4k8ZMnVkP9w2R7uEE9CDaXdEzqiPAmmAJPNTDKhNtS-SUHEv_MBqgi6cEic4003tECCTFw%3D%3D)

Competing in an Ironman is a lot like running for office. It's challenging, it tests your patience, it requires you to get creative to find solutions, and it's _so rewarding_ when you cross the finish line.

The difference is that when I cross the Ironman finish line, I get a medal, but when polls close on Election Day, Republicans get to take back the Senate and save America from Joe Biden. [**Our party only needs to win a few seats to take back the Senate majority. With your help, we can be part of the flip!**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66dd821eb36e4b4c8ab8535b3cfa536c&_e=mw4DC2NQR6DL4f8B65Sr23dWaT4g6G0lgbLk5zWcnINDbF6U8_gOjboxAQtrVBMWoudEyVL5JBY-zQpaG7t1U9U-t6xspsaOlhwRxq8v5Sr54kkaos6K4cI_QJB_Bux82wJyWqzFsRCFfozMAa7mRwZCvbxVFJ9KpVvmWokmupbDqigFtGGvAxJypdIbkqZGiExsxRx1mRM_d1PVTwj7hodU54roTb4drytaGN0g8wAHh4KtFBv3xhYVgqVQDcemRMDUf3HFTapvhzjFbMQ-xV3YJC_DzHkOZp3ygRay8Tu06hnQLJihsLnzi1bWjhqz34Z0wY1XkJJ5zJ25TuqykQ%3D%3D)

[** HELP MARK WIN THIS RACE**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66dd821eb36e4b4c8ab8535b3cfa536c&_e=mw4DC2NQR6DL4f8B65Sr23dWaT4g6G0lgbLk5zWcnINDbF6U8_gOjboxAQtrVBMWoudEyVL5JBY-zQpaG7t1U9U-t6xspsaOlhwRxq8v5Sr54kkaos6K4cI_QJB_Bux87V1geYLSyjrYeXL0yqvhSGQ5Bs6gwfE_ypvIkjAPBzcs-ngbeauSyLz_5MapzOpzqur732z5Nx5rpryjJHpkt8So4Y7ruDtz0XoQyYwWhX2urP2QQND-RZaaKTwe17ECb0_vmfZ8XndLNE_NEg5ZdpKd6uJKl5JODHK-HEBZwhgM-ykzu_hwX2riJJ-QuNwLMNEQvKJKupPrw3ZAhCz3rw%3D%3D)
As a constitutional attorney, it makes sense that my favorite hobby would be so competitive. **It's not an easy feat to take on people like Gavin Newsom or Antifa in the courtroom,** but day in and day out, I go to my office to protect the Civil Rights of every American.

I've spent my life fighting back; whether it's on my bike or in the courthouse, I gladly accept the challenge. I challenged the State of California when they unconstitutionally tired to keep President Trump off the ballot. I challenged Gavin Newsom in 22 lawsuits regarding his outrageous COVID-19 regulations. [**And now I'm challenging a radical progressive Senator who was hand-picked by King Gavin himself.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66dd821eb36e4b4c8ab8535b3cfa536c&_e=mw4DC2NQR6DL4f8B65Sr23dWaT4g6G0lgbLk5zWcnINDbF6U8_gOjboxAQtrVBMWoudEyVL5JBY-zQpaG7t1U9U-t6xspsaOlhwRxq8v5Sr54kkaos6K4cI_QJB_Bux8EYqXsB5BZlutENEieMk_V39JK3cCmNaBB49gARcLwnfv-dEqqoFmu3NN4wYgJBHN8jWz9zu9VqbDUNmfe62qdFUFvJ8M5zFYY83uOxmQpVloJRdMjETjI73zn_nEB8ZL7_JpwbB_6eVz2SzHAbz4knuSQKJ51dP6ZNMF3hJtG4Wah-rplngSFnLw3N1xt1fYbk0ZTQ6lMQgFPE87YFQh3A%3D%3D)

**California needs a Senator that will fight for the needs of Californians, not the needs of Gavin Newsom. While I've enjoyed fighting for Americans in the courthouse,[**I know that if I want to make a real difference in our Nation, I need to be inside the Capitol.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66dd821eb36e4b4c8ab8535b3cfa536c&_e=mw4DC2NQR6DL4f8B65Sr23dWaT4g6G0lgbLk5zWcnINDbF6U8_gOjboxAQtrVBMWoudEyVL5JBY-zQpaG7t1U9U-t6xspsaOlhwRxq8v5Sr54kkaos6K4cI_QJB_Bux8bLQ6IzS3goUHUgijL55TgiAeRG5KaA-C-03dUgnSf9kFwEKj6JaQ5KjuXt7O-8kigGtstCoLsJ-h8JNzZkDIL3az-8-RjxIQ-CiuJZvmAexZEYtODOKgHDAKjKD_zq_U3oCGpyJhsMLoxTFzrBKJCtwA0rarStIF24XJ0-pSjXeq2vJFooI7AE4PlQBTVQ4vTk66hx7fzJs6GSqn_urUHg%3D%3D) **

I first announced my campaign for U.S. Senate a few months ago, and I am overwhelmed by your support. But now we have a little over one year until Election Day and running for office is like a long triathlon.

Much like in an Ironman, I need to make sure I have enough fuel to power us to the finish line. Instead of carbs and electrolytes, I need the financial support of grassroots conservatives like you, Peter.

[**Can you make a $5 monthly contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? Your monthly gift will help us sustain our campaign through the typically slow winter months and allow us to hit the ground running on January 1st. We have no time to waste; can you contribute just $5 a month?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66dd821eb36e4b4c8ab8535b3cfa536c&_e=mw4DC2NQR6DL4f8B65Sr23dWaT4g6G0lgbLk5zWcnINDbF6U8_gOjboxAQtrVBMWoudEyVL5JBY-zQpaG7t1U9U-t6xspsaOlhwRxq8v5Sr54kkaos6K4cI_QJB_Bux8YqVUEp_eNHcUF2cZ3kTxola6si9T7YB9RwhIgN0mxetQ--c7IDVTf92RacEA8T-BHcKYezjdwLAWEmWtJxa-BpMPDz6eirIUMR0ua_Od459hmU3JQctWowqr-MSrwdDyAz8HONnwri4rgBEMxukVUwy8TIHjuot-ZP6s-vu89WYJB9w096aa1BlQVte6huny2w1N7S-hBBH0Xl2d8lQdgw%3D%3D)

[** HELP MARK WIN THIS RACE**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66dd821eb36e4b4c8ab8535b3cfa536c&_e=mw4DC2NQR6DL4f8B65Sr23dWaT4g6G0lgbLk5zWcnINDbF6U8_gOjboxAQtrVBMWoudEyVL5JBY-zQpaG7t1U9U-t6xspsaOlhwRxq8v5Sr54kkaos6K4cI_QJB_Bux8xPMEyIDKlEym6u_GbluDu9M1rscR19UmyZ8H25zcNOhrB6tPrdLLXsEFJHK_mAW3Tt-YcQHIfpUXVdAukg-eOSS_rl8JbfXMFgokMvDPn0AB7xiVbYgdanwj7BcwY9EESy_pK66TB4sDJajeP4D65qnJp0iwwstylDHzDhaS0es_KEZOlHsm5sb_8xBeofY2bk_0w3Fp1Uw6TBPQx__1eA%3D%3D)
I am committed to fighting to make California competitive again and for that reason, I am temporarily retiring from Ironman races to focus all of my attention on representing you in the U.S. Capitol. While I enjoy Ironman races, I am sure you will agree that this race is too important to our country’s future.

Thank you Peter,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

**P.S. When you see me out on the campaign trail, ask me about the responses of other participants when I shouted “Let’s Go Brandon” to my friend who was also racing.**

name: Mark Meuser
subject: Racing to the Senate 🏊🏻‍♂️🚲🏃🏻‍♂️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
It makes sense that my favorite hobby would be so competitive. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f4080a743de4c1a8d0bafbbed201b61&_e=0nJYxgIF7sSt7swVuc0CPdeH6ZQcEmgx7aX8tztitTbDng5szCFPo8Ad4Ro7Nz5wE_alR6uTTyb2xL8X3KnG2hOS1H3kBQGlhrzi0GV-jGSVox1MQCxvAxmG1C9DOtLkKHXzpQYmhsLXt6jIGKFlYPpG6FUrVd6sKYwKVbG7yHMneCSWmAjWYlAJKrb_Ic-8Dvd_yfRrSDHvz4A2abQG5fRckySbRzEDR89K7CB7uH088L_cd4fYT3bjr5PZNBLK4E9Z3WVhDA0tFOdtPQsddgKmkPy_Z9JDMT8-ZcpqoR9RdxXsxBrb-Y71NZG2Tm-UNUf7y48hKR3fVZbmWUh3IA%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I wanted to share with you how I spent my weekend.**On October 30th, I finished Ironman 70.3 Oceanside. I have now finished 2 full Ironman races and 13 half Ironman races.**

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f4080a743de4c1a8d0bafbbed201b61&_e=0nJYxgIF7sSt7swVuc0CPdeH6ZQcEmgx7aX8tztitTbDng5szCFPo8Ad4Ro7Nz5wE_alR6uTTyb2xL8X3KnG2hOS1H3kBQGlhrzi0GV-jGSVox1MQCxvAxmG1C9DOtLkD5tLRDDxS8aXLRm5-o4eImnjEhxG7gcxZA86t-gKhUmnAJyAcg0ziRYEA_U0-ZUJ05_-o3H5eidpQ5K3GwgomfNiHcBT1GXZFAi-Ra6a-SJREH6xijGXuLsyTf8o083J4ldsQJqtruc8uBuVP8tthF6g03gHFWnZGpEfZ0mIa9wzzh-m4__UXC-7FveA6KNLYBnYLguuGmzO1n8p7N8alQ%3D%3D)

Competing in an Ironman is a lot like running for office. It's challenging, it tests your patience, it requires you to get creative to find solutions, and it's _so rewarding_ when you cross the finish line.

The difference is that when I cross the Ironman finish line, I get a medal, but when polls close on Election Day, Republicans get to take back the Senate and save America from Joe Biden. [**Our party only needs to win a few seats to take back the Senate majority. With your help, we can be part of the flip!**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f4080a743de4c1a8d0bafbbed201b61&_e=0nJYxgIF7sSt7swVuc0CPdeH6ZQcEmgx7aX8tztitTbDng5szCFPo8Ad4Ro7Nz5wE_alR6uTTyb2xL8X3KnG2hOS1H3kBQGlhrzi0GV-jGSVox1MQCxvAxmG1C9DOtLk2Pz7QPP6IHKPKrP1-3cQ419BfIUH0mwLyb_9Qy029fsxAq6yBbwxFJUXzyL6PBRD2CZKMWMrqgBzWYJAQ0aHXEefWzpBgf7WvHyCWjWSc5nzjU0c0mW-6LKjL60uNr4CqvJYCnfhB2MDjkWiZ1VXtiodXPbNTw4zjlNZ_2iWCcphmRhM0wxWzd0Wa-N0o_B0MwT8lN6uI6W51AopGm6sVg%3D%3D)

[** HELP MARK WIN THIS RACE**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f4080a743de4c1a8d0bafbbed201b61&_e=0nJYxgIF7sSt7swVuc0CPdeH6ZQcEmgx7aX8tztitTbDng5szCFPo8Ad4Ro7Nz5wE_alR6uTTyb2xL8X3KnG2hOS1H3kBQGlhrzi0GV-jGSVox1MQCxvAxmG1C9DOtLkYwWXJ3BYv91EITlQDDb7IFoJ5AqigpVOPooesGcw8k4geZT_lUXuLyJSLnGq7g4StolrpxUtZ7EjAwOhHVQwxFUmlN82QF_0u5AhTO1KGNaBE97ppZsI0GJw3gEK58IAg7jftOLGIHNLGtn2qSsRU1ax7-dFoIcep7kZ56JiA0IOjZb0BlsAjBBEI1XR998bn-V5nwoOTqm24jSyZ05pEg%3D%3D)
As a constitutional attorney, it makes sense that my favorite hobby would be so competitive. **It's not an easy feat to take on people like Gavin Newsom or Antifa in the courtroom,** but day in and day out, I go to my office to protect the Civil Rights of every American.

I've spent my life fighting back; whether it's on my bike or in the courthouse, I gladly accept the challenge. I challenged the State of California when they unconstitutionally tired to keep President Trump off the ballot. I challenged Gavin Newsom in 22 lawsuits regarding his outrageous COVID-19 regulations. [**And now I'm challenging a radical progressive Senator who was hand-picked by King Gavin himself.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f4080a743de4c1a8d0bafbbed201b61&_e=0nJYxgIF7sSt7swVuc0CPdeH6ZQcEmgx7aX8tztitTbDng5szCFPo8Ad4Ro7Nz5wE_alR6uTTyb2xL8X3KnG2hOS1H3kBQGlhrzi0GV-jGSVox1MQCxvAxmG1C9DOtLkgD0uCAUaC8pZ-fyF13mN_wjjn7k6O-n83khcmXtCwpuO6EN3pRGtTOfQ2Ktc7aTCYQjgQM6rhIEJG4ORgaKS6wfudktGFARK-F9YMjYOj4BZymwVnNySeINy_-8a1Y4n_XXMlrI1HhZVA4yassryc7vl2bwvW3WgP9xzc0-33BRER_ogrgG_mZTbxqr6hS6q7d4QTFj7JQh4pvPa_TPGeQ%3D%3D)

**California needs a Senator that will fight for the needs of Californians, not the needs of Gavin Newsom. While I've enjoyed fighting for Americans in the courthouse,[**I know that if I want to make a real difference in our Nation, I need to be inside the Capitol.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f4080a743de4c1a8d0bafbbed201b61&_e=0nJYxgIF7sSt7swVuc0CPdeH6ZQcEmgx7aX8tztitTbDng5szCFPo8Ad4Ro7Nz5wE_alR6uTTyb2xL8X3KnG2hOS1H3kBQGlhrzi0GV-jGSVox1MQCxvAxmG1C9DOtLkoljLZ9pEhdLYdKFeOUrOyMIuIQ2h0WOznD-nliTErm1yHOh6CjuuuzT_bZyix4zfJHjBXhwkyHYWqPmmRBws3FZ7pz5Di8xU1VbPAIAwVLXNJZSaKN9HFY4s4jL7uumqSB0FmQY_ZZIZrw1jBS-8l1OjeUqSBZ6HoLLApuLNJT7RNoHFpZn9t-BpEE_F3XA31rBSGgRIWjhqXl6WYFC3cg%3D%3D) **

I first announced my campaign for U.S. Senate a few months ago, and I am overwhelmed by your support. But now we have a little over one year until Election Day and running for office is like a long triathlon.

Much like in an Ironman, I need to make sure I have enough fuel to power us to the finish line. Instead of carbs and electrolytes, I need the financial support of grassroots conservatives like you, Peter.

[**Can you make a $5 monthly contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? Your monthly gift will help us sustain our campaign through the typically slow winter months and allow us to hit the ground running on January 1st. We have no time to waste; can you contribute just $5 a month?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f4080a743de4c1a8d0bafbbed201b61&_e=0nJYxgIF7sSt7swVuc0CPdeH6ZQcEmgx7aX8tztitTbDng5szCFPo8Ad4Ro7Nz5wE_alR6uTTyb2xL8X3KnG2hOS1H3kBQGlhrzi0GV-jGSVox1MQCxvAxmG1C9DOtLkTCAcR8aokLytxC-jslPNblp3OYPxkS6qZMGPXVd7E7aKyJ4BJlJhVZfv5MsVNgkuhJtnfUnrhjBxuA2WR2MtseUnIktelOGP0ZRJBdR25CQq6QB0ljQ6HILk2w6aT_EomIlEa-TV5-rInLMFgDndposCg8R-99Yh3-mVmrrd6XFi1ijA6HGpttfgcBFnUiaXOhHSxpdfNi80HH1LyglhgQ%3D%3D)

[** HELP MARK WIN THIS RACE**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f4080a743de4c1a8d0bafbbed201b61&_e=0nJYxgIF7sSt7swVuc0CPdeH6ZQcEmgx7aX8tztitTbDng5szCFPo8Ad4Ro7Nz5wE_alR6uTTyb2xL8X3KnG2hOS1H3kBQGlhrzi0GV-jGSVox1MQCxvAxmG1C9DOtLkfZWytRH5fLtjBUsfQreLMQLf6PA0z3lv_SgNA2vZqH7jVIdby1O0_WozSMmNl3fyYr0WIYe2j0VzJjl9iepobXHsy2avsKq0duMX-n9cRvu5mnfE10sBJt2gRo4wY0hnVckg4H3vyRslPE19BCmWR8Qg3guilo0eD_gO6GIwz0lbrYq-179Ki5asCz-IA-Rrd-z9PGhmBAo8F0TZ_XqQwQ%3D%3D)
I am committed to fighting to make California competitive again and for that reason, I am temporarily retiring from Ironman races to focus all of my attention on representing you in the U.S. Capitol. While I enjoy Ironman races, I am sure you will agree that this race is too important to our country’s future.

Thank you Peter,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

**P.S. When you see me out on the campaign trail, ask me about the responses of other participants when I shouted “Let’s Go Brandon” to my friend who was also racing.**

| | Paid for by Mark Meuser for U.S. Senate
---

We hate to see you go, but[you can unsubscribe here](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=1f4080a743de4c1a8d0bafbbed201b61&_t=rCkXgMWAU_85N_19UqZ2DklmUKjknkn82330Q7QhP9vlzDnibFMSFu0F5l684bO83cioeCzccrIdWMnPmmu-Oro-Mdh0JdD7UhauyNebV_UcHCLM6Y2wBt9INc4G0KatE_LFAfEa6Dkrrn_kcoUqngrhUClHdy0_ZuU1CWMZ7VE%3D)._

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38436175/315449586/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211108-1-EM&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzNkMmUzNC1mMjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2AkvwIRM5anCtJMobpO1nrXR56f4oMpic5d9Do1NXU=)

**There are just 365 days left till Election Day 2022.** And as last week’s elections across the country showed us, Democrats cannot take anything for granted— especially with the uncertainty of upcoming redistricting. [_**Can you contribute $1 today so I know you have my back as I look towards the 2022 midterms?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38436176/315449587/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211108-1-EM&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzNkMmUzNC1mMjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2AkvwIRM5anCtJMobpO1nrXR56f4oMpic5d9Do1NXU=)
| [GIVE $1 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38436177/315449588/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211108-1-EM&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzNkMmUzNC1mMjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2AkvwIRM5anCtJMobpO1nrXR56f4oMpic5d9Do1NXU=)

I am working in Congress every single day to deliver real results that help workers and families in San Diego and around the country, from good jobs and updated infrastructure to universal childcare and paid family leave. Now, I have just one year left to earn the votes I need to stay in Congress and continue this important work.

**The Congressional maps are uncertain, and it’s clear we will have to reach new voters in the next year in order to win this race.**

I am counting on the support of friends like you to defend this seat. Now, I have just one year left to earn the votes I need to stay in Congress and continue this important work. subject: GREAT event in Saginaw last weekend.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
There's more where that came from! | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=385363a6ad&e=fe4b890356)
---
| Peter,

**Happy Monday!** I wanted to give you a little campaign update because __I can feel that the momentum is on our side.__

**Last week I was able to hit the campaign trail and attend three fantastic events across our state. **

On Wednesday we hosted a Meet & Greet in Calhoun County, on Friday I spoke at the Taylor Republican Club Meeting, and on Saturday, our Bay Area volunteer team AMAZED me by organizing a grassroots fundraiser in Saginaw that **_packed the house with over 150 patriots._**

Here are some of my favorite pictures from last week's travels 👇
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=687a2fb7b0&e=fe4b890356)
---
[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=f717ee6424&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8d4101c8a1&e=fe4b890356)
---
[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=d5b30eaa72&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | **We can feel our movement growing every day -** and with our TV ad up on Fox News, more and more Michiganders are being introduced to the grassroots campaign we've built to return our government to WE THE PEOPLE!

In just 6 months, we've attended over 60 events in 40 counties in every corner of our beloved state. **We're just getting started** \- check out where I'll be in the next two weeks below and [click here to RSVP](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=a9d7a7ca75&e=fe4b890356) 👇
---
| [**_Montcalm 'We the County' Meeting_**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=9a2aa03ef4&e=fe4b890356)
Tuesday, November 9th at 7:00pm
Montcalm Township Hall
1880 S Greenville Ave, Greenville MI
---
[**_North Oakland Republican Club _**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8e3a1df097&e=fe4b890356)
Tuesday, November 16th at 7:00pm
Overtyme Grill & Tap Room
4724 Dixie Hwy, Waterford, MI
---
| **_Adrian Grassroots Fundraiser_**
Friday, November 19th, 6:00-8:30pm
Hills of Lenawee Banquet Center
4110 Country Club Rd, Adrian MI
[Buy Tickets.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=27b52fb947&e=fe4b890356) $50 each or $90/couple.
---
[**Macomb County Meet & Greet**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=6a72102e67&e=fe4b890356)
Saturday, Nov. 20th, 12:00-2:30pm
34950 Little Mack Ave, Clinton Twp
Yard Signs available for purchase
---
| **I hope you can join us at an upcoming event. ** If there's some place I haven't visited yet or if you know of a GOP or pro-freedom group that would like to hear me speak, you can [request an event at the bottom of our events page. ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=1e17c5c7aa&e=fe4b890356)

We're doing our best to meet as many Michiganders as possible on the campaign trail. This is an amazing state with a lot of amazing people, and we deserve a Governor who puts our citizens first!
---
| **In Liberty,
[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=dbd6e1e0cd&e=fe4b890356)**
**Garrett Soldano**
Republican Candidate for Governor

P.S. - If you'd like to help us keep our [New Television Ad](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=0d0deb0f16&e=fe4b890356) up and running on FOX News,[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=fa7791abe1&e=fe4b890356)[pitch in a few bucks today](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=4aea83d22d&e=fe4b890356)[.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8e55afc8c2&e=fe4b890356) Every dollar will help us spread the word of our campaign to a larger audience!
---
| [Donate](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=dd30736ec4&e=fe4b890356 "Donate")

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Here’s what we learned from Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Fellow Conservative, its Congressman Dan Crenshaw.

Today is a HUGE day. We are officially one year out from the most important midterm elections of our lifetimes -- which means it's time to fire up the jets.

**And if we learned anything from what happened in Virginia, it 's that conservative grassroots are FED UP with the Democrats' radical socialist agenda and READY to take back the House next year! subject: Our Son Levi is Born!
body:
** Our Son Levi is Born!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Lisa & I want to introduce you to our 2nd son Levi Nathan Evans. He was born at 7 lbs., 4 oz., and he is doing great! We named him Levi Nathan Evans because we believe he will have a strong gifting for leading people in worshipping God, and in speaking for God. Lisa and I are so thankful for the life of our son Levi, and we believe our 1st son Michael will be an amazing older brother - and he already has been so far!

Lisa did phenomenal in delivery, and she is recovering very well. She is very thankful to be a mother of 2, and she is doing an incredible job. Lisa even mentioned she was looking forward to more kids. (LOL).

All in all, being a father is a blessing. Everyday when I wake up, I want to first follow the Lord Jesus and say yes to him in every way, second love & serve my wife and sons, and third impact the world around me with the self-sacrificial love Jesus displayed. I want to do my best to be a leader to my family and those around me, and I believe it starts with having the right priorities. Chasing after fame or self-centered living simply isn’t worth it. Living to love God & being satisfied by him, serve others, and be a part of something bigger than yourself is always worth it. If you are living to love God and serve others, I hope this can also be a fresh reminder that it is always worth it.

God bless you, & God bless America.

- Jerry, Lisa, Michael, & Levi Evans

Please check out my website (https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=fe95ac24f9&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and my vision (https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=7eea95a061&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey.
------------------------------------------------------------

name: Laura Loomer
subject: He said “put up, or shut up”
body:
When my local Supervisor of Elections challenged voters to “put up, or shut up” regarding election integrity, I decided to pay him a visit.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PUqBSXUFVhZDjOPdBsj0Bw/0l40Rw61hcmwGSgJzzVZ2w)
Patriot,

When my local Supervisor of Elections challenged voters to “put up, or shut up” regarding election integrity, I decided to pay him a visit.

Watch what happened here:

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PUqBSXUFVhZDjOPdBsj0Bw/0l40Rw61hcmwGSgJzzVZ2w)
As you’ll see in the video, Alan Hays, was brave behind the comfort of his keyboard as he berated local voters in an op/ed, but when it came to actually talking to voters about election integrity, the guy decided to hide out in his office and watch TV rather than have a real discussion.

**We have to hold our elected officials accountable not just for their actions, but also their words!**

As I’ve always done in my career as an investigative journalist, I’ll continue to hold politicians accountable as a member of Congress.

[**I just need your help to get there!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PUqBSXUFVhZDjOPdBsj0Bw/0l40Rw61hcmwGSgJzzVZ2w)

**We have just NINE MONTHS until my primary election which will decide the seat.**

That means I have only nine months to defeat the Establishment machine that wants to maintain the status quo – **and it won’t be an easy task!**

This month, [**I have to raise $88,000 to stay on track with my fundraising goals**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PUqBSXUFVhZDjOPdBsj0Bw/0l40Rw61hcmwGSgJzzVZ2w) – and with the holidays coming, it will be harder than ever.

[**Can you donate $18, $28, $58 or $88 to help keep me on track?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/PUqBSXUFVhZDjOPdBsj0Bw/0l40Rw61hcmwGSgJzzVZ2w)

Every dollar helps.

Thanks again and I’ll let you know if Mr. Hays ever leaves his office!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/0l40Rw61hcmwGSgJzzVZ2w)

That means I have only nine months to defeat the Establishment machine that wants to maintain the status quo – and it won’t be an easy task! This month, – and with the holidays coming, it will be harder than ever. Every dollar helps. Thanks again and I’ll let you know if Mr. Hays ever leaves his office! subject: it feels like just yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38437021/315466049/-911644977?amount=10&&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211108_2_10&refcode2=6fe43f33-f940-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmU0M2YzMy1mOTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KeXr8huC_UbAL-Yu8n3Mj7UzucaKPrxEKoO4m_D3ahE=)

| | Hi there,

This time next year, polls will be closing across New Jersey and the country.

It feels like just yesterday we were watching as our margin of victory in New Jersey’s 7th District narrowed down to _just_ 1.2% and our House majority narrowed to just 5 seats. We’ve achieved so much with that tiny majority, including a historic bipartisan infrastructure bill! But with last weeks election results in mind, we know we can’t take anything for granted.

I couldn’t have won in 2020 without your unwavering support. With you on our team, I know we’ll win again in exactly one year from today. But we’re ramping up our campaign faster than ever as we’ve been faced with early and constant attacks from the GOP. That’s why it’s critical we reach our $20,000 fundraising goal by raising another $3,031 before midnight.

If you can, please make a contribution now as we face election day in exactly one year from today!

[https://act.malinowskifornj.com/a/one-year-2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38437022/315466050/1474767723?amount=25&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211108_2_10&refcode2=6fe43f33-f940-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmU0M2YzMy1mOTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KeXr8huC_UbAL-Yu8n3Mj7UzucaKPrxEKoO4m_D3ahE=)

Thank you so much for your continued support,

Tom

---
|

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Has Disappeared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Where's Gavin?](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzior3zTcl2qhdsy5O4iSbSMll&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nov_8_final&n=1) I don’t know where Gavin Newsom is and won’t speculate. But it’s pretty strange for the Governor to disappear for 12 days without explanation. Newsom hasn't been seen since abruptly cancelling his UN Climate trip. Today, reporters couldn't get an answer on his whereabouts from the Senators in the Scotland "delegation." Yesterday, Newsom's wife told those asking questions to "get a life" before quickly deleting the tweet. This isn't the first time Newsom has gone AWOL. Last August, he went missing for a week following a COVID “data glitch,” reappearing only after his Public Health Director resigned. This June, he fell off the radar when NPR revealed he’d lied about wildfire prevention efforts. Governors work for the people, so an unexplained absence is always a matter of public concern. But that’s especially true for a governor who has claimed sole authority to control the lives of millions of people through his own “State of Emergency.” That State of Emergency just passed 20 months. [My Resolution](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2mLSj4FPM2Ac4B3BVRXG3vw9qh-8nvEviiylo2zrV2YUM7L_E_p3OrJwH337t-BsNnzaNPezgGku0uZZ3xJmXguhXVtIriQWe_mmgl0G1Q-vJJX5EkpU67QZU7nAqNQL&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nov_8_final&n=2) to terminate it _still_ has not received a vote nor has Newsom answered [my letter](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooOtR81ko33x5jnynkKkt1KDWE-kn8NgiOXRjAHc_ZaLw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nov_8_final&n=3) asking him to justify it. So one-man rule continues, and nobody knows where that one man is. [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAzmlR-C6NcVxRvjZFs5Kg49WSOq070vmymGKig4ncDOrw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nov_8_final&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nov_8_final&n=5)California Legislator p.s. Thank you to everyone who responded to [my post](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziop9mzIcV7R6JucTeZaHBppe-TqVmAq0ubJWtndBQu2NCA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nov_8_final&n=6) about my plans for the 2022 election. Your feedback has been very helpful in deciding on our path forward.
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nov_8_final&n=7).

## **We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,_growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.**

It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | NOVEMBER 6, 2021 | | | We’ve raised over $200,000 now! That is more money than all the Conservative challengers COMBINED. This campaign team is absolutely on fire. There is a grassroots movement underway. I have so much hope for Idaho's future. | | | | | | | | | Vaccine Mandate Madness | | | (29 seconds) | | | | | | | | | In the press | | | | | | | Look, I’m no medical professional and am not in the habit of providing other people medical advice. I believe there should exist a level of humility in America where we respect others personal medical decisions and admit our understanding is imperfect. | | | | | | Principles above politics | | | | | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | | | | | | Word is spreading fast! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can’t volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Humphreys for Governor | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- You received this email because you helped us and should help us more.

name: Team Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

The countdown begins,
Peter.

There are now exactly 365 days until Election Day. That means for the next
365 days our team needs to:

* Bring our organizing work to all 120 counties of Kentucky, from the hood to
the holler and everywhere in between.
* Train thousands of volunteers to help conduct phone banks, knock on doors,
and register Kentuckians to vote.
* Amplify our movement’s message to replace Rand Paul with a Kentuckian who
understands firsthand the challenges so many families and working people
face right now.
* And prepare for every attack Rand Paul and his friends in the GOP are going
to throw to stop our fight for bold, progressive change.

It’s going to be a lot of work. But we’re ready. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12807?refcode=em20211108-1209&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1209%2E346206%2E-BcNEl ]Will you chip in
$3.65 or anything you can to show your support for our people powered
movement? We’re racing to raise 2,022 grassroots contributions today to
send a powerful message to Rand Paul that there’s a powerful coalition
rising up to end this chapter of failed leadership in the Senate.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12807?refcode=em20211108-1209&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1209%2E346206%2E-BcNEl ]Contribute $3.65

Kentuckians have been suffering for decades at the hands of leaders like
Rand Paul. While our state has been falling behind in life expectancy,
health, and quality in education — our politicians have just been getting
richer.

That’s why over the weekend we were so excited to announce our campaign
vision for people-first change with a slate of policy priorities including
Medicare for All and universal basic income called the Kentucky New Deal.

Charles summarized our mission perfectly here: “I want more Kentuckians
having money in their pockets. I want everyone to have great, quality
health care. I want everyone to be safe in their homes and have true
community safety all across Kentucky. I want us to be healthy.”

But if we want to bring this vision to life — we have to be ready to put
in the work for the next 365 days and take on all of the special interest
donors who will be backing Rand Paul in this race.

Rand Paul and his wealthy allies will use the oldest tricks in the book:
they’ll call us names, they’ll distort facts, and they’ll lie to preserve
their grip on power. They’ll spend millions of dollars on television ads
to divide us. We can’t fall for it.

We can win — but it’s going to take all of us working together and
preparing for this competitive race starting
today. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12807?refcode=em20211108-1209&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1209%2E346206%2E-BcNEl ]Peter,
if you’re ready to get to work will you
please chip in $3.65 or anything you can to power our organizing and
campaigning work leading up to 2022?

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211108-1209-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1209_346206_-BcNEl&akid=1209%2E346206%2E-BcNEl

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1209%2E346206%2E-BcNEl

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Here is what the infrastructure bill means for your family.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38437141/315469852/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQ2Y2UwZS1mYzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uI63XCirMp5IjvgaCRzE6y85MFnUBr9kft2ISmYxKLg=&emci=a77e5265-f440-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=15d6ce0e-fc40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Late Friday night, I voted for the bipartisan infrastructure bill in the House. Here is what it means for folks in Washington state and across the country: **For starters, it is a big, bold investment for the long-term future of our nation's roads, bridges, airports, ports.** We are way behind in rebuilding, maintaining, and modernizing the critical infrastructure that keeps people and goods moving. In Washington state alone, 400 bridges are structurally deficient and 6500 need repairs. The supply chain shocks we are all experiencing highlight how critical these investments really are. **It is the next big step in taking on climate change.** We have more to do, of course, but this bill will make big investments in zero- and low-emission busses, and ferries. The investment in cleaner ferries is especially big right here in our district—where we have the largest ferry system in America and one that is responsible for 73% of our state's transportation carbon emissions. The plan will invest in mass transit, bike, and pedestrian networks, build out a national network of 500,000 electric vehicle chargers, upgrade our electric grid to make it ready for green energy sources, and protect our energy system against cyberattacks and extreme weather. Our transportation plan also includes a major expansion and recommitment to passenger rail service nationwide, especially for critical routes connecting communities in Northwest Washington to Seattle, Portland, Spokane, and Vancouver BC. **And we are doing it all by putting hundreds of thousands of people to work in high-paying, union jobs.** All told, this is a very big deal. **Of course, we are not done yet.** Next, up, it is time to get our work done on the Build Back Better plan to make even more investments to stop the climate crisis and lower the cost of living for families through affordable housing, child care, elder care, prescription drugs, health care, and more. And we will pay for it all by raising taxes on people making over $10 million a year and corporations that hide profits overseas. Stay tuned. clean_body: | | | Late Friday night, I voted for the bipartisan infrastructure bill in the House. Here is what it means for folks in Washington state and across the country: For starters, it is a big, bold investment for the long-term future of our nation's roads, bridges, airports, ports. We are way behind in rebuilding, maintaining, and modernizing the critical infrastructure that keeps people and goods moving. In Washington state alone, 400 bridges are structurally deficient and 6500 need repairs. The supply chain shocks we are all experiencing highlight how critical these investments really are. It is the next big step in taking on climate change. We have more to do, of course, but this bill will make big investments in zero- and low-emission busses, and ferries. The investment in cleaner ferries is especially big right here in our district—where we have the largest ferry system in America and one that is responsible for 73% of our state's transportation carbon emissions. The plan will invest in mass transit, bike, and pedestrian networks, build out a national network of 500,000 electric vehicle chargers, upgrade our electric grid to make it ready for green energy sources, and protect our energy system against cyberattacks and extreme weather. Our transportation plan also includes a major expansion and recommitment to passenger rail service nationwide, especially for critical routes connecting communities in Northwest Washington to Seattle, Portland, Spokane, and Vancouver BC. And we are doing it all by putting hundreds of thousands of people to work in high-paying, union jobs. All told, this is a very big deal. Of course, we are not done yet. Next, up, it is time to get our work done on the Build Back Better plan to make even more investments to stop the climate crisis and lower the cost of living for families through affordable housing, child care, elder care, prescription drugs, health care, and more. And we will pay for it all by raising taxes on people making over $10 million a year and corporations that hide profits overseas. Stay tuned. name: GOP Spending Alert (via Team Ryan)
subject: UPDATE: Billionaire’s super PAC spends nearly $400k on ad buys for JD Vance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1377%2E3611125%2EI_HWZo ][IMG]

Oh no -- another GOP super PAC just placed another huge ad buy.

Tech billionaire Peter Thiel’s $10 million super PAC just spent nearly
$400k on digital ad buys supporting JD Vance.

Unlike his Republican opponents, Tim's not a millionaire -- he can't
compete with a $10 million super PAC alone. Our team is counting on
small-dollar grassroots donors to chip in what they can, when they can to
cut through the GOP's six-figure ad buys.

Our donors don’t give $10 million, they give $10 -- and we’re darn proud
of that. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5840?t=1007&akid=1377%2E3611125%2EI_HWZo ]So folks, can you show you’re with us and chip
in $10 or more to help Tim stop JD Vance in his tracks?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5840?t=1008&akid=1377%2E3611125%2EI_HWZo ]Donate $10

The GOP’s outrageous, extremist rhetoric is spreading across Ohio like
wildfire. We’ve got to snuff it out before it's too late.

But we have to do more than just stop the GOP. We have to show the voters
of Ohio that Tim has a plan to cut workers in on the deal -- an agenda
that will create good-paying jobs here in Ohio, make healthcare more
affordable, lower the cost of childcare, and give the working class a tax
break instead of big corporations.

And folks, we need resources and YOUR help to do that.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5839?t=1014&akid=1377%2E3611125%2EI_HWZo ]Will you chip in what you can so we can give JD Vance and Tim’s other
well-funded GOP opponents a run for their money?

Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: New Jersey Steal Underway
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
This is why audits are important! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e7cd2a7d41&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Have you been watching the news?

**Then you couldn’t have missed Glenn Youngkin’s tremendous win over Terry McAuliffe in Virginia. **

_And you also couldn’t miss the nail-bitingly close contest in New Jersey._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2fdc156dec&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **And if we have learned anything from close contests, this is where the Democrats DON’T PLAY FAIR!**

In the dead of night, once again we saw the same play out of the same playbook. Thousands of “miracle” votes procured out of thin air with already 100% of votes reporting...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f4c8120154&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| There is still time for this to play out and I am calling for all election integrity patriots to _watch this contest closely._

If we’re all watching, then they have nowhere to hide.

**_1:54 AM: When everything changed_**

As seems to be the pattern of Democrat “victories,” everything changes in the dead of night.

At 1:54, in particular.

Bergen County, New Jersey’s largest county, was claiming 100% votes reported with 219,894 votes, with Jack Ciattarelli winning 52% of the vote of that county.

**Then, a “glitch happened.”**

_Without warning, the vote switched to 261,528 votes (over 40,000 votes more), with Murphy declared winner of that county. 40,000 votes out of nowhere!_

**_Ringing any bells yet?_**

_This is exactly why I am pushing for a nationwide audit in all 50 states. We are making great progress here in Arizona. AG Brnovich has launched his investigation and we are pressing on to Pima!_

But this is not sufficient. When we see sources of blatant fraud, it is time for us to double down on our efforts and save our elections!

_If you think we need to push for a nationwide audit, especially in New Jersey, please support my efforts here!_

My name is Mark Finchem. I have been leading the vanguard of election integrity Patriots since I initially paid for election integrity hearings out of pocket.

**And this was the spark that ignited the firestorm now sweeping America of Election Integrity.**

_This is why I am the Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State of Arizona. He knows that I will protect elections in this key swing state and make sure that 2020 never happens again!_

**[But I cannot win this fight without your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=63dd2d62d1&e=44b8c466b0) We are almost done with 2021, and 2022 is about to begin. And we need to make sure we have the war chest to continue to fight the good fight against Liberals backed by crony Silicon Valley Billionaires.**

_[Can you help us win this fight with a generous donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5fc92b4e40&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=37c6b722bb&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3e023937bb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=824b8fb82b&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=ff2c376ea7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=ff2c376ea7).

Nancy Pelosi's days as Speaker are numbered. Together, we can defeat her next year. | | | |

| | | Patriot,

Last week, we saw **Republican victories at the local and state levels all across the country**. Now that election day 2021 has come and gone, it's time to set our sights on Congress.
---
| Congressman LaTurner and Republicans are working tirelessly to reduce taxes, lower spending, protect our border, and revive our economy from the devastation of COVID shutdowns.

But President Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the socialist Squad are ignoring real issues, focusing instead on _**wasteful spending and partisan pandering.**_

As of today, we now have **one year to defeat Pelosi.**

[Will you consider donating now to help us fight back?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ba37668d4d&e=1050d051da)

| This year, we've seen **gas and energy prices rise, record border crossings, staggering inflation, supply chain disruptions, Americans stranded in Afghanistan,** and many more crises that continue to rage on today.

Team LaTurner

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We need the Senate blue in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We only have one year to protect the progress we’ve made and defend our Democratic majority.
#
This is important, Peter:
We only have one year to protect the progress we’ve made and defend our Democratic majority.
It’s true, some elections this year did not go in our favor and some pundits are writing off our chances already. But we flipped the Senate in 2020, and I know we can keep it blue in 2022.
But with just one year until Election Day, **the GOP are ready and willing to do whatever it takes to flip the Senate red. We can’t allow that to happen.**
**[Will you commit to standing with me to defend the Democratic Senate majority and make a contribution of $5 or any amount to help ensure a strong footing for 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38437408/315471949/-1260929265?refcode=dd_em_211108_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTlhZjIxMi0wNTQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O675anbZfwWXOvea5w2X7sJ7UPsAVNzumkWf0gvpDJY=)**
The Senate GOP minority wants to prevent progessive policies, and at the expense of working families in Illinois and across the country.
We can’t stand by and let Mitch McConnell’s do-nothing GOP take back the Senate.
**[We need to show the Republicans we’re ready to win. Peter, will you chip in $5 or any amount towards defending our Democratic Senate in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38437409/315471950/-1260929265?refcode=dd_em_211108_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTlhZjIxMi0wNTQxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O675anbZfwWXOvea5w2X7sJ7UPsAVNzumkWf0gvpDJY=)**

Dick Durbin

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Almost 25 million eligible voters
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We need to reach people all across California.
#

Hi there,
**There are almost 25 MILLION eligible voters in California.**
And if we want to make sure we win this race and send Alex Padilla back to the Senate, _we’re going to have to build the type of campaign that can reach every single one of them._
Look, we aren’t taking anything for granted. We know that the same anti-mask, anti-vax, anti-immigrant, far-right forces that tried to recall Governor Newsom are going to be coming after Alex next. So we’re working hard to build up the kind of grassroots campaign that can reach people all across our great state.
But the truth is it’s going to take all of us getting involved to match up to the massive sums of money Republicans are going to pour into California to try to stop us.
**So what do you say?**
[**Can you please make your first $5 donation to Alex Padilla’s campaign today? We would not ask if it were not so important to win this race and send Alex Padilla back to the U.S. Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-15&t=1&refcode2=440_159979_ecvwpt&akid=440%2E159979%2Eecvwpt)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-15&t=2&refcode2=440_159979_ecvwpt&akid=440%2E159979%2Eecvwpt)**
Our fight to reform the immigration system, tackle climate change by passing a Green New Deal, and ensure access to quality and affordable health care by passing Medicare for All means there are a lot of powerful interests who want to keep Alex out of the Senate.
But as long as we stick together, our grassroots movement is stronger than anything they can throw our way.
Thank you for being a part of it!
\- Team Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211108-1-15&t=3&refcode2=440_159979_ecvwpt&akid=440%2E159979%2Eecvwpt)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=440%2E159979%2Eecvwpt)

Peter,

Biden is now planning to give **$450,000 in taxpayer dollars to illegal immigrants** who got caught breaking our nation’s immigration and border laws.

_His plan could total $1 billion in free money paid for by your taxes!_

My wife is a LEGAL immigrant who escaped war-torn Lebanon to seek a better life in America. Because she respects and obeys the law, _**she had to wait 16 years to be granted legal status as an American citizen!**_

Yet, _those who break our immigration laws are rewarded?_

Biden’s plan is an insult to our nation’s laws, to hard-working taxpayers, and to legal immigrants like my wife who patiently wait their turn and suffer through our broken immigration system to realize the American Dream.

I’m Shawn Collins – a black conservative Republican, Afghanistan combat veteran, and active Navy reservist – **and I’m running for Congress because we have a lack of leadership in America, and its time someone does something about it.**

[**Will you join me in fighting back against this failed agenda and restore real leadership in America by backing my campaign with a contribution today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fbc765ec5a0d4b84ab32426ee5df7092&_e=BlG2p79PrpXnhTNqB1s97CjnUOdQviGFpi9Xsh_cQxA1Xoi9n9S7byO3Lzme5-oEcWh0MHdeo0zzNOLm97pNQYY8BjZFmivRfXNJJ_hmUFh8UC8YHWNFMZyx-OUsqjQ6qpcZdrP8LAmfjfBQAW6-Pb01tQAg0YIc7FHLrc7OmKl97ogaZZVZ4zR0EB8ZuTDu9zs2Y600N8zzYEkcfTAjy2RQ4F6WogGJE9nYaND8IhvyVOEpObqydqZnpeRNA4uVNMgKDQFSkZQ9SxeYTsTA09DI9lqVvYDQ7U9YDPZTrudmo0_hiB_SWPXisLMyVcaHtnqQ-3hyWlbXLXQ_AE0q5jlBfJUr0O-DQYo6GSpq8RTi9YMZtDtiQ29h-fQazGorKjMne1seiL76Ev54PazEgQIdnWQZ8mZaTVdrhQBnQg52kC0kbP9yxW170PM4nfQ69sr1Xlv-65_t9NcC2vokyw%3D%3D)

Not only is Biden rewarding those who cross our borders illegally, but he’s refusing to secure the border and is responsible for the humanitarian and national security crisis this has caused.

After Biden botched the military withdrawal from Afghanistan, leaving the Taliban in control and in possession of our supplies and weaponry, **America became far less safe.**

An insecure border means anyone could cross unimpeded and unnoticed... **and YES, that includes Taliban terrorists.**

As long as our borders are not secure, Americans are not safe and taxpayer dollars will continue to be spent on those who break our laws.

**I need your help to fight for a secure border, a safe America, the enforcement of our nation’s laws, and responsible & accountable use of taxpayer dollars.**

[**Will you become a backer of my campaign for Congress with a supportive contribution of $10, $50, $100 or another amount today and help me restore leadership in America?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fbc765ec5a0d4b84ab32426ee5df7092&_e=BlG2p79PrpXnhTNqB1s97CjnUOdQviGFpi9Xsh_cQxA1Xoi9n9S7byO3Lzme5-oEcWh0MHdeo0zzNOLm97pNQYY8BjZFmivRfXNJJ_hmUFh8UC8YHWNFMZyx-OUsqjQ6qpcZdrP8LAmfjfBQAW6-Pb01tQAg0YIc7FHLrc7OmKl97ogaZZVZ4zR0EB8ZuTDu9zs2Y600N8zzYEkcfTAjy2RQ4F6WogGJE9nYaND8IhvyVOEpObqydqZnpeRNA4uVCHJ98TTBjdn0XLvaDKX1PbqZ4-5oyYhIi6d6Sfbg74zLwyGlJBHMF08QhBcfqtp4WmlSm3l1cf05djfugwqfBiObX-IOTYNMbhkfvIihJ2Z2KDNjjtAnIvIMAz7KB4BjD82tOcWu9DIK9nZpC_pmuJSZQ_27V8Do27JJ-bNqM9fAOIXVOhEHiiXZf11vBgrkYgtMpcLqttUcuz4MSCWbJw%3D%3D)

Thanks, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. | PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA Don't want to receive any more of our emails:

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Update on Build Back Better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Progressives are focused on delivering for working people, families, and our communities. That means investing in our roads and bridges — but it also means passing the Build Back Better Act.
#
Peter, a lot happened on Friday — so we wanted to catch you up to speed.
**Here's the deal:** Late Friday, the House sent a historic $1.2 trillion infrastructure package to President Biden's desk to be signed into law AND also took a critical step towards passing the Build Back Better Act.
**What comes next:** Pramila fought for and successfully negotiated a vote on the Build Back Better Act the week of November 14th — essentially giving us _one week_ to build the pressure necessary to pass this transformational bill that invests in childcare, paid leave, pre-K, health care, climate action, housing, and so much more.
Progressives are focused on delivering for working people, families, and our communities. That means investing in our roads and bridges — **but it also means passing the Build Back Better Act.**[**If you're still with Pramila in this urgent fight, can you chip in $3 or more today to help us get these transformative investments in working people over the finish line? This really is a make-or-break week.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211108?refcode=em20211108-787&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=787_420207_ctqT8H&akid=787%2E420207%2EctqT8H)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211108?refcode=em20211108-787&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=787_420207_ctqT8H&akid=787%2E420207%2EctqT8H)**
Thanks as always for having Pramila’s back.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211108-787-footer&t=21&refcode2=787_420207_ctqT8H&akid=787%2E420207%2EctqT8H)**

subject: Hi, you weren’t responding so I thought I’d check in one more time

body:
Nearly everyone on this list said they’re on Trump’s team, not with the Liberals.
Hi again,
I wasn't planning on doing this but I'm really hoping you'll respond if I try one last time...

clean_body: Mitch McConnell and his Republican minions are trying to block President Biden’s incredible agenda at every turn. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | Mitch McConnell and his Republican allies are trying to block President Biden’s incredible agenda at every turn. And we’re worried it’s working. So much of President Biden’s agenda is at a stalemate... This is what’s at stake: ✅ Lower prescription drug prices, ✅ Paid family leave, ✅ Medicare expansion, ✅ Universal Pre-K, ✅ And SO MUCH MORE! Thanks in advance, \--Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Katie Porter #momsquad
subject: Countdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office
#teamkatie
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/EA/EA007/1/88265/images/IMG_2521.JPG] DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]https://www.facebook.com/momsinoffice [https://www.facebook.com/momsinoffice] https://twitter.com/momsinoffice [https://twitter.com/momsinoffice] https://instagram.com/momsinoffice [https://instagram.com/momsinoffice]

Fellow patriot,

Biden is now planning to give **$450,000 in taxpayer dollars to illegal immigrants** who got caught breaking our nation’s immigration and border laws.

_His plan could total $1 billion in free money paid for by your taxes!_

My wife is a LEGAL immigrant who escaped war-torn Lebanon to seek a better life in America. Because she respects and obeys the law, _**she had to wait 16 years to be granted legal status as an American citizen!**_

Yet, _those who break our immigration laws are rewarded?_

Biden’s plan is an insult to our nation’s laws, to hard-working taxpayers, and to legal immigrants like my wife who patiently wait their turn and suffer through our broken immigration system to realize the American Dream.

I’m Shawn Collins – a black conservative Republican, Afghanistan combat veteran, and active Navy reservist – **and I’m running for Congress because we have a lack of leadership in America, and its time someone does something about it.**

[**Will you join me in fighting back against this failed agenda and restore real leadership in America by backing my campaign with a contribution today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a98d894db6bb45e39ac81e7bf4822c4e&_e=000N10-UDozuGJVH555Q4UaSKXdMxybktCh6R2kNPGu3tQVWEYv-fRhsVW3Wu6T55ZFUbtA5w4QEVujn6H9NoQd_rsn9OAGoi0lbsfVfBrmEGLge18Hv3CNwNLX8FSMlhUGzgleb5uHv0xpbXuan_hQRghSurFU5kQAQOv6uEn-ZozYMLPVVrufGxHttFy9ESuCvE1V9d2polCzr0JhYPUsnaGdyUWwo5DjW4a8_o7T5MyLEHnZjoGMmJ2ys24hRhzxlrb8-__Vvf9GEFKx1cRYk1gvV6JTLidkYSYgZSHsVOCZ949kp9RELvnFhG7PqOO491SWYXXJOPFH72otRaLcvHfOXQlAMz3xnPcQxkogpqUtiUukPZqCn_sG6IXTVzTSmHmwMlFAzdhzd38inpxBivP8Ug9jaKwuI_v9OQntV1IxdRjio6cfgs8M-jnG-EtzTu7Qao8KEvNxv-dYh0w%3D%3D)

Not only is Biden rewarding those who cross our borders illegally, but he’s refusing to secure the border and is responsible for the humanitarian and national security crisis this has caused.

After Biden botched the military withdrawal from Afghanistan, leaving the Taliban in control and in possession of our supplies and weaponry, **America became far less safe.**

An insecure border means anyone could cross unimpeded and unnoticed... **and YES, that includes Taliban terrorists.**

As long as our borders are not secure, Americans are not safe and taxpayer dollars will continue to be spent on those who break our laws.

**I need your help to fight for a secure border, a safe America, the enforcement of our nation’s laws, and responsible & accountable use of taxpayer dollars.**

[**Will you become a backer of my campaign for Congress with a supportive contribution of $10, $50, $100 or another amount today and help me restore leadership in America?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a98d894db6bb45e39ac81e7bf4822c4e&_e=000N10-UDozuGJVH555Q4UaSKXdMxybktCh6R2kNPGu3tQVWEYv-fRhsVW3Wu6T55ZFUbtA5w4QEVujn6H9NoQd_rsn9OAGoi0lbsfVfBrmEGLge18Hv3CNwNLX8FSMlhUGzgleb5uHv0xpbXuan_hQRghSurFU5kQAQOv6uEn-ZozYMLPVVrufGxHttFy9ESuCvE1V9d2polCzr0JhYPUsnaGdyUWwo5DjW4a8_o7T5MyLEHnZjoGMmJ2ys24hRdd9qmUld4E2OzGmsBlONujG_63LJhnzsErETMMjUeWWcAhrIVAWZb_cIGPSnfSth0GxzR0M334L0emy6I1-P0n8RFTnG7G0DFK4Z0FnHGIPOg2B0ivQt90F3GS3sNjIULe72qaHBkiNXGFjzwrlKBw9xFfbk37KTbXefYrCnvrzEzwf-EulOJgLaaJWeyYAByqJ_OgUR-mLXbwf3jq_rsQ%3D%3D)

We’ve got one year, folks.

One year to reach out to voters, one year to build a ground game spanning all of CA-23, one year to beat Kevin McCarthy.

So far, thousands of grassroots donors have chipped in to help us win a year from now, but the best possible way you can help is through a monthly recurring donation.

Monthly donors are the backbone of our campaign. Their gifts give us an idea of the amount of resources we’ll be able to invest in all aspects of our campaign. From billboards to Facebook ads to the water bottles at our canvassing events -- everything we do is because of small monthly donations.

**[So, can we count on you to join the ranks of our monthly supporters? clean_body: The best way to help before this time next year → | | | We’ve got one year, folks. One year to reach out to voters, one year to build a ground game spanning all of CA-23, one year to beat Kevin McCarthy. So far, thousands of grassroots donors have chipped in to help us win a year from now, but the best possible way you can help is through a monthly recurring donation. Monthly donors are the backbone of our campaign. Their gifts give us an idea of the amount of resources we’ll be able to invest in all aspects of our campaign. From billboards to Facebook ads to the water bottles at our canvassing events -- everything we do is because of small monthly donations. In solidarity, Team Bruno | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

Fellow Conservative,

Did you see the news? All across the country, Republicans **won**.

Americans are **FED UP** of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s hollow promises, failure, and authoritarianism.

Here in the House, Nancy Pelosi continues to rule with an iron fist. On the world stage, Joe Biden continues to fail in Afghanistan and continually capitulates to Russia and China. We have shortages of nearly everything here at home, and in our schools, the Democratic Machine continues to push **RACISM** and **LIES** on our kids.

[_**We MUST end the madness.**_](http://links.houseconservatives.com/u/click?_t=2f157a537fc642c9aa7481bf474f3189&_m=697b6e9e89774ed4855fd0c27899a50d&_e=9VAleGsyZrSkFwBs3tc2P_h2i1JAeeAXcwrXVnV7ds-4b3DAfjMeW2a-0BP5sUJ3__Fod_PvcpYq7VIzVUHEfwQQcIkhGBZsAkjhtwJKIeoah3TPredOh6L-ttDftJHKtovM82fc1YH_xQaMooc7qRWVJ1kQysNqB_J2-yMd3Cw0HOGcOqQ1bEcTNWmXWa4y1JbMRGi7hvOwIY_ZIgtGtRk3E5dmvdquS7wrMqlhXA1ePqNLH6UtwvjvjlNxR8lYpKx8GgA1_B4NyRBrTENdfvcrfC4wyTfnTHRpp2nqIsrclettsnNCx8Bm16SjJvwVJAlIdw2kkyt5vO4B8FKTF69MeAbQ5qgfaQ9OlBtzYwjlEaNb0Ptt0wRDZboqCIWoEYP-Zbkv6JuZc5UCsR04ACTzsdsPpaSjmMPFN2hRhp6ry3wy9o6g_kqIrmW7vlV5BRjxUSx7Y1eS-VOMu9mzLAXZQewXv8o8x-986UbBzdUZgSMBzmr9Dei4Pn9fXP4E)

**JOIN OUR MOVEMENT. By working together, Republicans can take back Congress and tell Joe Biden “no, this is OUR country, and we WILL stop your socialism.”**
[**JOIN THE MOVEMENT**](http://links.houseconservatives.com/u/click?_t=2f157a537fc642c9aa7481bf474f3189&_m=697b6e9e89774ed4855fd0c27899a50d&_e=9VAleGsyZrSkFwBs3tc2P_h2i1JAeeAXcwrXVnV7ds-4b3DAfjMeW2a-0BP5sUJ3__Fod_PvcpYq7VIzVUHEfwQQcIkhGBZsAkjhtwJKIeoah3TPredOh6L-ttDftJHKtovM82fc1YH_xQaMooc7qRWVJ1kQysNqB_J2-yMd3Cw0HOGcOqQ1bEcTNWmXWa4y1JbMRGi7hvOwIY_ZIgtGtRk3E5dmvdquS7wrMqlhXA1ePqNLH6UtwvjvjlNxR8lYpKx8GgA1_B4NyRBrTENdfvcrfC4wyTfnTHRpp2nqIsrniagng7YWmkMQE_dE9lIrD4JZ9GhJ7Ps5RQ6VWi3c8PkOqjmJRIBXNXRkcmfg2WKvx7TFtvJgmEbrFItEIE-telISxGjeJlYlPCGCb_ClW1FgPaiOh1ShTAQLBypd5UI87YSCA7cOTYkISWdu2aAYWA3aIcgoN-fb8N-hsU74zT8hXbE48G5QVUFvLtPvAGy_1F6vngFlF9xggYpGf2tr)

Jim Banks, Chairman

When we fail, we’re supposed to learn and get back on our feet, **but after 11 months of failure from a Joe Biden presidency, the American people have said enough is enough.**

_**No more failure or utopian policies, we the people want our country, our freedoms, and our pride back.**_ That’s why there’s a red wave coming, because we are done being pushed around by hypocrites and liars.

What we saw last week is just the beginning of what’s to come, and we need to be ready to win back Democrat strongholds, just like we did in Virginia. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: We’re officially a year out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We are a year out from Election Day and four months away from the primary!
#
**Today marks one year until election day and just**** _four_****months until our primary election****!** CNN has already ranked the top 10 U.S. Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022 — and North Carolina was named one of Democrats *best* chances to flip a Senate seat (_and expand our razor-thin majority_).
**_[Can you rush a donation to our campaign to send Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate now? It’s absolutely critical that we ramp up our efforts to mobilize voters and build support for Erica now.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25618?t=1&akid=619%2E3698%2EDE1-fe)_**
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25624?refcode=em20211108-619&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=619%2E3698%2EDE1-fe)**
**Smaller donations NOW are actually more helpful than donations closer to election day — even if those later donations are LARGER.** That’s right, your donation of $5, $10, or $15 TODAY will go further than a donation of $1,000 a month before election day. That’s because your donation today will go directly to our outreach efforts.
It’s absolutely critical that we have enough resources to build a strong cadence of communication with voters so they know who Erica is, why she’s the best candidate in this race, and get registered to vote and get out to the polls.
Those efforts are strongest when we start early. If we start closer to election day they aren’t as effective.
We have a once-in-a-generation chance to flip this seat blue and elect a progressive Black woman to the Senate in North Carolina. **All while we reject every dime of fossil fuel, super PAC, and corporate funds.**
[**_With your contribution today, we can have the resources to run a strong campaign in 2022._****Can Erica count on your grassroots contribution today?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25618?t=21&akid=619%2E3698%2EDE1-fe)
Let’s do this,
Erica Smith HQ
