name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: Huge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This weekend, we hit our goal of $10 million total raised for this campaign — but what’s most important is HOW we hit it:
#
Hi everyone,
It’s John + Gisele here —
A week ago, we asked you to help us reach our end-of-month goal of $10 million... **and this weekend we officially hit $10 million total raised for our campaign!!! THANK YOU 🙏**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37180?refcode=em20211108-3390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3390%2E434096%2EbZDoPZ)
But what’s most important is HOW we hit $10 million:
✅ Over 160,000 grassroots donors
✅ Over 360,000 individual donations
✅ From over 87% of PA zip codes
With exactly one year until the 2022 midterm elections, all eyes will be on Pennsylvania + our campaign — and if we want to flip this Senate seat blue and deliver for working people across the country, it’s *crucial* we keep up the momentum. So Derek, we’ve got to ask:
[**_Can you chip in to help power this grassroots campaign all the way to victory in 2022? It’s going to take all of us to flip this Senate seat, and any support you can give today will help us build on our progress._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37180?refcode=em20211108-3390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3390%2E434096%2EbZDoPZ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37180?refcode=em20211108-3390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3390%2E434096%2EbZDoPZ)**
Every dollar invested early makes a huge difference for the success of our campaign. It allows us to run a top-tier organizing program, reach as many voters as possible, recruit more volunteers, and scale up our statewide operations.
Thank you, THANK YOU for believing in this campaign, for supporting us, and for helping us reach this incredible milestone. 🙏
Your support means the world!
John + Gisele Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211108-3390-footer&t=22&refcode2=3390_434096_bZDoPZ&akid=3390%2E434096%2EbZDoPZ)**

---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

A huge THANK YOU to everyone who came out to our Phone Banking Kickoff last Thursday! We had a great time getting to know each other and hearing from Kelvin about his plan to #WinforAmerica. We also got on the phones and were able to spread Kelvin’s message to voters across Georgia.

Couldn't make it Thursday? Don't worry - our dial program is LIVE and Kelvin needs our help! For the next two weeks, from Monday, November 8th through Saturday, November 19th, we will have phone banks running at Campaign HQ (1640 Powers Ferry Rd. Bldg 26, Marietta, GA 30067) during the following times:

Mondays: 9:00am - 12:00pm; 2:00pm - 5:00pm
Tuesdays: 2:00pm - 5:00pm, 5:30pm - 8:30pm
Wednesdays: 9:00am - 12:00pm; 2:00pm - 5:00pm
Thursdays: 2:00pm - 5:00pm, 5:30pm - 8:30pm
Fridays: 2:00pm - 5:00pm
Saturdays: 9:00am - 12:00pm

If you bring a friend on a Saturday for a 3 hour shift you both will receive a Kelvin King Uncancel America t-shirt!

Reply to this email (Sarah@kelvinking.com), or call/text me at (404) 401-5500 to sign up for a shift (or two).

Let's #WinforAmerica!

Sarah Pritchard

Kelvin King for U.S. Senate

| Patriots, One year from today I will be joining you at the polls to vote as we choose our next representatives in Washington. The radical left forced their ideology and their election results on us last year and we are living the disastrous aftermath.
* Our border is an open door with illegal aliens being flown into our cities in the dead of night.
* Gas prices are skyrocketing with no signs of slowing down and food prices aren’t far behind.

Now more than ever, it is imperative that conservatives gain control of the Senate. A year may seem like a long time, but let me assure you, the fight has already begun. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Montgomery County Schools Teacher Training Records Show Lessons on ‘Restorative Justice’ and ‘Psychoeducation’
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that it received two sets of new records related to the teaching of critical race theory in Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS), Maryland’s largest school system.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 8, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26279&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbW9udGdvbWVyeS1zY2hvb2xzLWNydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA4MjMxNDI3) | **[Judicial Watch: Montgomery County Schools Teacher Training Records Show Lessons on ‘Restorative Justice’ and ‘Psychoeducation’](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26279&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbW9udGdvbWVyeS1zY2hvb2xzLWNydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA4MjMxNDI3)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it received two sets of new records related to the teaching of critical race theory in Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS), Maryland’s largest school system. The new records include a training course with information about a book titled “Antiracist Baby” that introduces the youngest readers to “the concept and power of antiracism,” and says it’s the “perfect gift” for “ages baby to age 3.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26279&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbW9udGdvbWVyeS1zY2hvb2xzLWNydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA4MjMxNDI3)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26280&F=H&) | **[U.S. to Spend Another $200 Million for More Illegal Immigrant Minor Shelters](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26280&F=H&)** Months after disbursing more than $65 million for extra shelters to accommodate the never-ending influx of illegal immigrant minors, the Biden administration is quietly allocating hundreds of millions more for additional facilities. The money is flowing through the Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR), a well-funded branch of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) charged with providing care to illegal aliens under the age of 18, classified by the government as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC). HHS funds and oversees around 170 state-licensed care facilities to house the young migrants when they arrive from foreign countries south of the border and it simply is not enough. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26280&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26281&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2JpZGVuLWZiaS1wYXJlbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDgyMzE0Mjc=) | **[Biden DOJ Uses FBI To Target Parents](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26281&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2JpZGVuLWZiaS1wYXJlbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDgyMzE0Mjc=)** A recent memo issued by Attorney General Merrick Garland calls for the FBI and DOJ to “address the rise in criminal conduct directed toward school personnel” – a policy Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton describes as an excuse to target parents who are critical of CRT and other left-wing teaching material. Relying on guidance from a prominent liberal education group, the National School Boards Association, which Fitton states, “compared these parents to domestic terrorists and suggested using the Patriot Act to target them,” the Biden DOJ is now “targeting average Americans going to school board meetings and complaining about Marxist propaganda brainwashing going on in our nation’s schools.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26281&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2JpZGVuLWZiaS1wYXJlbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDgyMzE0Mjc=)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26274&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmJpLWxhdy0xLTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwODIzMTQyNw==) | **[Judicial Watch Tells Court FBI May Have Violated Law in 1/6 Probes](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26274&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmJpLWxhdy0xLTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwODIzMTQyNw==)** “This Judicial Watch lawsuit shows how the FBI is corruptly trying to hide that it used the January 6 incident as an excuse to conduct unlawful surveillance of the American people’s bank transactions,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. ### [Maryland’s most populous county told students there is a ‘double pandemic’ of COVID and racism ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57087&L=26273&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZG91YmxlLXBhbmRlbWljLW1vbnRnb21lcnktY291bnR5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDgyMzE0Mjc=) Fox News According to new documents received by Judicial Watch and exclusively provided to Fox News, Maryland's most populous county, Montgomery County, launched a "psychoeducational lesson" teaching children in schools that there is a "dual pandemic" involving COVID-19 and "systemic racism." Materials recommended that teachers buy the Ibram X. Kendi book "Antiracist Baby" as "the perfect gift" for "ages baby to age 3." clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today that it received two sets of new records related to the teaching of critical race theory in Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS), Maryland’s largest school system. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 8, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received two sets of new records related to the teaching of critical race theory in Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS), Maryland’s largest school system. The new records include a training course with information about a book titled “Antiracist Baby” that introduces the youngest readers to “the concept and power of antiracism,” and says it’s the “perfect gift” for “ages baby to age 3.” ---|--- | | | | = | = Months after disbursing more than $65 million for extra shelters to accommodate the never-ending influx of illegal immigrant minors, the Biden administration is quietly allocating hundreds of millions more for additional facilities. The money is flowing through the Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR), a well-funded branch of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) charged with providing care to illegal aliens under the age of 18, classified by the government as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC). HHS funds and oversees around 170 state-licensed care facilities to house the young migrants when they arrive from foreign countries south of the border and it simply is not enough. = ---|--- | | | | = | = A recent memo issued by Attorney General Merrick Garland calls for the FBI and DOJ to “address the rise in criminal conduct directed toward school personnel” – a policy Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton describes as an excuse to target parents who are critical of CRT and other left-wing teaching material. Relying on guidance from a prominent liberal education group, the National School Boards Association, which Fitton states, “compared these parents to domestic terrorists and suggested using the Patriot Act to target them,” the Biden DOJ is now “targeting average Americans going to school board meetings and complaining about Marxist propaganda brainwashing going on in our nation’s schools.” = ---|--- | | | | == | == “This Judicial Watch lawsuit shows how the FBI is corruptly trying to hide that it used the January 6 incident as an excuse to conduct unlawful surveillance of the American people’s bank transactions,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. == ---|--- | | | = Fox News According to new documents received by Judicial Watch and exclusively provided to Fox News, Maryland's most populous county, Montgomery County, launched a "psychoeducational lesson" teaching children in schools that there is a "dual pandemic" involving COVID-19 and "systemic racism." Materials recommended that teachers buy the Ibram X. Kendi book "Antiracist Baby" as "the perfect gift" for "ages baby to age 3." = RealClearInvestigations A Hillary Clinton campaign operation to plant a false rumor about Donald Trump setting up a “secret hotline” to Moscow through a Russian bank was much broader than known and involved multiple U.S. agencies, according to declassified documents and sources briefed on an ongoing criminal investigation of the scheme. The Daily Caller United States Park Police were warned as early as Dec. 2020 that there was potential for an uprising at the Capitol on Jan. 6, and the Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) was monitoring demonstrations leading up to the riots, newly released court documents have revealed. = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

Peter,

Americans resoundingly rejected the Democrats' far-left agenda and failed leadership in state and local elections around the country on November 2nd.

This was just a preview of the massive losses Democrats will suffer in 2022, **and among the top targets for Republicans to defeat is my opponent:** Democrat Congresswoman Katie Porter in California's 45th District - a swing seat.

**Porter is a self-proclaimed socialist who is to the left of Maxine Waters.**

_In fact, Katie Porter is so extreme that Maxine Waters even kicked her off of a Congressional committee!_

When Katie Porter is not going on late night talk shows, appearing in glossy magazines like _Vanity Fair_ , or grandstanding while attacking CEOs, she's voting with The Squad and pushing Medicare-For-All, the Green New Deal, trillions in wasteful spending, and tax increases.

This was just a preview of the massive losses Democrats will suffer in 2022, and among the top targets for Republicans to defeat is my opponent: Democrat Congresswoman Katie Porter in California's 45th District - a swing seat. Porter is a self-proclaimed socialist who is to the left of Maxine Waters. In fact, Katie Porter is so extreme that Maxine Waters even kicked her off of a Congressional committee! When Katie Porter is not going on late night talk shows, appearing in glossy magazines like Vanity Fair , or grandstanding while attacking CEOs, she's voting with The Squad and pushing Medicare-For-All, the Green New Deal, trillions in wasteful spending, and tax increases. Peter, this race is one of the top targets that Republicans need to win to take back the House. It's going to take nationwide grassroots support, just like it took to flip Virginia red. As a black kid who grew up with divorced parents in a disadvantaged Dallas neighborhood, I had every reason to think I couldn't achieve the American Dream - but I didn't let that stop me. Thanks to sports, I attended Rice University - where I played Division-1 basketball - and then Law School at the University of Texas at Austin. I eventually enlisted in the United States Navy and volunteered for a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan. While stationed in Kabul City, Afghanistan, I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them identify and capture suspected terroist suicide bombers. I was even a target of two suicide bomb attacks and was blessed to survive. Now, my wife - who immigrated to America as a young refugee from war-torn Lebanon - and I are raising our four kids to live out their own American Dream. But politicians like Katie Porter are only making it harder. They're increasing government control over our lives, adding to our national debt, raising taxes, driving up the cost of living, and all while failing to fulfill government's most basic role: keeping us secure and safe. Removing far-left politicians and failed leaders like Katie Porter from Congress is just as important as flipping this swing seat. Attached please find some personal videos explaining our recently granted , and our . Significantly, the 5th Circuit already has issued a stay of the Biden vaccine mandate. I am forwarding these clips so you can see first-hand what we are doing. We are acting and winning — and not just talking! Also, please take a look at some of our recent national media clips: We are excited about the fights and victories in front of us and are extremely grateful for everything you have done. As I always say, we win as a team!!! And you have certainly pulled your weight on Team Morrisey!!! They know she’s DOOMED, so now they’re running to her rescue! Let’s be clear, Murkowski is no Conservative. She’s voted to advance Biden’s Radical and Extreme Far-Left appointees that are destroying President Trump’s America First legacy! To make matters even worse, she even voted for the Radical Left’s Impeachment sham! I am PROUD to be FULLY ENDORSED by President Trump. He knows I’ll NEVER cave to the Radical Left and I will always stand up against the Swamp! It’s disappointing to see the NRSC chairman has made it clear that they will do anything to save a fake “so-called” Republican like Murkowski, when she's too busy being Biden’s Chief Enabling Officer! The swamp will try and save her, but I’d rather have YOU on my side! Thanks, Kelly | | | | =
